source: On the " Cyrano " set , Rappeneau recalled , most of his cast was stymied by the challenge of reciting the lush alexandrine quartets of the script , and simultaneously executing complicated physical action . "
domestication: 在拍摄《大鼻子情圣》的时候，雷伯诺回忆说，他的演员们大多数都被剧本中那些华丽的十二音步韵律诗和复杂的动作同时进行而难以应对。这种要求对演员来说，即使是最有经验的戏剧演员，也是一个很棘手的技术问题。“怎么可能让我既跑得快，又说话慢？”其中一个演员问道。实际上，演员们确实面临着很大的挑战，要同时应对剧本中复杂的语言和身体动作。

source: Background : No one wants to bury a son or daughter , so I wo n't pretend to understand Dean Hancock 's pain . His son was a likable teammate , Cardinals players told me , who did grunt work as a middle reliever . But he had issues . That 's why the Cincinnati Reds released him in spring training two years ago , citing his poor conditioning .

source: Ba Vo is the dressed-up little sister of Pho 84 , a downtown Oakland mainstay for more than 20 years . Ambience aside , you 'll find the same menu and efficient service at both . Some old favorites like the black pepper prawns have disappeared , but the fare goes beyond the usual Vietnamese . Squid stuffed with chicken and mushrooms come in a rich spicy shrimp sauce ; tofu with black mushrooms and clear noodles are covered with a coconut curry cream . Ba Vo is open weekdays only .
domestication: 八道湾区的巴沃餐厅，可以说是市中心俄克兰老店Pho 84打扮得漂漂亮亮的小妹妹。除了环境不同之外，你在这两家店会发现相同的菜单和高效的服务。虽然有一些老顾客喜欢的菜比如黑胡椒虾已经不见了，但这里的饭菜还是超出了你对普通越南菜的想象。鱿鱼塞满鸡肉和蘑菇，浸泡在浓郁辛辣的虾酱中；豆腐配上黑蘑菇和透明面条，被一层椰子咖喱奶油覆盖着。巴沃餐厅只在工作日开业。
foreignization: Ba Vo 是 Pho 84 的盛装打扮的小妹妹，Pho 84 已经成为奥克兰市中心超过20年的主力店铺。在氛围之外，你可以在这两家店找到相同的菜单和高效的服务。一些旧时最爱，如黑胡椒虾已经消失了，但这里的菜肴超出了通常的越南美食。用鸡肉和蘑菇填充的鱿鱼伴随着浓郁的辣虾酱；与黑色蘑菇和透明面条一起的豆腐被一层椰奶咖喱覆盖。Ba Vo 只有在工作日开放。

source: No single group has cornered the market on caring ; nevertheless , many people would never call it " volunteering " -- they might say they are just " helping out . " Joining neighbors to make sandwiches for a shelter or speaking on a panel for no pay , researchers estimate , make up about a third of all volunteer efforts .
domestication: 其实帮忙别人这件事谁都能干，而且并不是只有哪一群人在做。虽然很多人会这么做，但他们不一定会把自己的行为称之为“志愿者”，他们可能会说自己只是在“帮忙”。比如，跟邻居们一起为避难所做三明治，或者无偿参加座谈会，这些都是志愿者的行为。研究人员估计，这类活动大约占所有志愿者努力的三分之一。
foreignization: 没有一个群体垄断了关怀；然而，很多人永远不会把它称之为“志愿服务”-- 他们可能会说他们只是“帮忙”。加入邻居为庇护所制作三明治或免费在小组发言，研究人员估计，大约占所有志愿者努力的三分之一。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: " We are seeing a far more aggressive use of the alternative sources of political funding , " former FEC commissioner Trevor Potter says . He fears that candidates , seeing a new permissiveness from regulators , might try to keep their PACs and foundations active next year , adding : " If so , those who abide by the rules will be at a significant disadvantage . "
domestication: “我们正在见证对替代政治资金来源的使用变得更加咄咄逼人，”前联邦选举委员会委员特雷弗·波特如是说。他担心，候选人会认为监管者变得更加宽容，因此可能会在明年继续保持他们的政治行动委员会和基金会的活跃状态，他补充说：“如果真的这样，那么那些遵守规则的人将处于显著的劣势。”这就像古话说的“法不责众”，既然监管放松了，那些有钱有势的候选人自然会想方设法利用这个机会来扩大自己的影响力，而那些遵纪守法的候选人就只能自叹不如了。
foreignization: " 我们看到的是对替代政治资金来源的更激进的利用，" 前联邦选举委员会专员特雷弗·波特说。他担心候选人会在监管机构看到了新的宽容之后，尝试在明年继续保持他们的政治行动委员会和基金会的活跃性，他补充说： " 如果是这样，那么那些遵守规则的人将处于显著的劣势。 "

Translate the following text to Chinese.

" We are seeing a far more aggressive use of the alternative sources of political funding , " former FEC commissioner Trevor Potter says . "

source: The companies have also banded together to support the idea of a " trusted traveler " card . Adm . James M. Loy , head of the federal security agency , said yesterday at a Senate hearing that he backed the concept . But such a program should be put in place slowly , some security experts say , and it could be costly for the taxpayer . Moreover , any watering down of current procedures -- including removing random checks -- could have dire consequences .
domestication: 这些公司还联合起来支持“可靠旅客”卡的想法。联邦安全局局长詹姆斯·M·洛伊昨天在参议院听证会上表示，他支持这一理念。但一些安全专家认为，这样的计划应该慢慢实施，而且可能会让纳税人付出高昂的代价。此外，如果放松现有的程序，包括取消随机检查，可能会带来严重后果。这样做可能会让国家安全受到威胁，到时候大家都后悔莫及。所以，还是稳妥为妙，不能图省事、赶时髦。
foreignization: 这些公司还联合起来支持“可信旅行者”卡的理念。联邦安全机构负责人詹姆斯·M·洛伊海军上将昨天在参议院听证会上表示，他支持这一概念。但是，一些安全专家说，这样的计划应该逐步实施，而且可能会给纳税人带来高昂的费用。此外，任何淡化当前程序的做法——包括取消随机检查——都可能产生严重后果。

source: However . The death row piece had to be a victim of agenda or a tool to rally a dwindlingly dearth of midnight marchers . " Seven former prosecutors want to prevent the execution because at some later date , if new evidence is found , it would be too late . " Are these " former prosecutors " perhaps now on the other side , making certain that today 's group of suspected killers get a novel and original defense , while investing the public 's money , without sharing the book or movie rights ?
domestication: 话虽如此，这篇关于死刑的文章不免成为了某种议程的牺牲品或是号召那些日渐减少的深夜游行者的工具。“七名前检察官想阻止处决，因为如果稍后发现了新的证据，就为时已晚。”这些“前检察官”会不会现在站在对方立场上，确保今天这一批疑似杀人犯得到一个新颖独特的辩护理由，同时使用公共资金，却不分享这其中的书籍或电影版权呢？他们难道不是在投机取巧，既想坐享其成，又想让大众买单？这种行为真是让人费解。
foreignization: 然而，死刑案件不得不成为议程受害者或集结越来越少的午夜游行者的工具。 “七名前检察官想防止处决，因为如果稍后发现新的证据，将为时已晚。” 这些“前检察官”可能现在站在另一边，确保今天的嫌疑人杀手群体获得一种新颖和独特的辩护，同时投资公众的钱，而不分享书籍或电影版权？

source: Boxing helped Hopkins get through 56 months of incarceration . He won four national middleweight penitentiary titles and used his time behind bars to earn his general equivalency diploma . source: The Opening Ceremonies are in Atlanta , but Columbus is bringing its Olympic sport to town with a bash of its own . Columbus ' welcome ceremony will be July 20 , the night before the first-ever pitch of Olympic softball competition . The ceremony , to be held at the city 's Memorial Stadium , includes fireworks , the showing of a film called " Faces of Columbus " and appearances by the Columbus Symphony Orchestra , Up With People and singer Peabo Bryson . Games begin July 21 at Golden Park .
domestication: 奥运会的开幕式虽然在亚特兰大举行，但哥伦布市也自有它的热闹节目。7月20日，在奥运会垒球比赛的前一晚，哥伦布市将举办自己的欢迎仪式，地点是在市里的纪念体育场。届时，人们不仅可以欣赏到美丽的烟花，还可以观看一部叫做“哥伦布的面孔”的电影，并且有哥伦布交响乐团、Up With People歌舞团以及歌手比博·布莱森的献声演出。第二天，7月21日，奥运会的比赛就将在金色公园正式开始了。

source: This physical proximity was accentuated by the fact that so many Enron employees had once worked at Andersen ; at Mr. Skilling 's old firm , McKinsey ; and to a lesser degree at Vinson &; Elkins . Enron 's general counsel , James Derrick , had once been a Vinson &; Elkins partner . The company 's chief accounting officer , Richard A. Causey , had started at Andersen .
domestication: 安然公司和会计师事务所之间的关系非比寻常地密切，这也就难怪外界会对安然公司的财务状况产生那么多怀疑。这种亲密关系主要是因为安然公司的大部分员工都曾在安达信（Andersen）工作过，而安然公司前任CEO斯基林（Skilling）之前是在麦肯锡（McKinsey）工作的。此外，一些员工还曾在Vinson & Elkins律师事务所工作过。安然公司的首席法律顾问詹姆斯·德里克（James Derrick）之前就是Vinson & Elkins律师事务所的一名合伙人，而首席会计官理查德·A·考西（Richard A. Causey）则是从安达信开始他的职业生涯的。这一系列人事交叉使得安然公司和安达信之间的关系变得异常密切。
foreignization: 这種身體上的接近是因為有許多安然公司（Enron）的員工曾經在安達信（Andersen）工作過；在史基林（Skilling）的舊公司麥肯錫（McKinsey）工作過；以及在文森和艾爾金斯（Vinson & Elkins）工作過。安然公司的法律顧問詹姆斯·德里克（James Derrick）曾經是一名文森和艾爾金斯的合夥人。該公司的首席會計官理查德·A·考西（Richard A. Causey）在安達信開始了他的工作。

This physical proximity was accentuated by the fact that so many Enron employees had once worked at Andersen ; at Mr. Skilling 's old firm , McKinsey ; and to a lesser degree at Vinson &; Elkins . Enron 's general counsel , James Derrick , had once been a Vinson &; Elkins partner . The company 's chief accounting officer , Richard A. Causey , had started at Andersen .

安然公司和会计师事务所之间的关系非比寻常地密切，这也就难怪外界会对安然公司的财务状况产生那么多怀疑。这种亲密关系主要是因为安然公司的大部分员工都曾在安达信（Andersen）工作过，而安然公司前任CEO斯基林（Skilling）之前是在麦肯锡（McKinsey）工作的。此外，一些员工还曾在Vinson & Elkins律师事务所工作过。安然公司的首席法律顾问詹姆斯·德里克（James Derrick）之前就是Vinson & Elkins律师事务所的一名合伙人，而首席会计官理查德·A·考西（Richard A. Causey）则是从安达信开始他的职业生涯的。这一系列人事交叉使得安然公司和安达信之间的关系变得异常密切。

source: Marshall is the only team that has captured more than one Class AA state title . The Patriots open defense of their state championship Nov. 22 in the Maine West Tournament against the host Warriors . Then they face Public League powers Young and Washington . Also on the schedule are games against nationally ranked powers Trinity from Garfield Heights , Ohio , and Milwaukee 's Pius XI .

source: A lot of people turn to the internet to look for a new pet . However , experts say if you try to purchase a pet online , there 's a good chance you 'll get scammed . A new report by the Better Business Bureau ( BBB ) says that online pet sale scams are on the rise . Keep in mind , there are some legitimate breeders , but a majority of the websites appear to be scams . In fact , the BBB warns that when you search online , 80 percent of sponsored links may be fraudulent .
domestication: 现在很多人在网上找新宠物，但是专家说如果你想在网上买宠物，被骗的几率非常高。刚出的一个报告显示，网上卖宠物的骗局越来越多。话虽这么说，也有真心想把宠物找个好归宿的养殖者，不过大部分网站都是骗人的。在网上搜索时，你会看到很多付费的广告链接，有八成都是诈骗。
foreignization: 很多人会在互联网上寻找一只新的宠物。然而，专家说，如果你尝试在线购买宠物，你有很大的可能会被骗。美国商业改进局（BBB）的一份新报告称，网络宠物销售诈骗案例正在增加。要记住，有些合法的繁殖者，但是大多数网站似乎都是诈骗。在事实上，美国商业改进局警告，当你在线搜索时，80%的赞助链接可能是欺诈性的。

source: The story of the region 's top 100 publicly traded firms emerges from such distinct , different rhythms of companies within clusters of core industries . The sectors reflect the region 's past and future : biotechnology , communications , defense and government contracting , finance and insurance , health , manufacturing , media , real estate and construction , retailing , technology , and transportation and energy .

这片区域里有百强上市公司，它们各自拥有自己独特的发展节奏，属于不同的产业集群。这些产业可以从侧面反映出这个地区的过去和未来，主要包括生物技术、通讯、国防和政府采购、金融和保险、医疗、制造业、媒体、房地产和建筑、零售、科技、交通和能源等领域。这些领域各有各的特点，然而它们都在推动着这个地区的经济发展。

source: Atlanta Journal editorial columnist Dick Williams spoke with President Bush by telephone Monday afternoon . source: Years ago , I was sent out to a " man with a gun " call at Hyatt Rickeys in Palo Alto . Those are the times you wish you had a regular job , in an office . But all those poor guys at the World Trade Center worked in an office . You may as well work at what you chose to do , and take the good with the bad .

source: Julie Langhorne , who 's lived through two kitchen renovations in different homes , says having the right equipment and surroundings helps her cook more often . She picked her east Cobb home partly for its outdated kitchen , one that she knew there would be no question of keeping . The white tile countertops had cracked as the house settled . The cabinets were white , most appliances black , the refrigerator almond . One oven did n't work , and pots slid around on the uneven cooktop .
domestication: 朱莉·兰霍恩已经经历了两次厨房装修，分别是在不同的家里。她说，拥有合适的设备和环境可以让她更常地做饭。在选择现在的东科布家时，她专门挑选了那间过时的厨房，因为她知道这间厨房必须得改。雪白的瓷砖台面已经开裂，家里地基沉降的缘故。橱柜是白色的，大部分电器却是黑色，冰箱还特立独行地是杏仁色。一个烤箱不能用，锅碗瓢盆在不平的炉灶上乱滑，真是烹饪的难题。

source: To discourage manipulation of wholesale purchases , FERC has proposed new rules , including making suppliers disclose their bids to other bidders after a brief lag . Bids are now kept secret for six months . " We 're trying to increase the transparency , " says FERC Chairman Joseph Kelliher . He says FERC is closely monitoring power markets and , with a 2005 law , can now impose hefty fines for manipulation .
domestication: 为了防止对批发采购的操纵，联邦能源监管委员会提出了一些新规则，包括要求供应商在短暂延迟后向其他投标方披露自己的出价。现在，出价会被保密六个月。联邦能源监管委员会主席约瑟夫·凯利赫说：“我们正尝试提高透明度。”他说，委员会正在密切关注电力市场，并且凭借2005年的法律，现在可以对操纵行为施加重罚。

source: Liu Tianyuan , factory manager for the processing company , said profit would be even greater , even 20 percent more , if the plants were not so concerned about quality . He said the company spends a lot of money each year training its farmers on how to best use drugs safely and tests each batch of fish for illegal contaminants three times during its seven- to eight-month growing cycle .
domestication: 刘天元是这家加工厂的厂长，他表示，如果工厂不那么在乎质量，利润会更高，甚至多出20%。他说，每年公司都要花很多钱来培训农民如何安全使用药物，而且每批鱼在七到八个月的种植周期中会被检测三次，以检查是否有违禁污染物。这样做虽然增加了成本，但也保证了产品的质量。

source: A rider for the last seven years -- he said he took it up to get over a love affair -- Mr. Srybnik is one of a legion of bikers who can be spotted ( and heard , certainly ) with their motorcycles outside the trendier places in SoHo each weekend , or in the Hamptons in summer . Soldiers in a volunteer army , they carry the Harley-Davidson banner not only on the roadways , but also to the ramparts of fashion and style .
domestication: 这位先生已经骑行七年了，他说这是为了忘却一段爱情。每个周末，你都可以在时尚的苏豪区或夏天的汉普顿看到他和其他无数骑手聚集，停着他们的摩托车，发出轰鸣声。他们就像志愿军一样，沿着道路行驶，并将哈雷戴维森品牌带到了时尚与风格的阵地上。
foreignization: 过去七年里的一名骑手——他说自己开始骑车是为了忘掉一段恋爱——斯莱布尼克先生是众多骑手中的一员，他们可以在每个周末被发现（当然，还有他们的摩托车）在索霍区的时尚场所外，或是在夏天的汉普顿。作为志愿军的士兵，他们不仅在道路上，还在时尚和风格的防御工事上携带哈雷戴维森的旗帜。

source: The competitors spike the water with banned substances to keep their farmed fish alive . Batches of seafood traded at the Shanghai fish market this week , for example , carried the tell-tale greenish tinge of malachite green , a disinfectant powder that has been banned in China for five years because it is a suspected carcinogen but is still commonly used .
domestication: 养鱼人为了让自己养的鱼活下来，竟然在水里下了违禁药。比如说，这周在上海海鲜市场上出售的鱼，带有明显的绿色，这是因为里面掺了马拉喀石绿，一种五年前就被禁用的消毒粉。这种东西被怀疑是致癌物，但现在还是有人在用。
foreignization: 参赛者在水中添加了被禁的物质以保持他们养殖的鱼存活。本周在上海鱼市交易的海鲜批次中，例如，带有被禁五年且有疑似致癌作用的消毒粉绿脲的典型青绿色，但这种物质仍然被广泛使用。

source: Today 's volunteers are software engineers who cap 10-hour work days by tutoring children in math . People living in shelters stock shelves at food banks . Immigrants serve as mental health counselors for newer arrivals in their neighborhoods . Middle school students help elderly people with art therapy projects . And pilots give free air transportation to medical patients .

source: But I have often seen a quiet smile in his eye , as if the world contains private jokes at which he is much amused . That smile was rare in his performance as " Gandhi " ( 1982 ) , but it was one of the reasons he won the Academy Award as best actor : It took the edge off the character 's nobility , and made him human in his greatness .
domestication: 不过，我常常在他的眼中看到一种安静的微笑，就像世界上有他知道的私密笑话一样。他在《甘地》（1982年）中的表演很少露出这种微笑，但这正是他赢得奥斯卡最佳男主角奖的原因之一：它让甘地这个角色显得更加平易近人，让人们在他的伟大之外看到了一丝人类的气息。这一切都让他看起来更加真实。
foreignization: 但是我经常看到他眼中闪现的宁静的微笑，仿佛世界中有只有他知道的私人笑话，他从中得到了很大的乐趣。这种微笑在他扮演“甘地”（1982）时很少出现，但它是他赢得奥斯卡最佳男主角奖的原因之一：它缓和了角色高尚的气质，让他的伟大显得更有人性。

source: Parents , politicians and religious leaders will continue to argue about whether all this sex affects the nation 's moral fiber . But what about the nation 's need for laughs ? In the last several decades , television 's depiction of life has taken a 180-degree turn toward the prurient , but virtually no one -- including the writers and producers responsible for today 's shows -- says that all this sex makes sitcoms inherently funnier .
domestication: 家长、政客和宗教领袖会继续争论这么多性爱内容是否会影响国家的道德观念。但是，我们该如何看待一个需要笑声的国家呢？过去几十年来，电视剧对生活的描绘已经发生了180度的大转变，变得更加低俗，但几乎没有人——包括编剧和制作人在内——认为这些性爱内容能够让喜剧本身变得更有趣。大家都知道，真正的搞笑不是靠低俗来支撑的，搞笑的关键还是在于情节的新颖和演员的表演。所以，即使电视剧不去刻意追求那些性感镜头，也照样可以让观众开怀大笑。
foreignization: 家长、政客和宗教领袖将继续争论这一切性是否影响了国家的道德观念。但是，关于整个国家需要幽默的需求怎么办？在过去的几十年里，电视对生活的描绘已经向着猥亵的方向转变了180度，但是几乎没有人——包括今天这些节目的编剧和制片人——说所有这些性元素使情景喜剧本身变得更加搞笑。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Parents , politicians and religious leaders will continue to argue about whether all this sex affects the nation 's moral fiber . But what about the nation 's need for laughs ? In the last several decades , television 's depiction of life has taken a 180-degree turn toward the prurient , but virtually no one -- including the writers and producers responsible for today 's shows -- says that all this sex makes sitcoms inherently funnier .

家长、政客和宗教领袖会继续争论这么多性爱内容是否会影响国家的道德观念。但是，我们该如何看待一个需要笑声的国家呢？过去几十年来，电视剧对生活的描绘已经发生了180度的大转变，变得更加低俗，但几乎没有人——包括编剧和制作人在内——认为这些性爱内容能够让喜剧本身变得更有趣。大家都知道，真正的搞笑不是靠低俗来支撑的，搞笑的关键还是在于情节的新颖和演员的表演。所以，即使电视剧不去刻意追求那些性感镜头，也照样可以让观众开怀大笑。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Parents , politicians and religious leaders will continue to argue about whether all this sex affects the nation 's moral fiber . But what about the nation 's need for laughs ? In the last several decades , television 's depiction of life has taken a 180-degree turn toward the prurient , but virtually no one -- including the writers and producers responsible for today 's shows -- says that all this sex makes sitcoms inherently funnier .
家长、政客和宗教领袖将继续争论这一切性是否影响了国家的道德观念。但是，关于整个国家需要幽默的需求怎么办？在过去的几十年里，电视对生活的描绘已经向着猥亵的方向转变了180度，但是几乎没有人——包括今天这些节目的编剧和制片人——说所有这些性元素使情景喜剧本身变得更加搞笑。

source: Like many sitcom writers , Mr. Charles makes a distinction between good sex and bad on television . The sex on NBC 's " Seinfeld , " for example , is handled with great sophistication , he says . Even the famous episode in which the four main characters compete to see who can refrain longest from masturbating -- Mr. Charles did n't write it -- was executed with remarkable subtlety . " Most important , " he says , " it was very , very funny . "
domestication: 像很多情景喜剧编剧一样，查尔斯先生认为电视上有好性的和坏性的区别。比如说，NBC的《宋飞正传》里的性就处理得非常有水平，他这么说。即便是那一集著名的四个主要角色比赛看谁能坚持最久不手淫的剧情——查尔斯先生也没写过——也被处理得非常细腻。“最重要的是，”他说，“那真的非常、非常搞笑。”
foreignization: 和很多情景喜剧的编剧一样，查尔斯先生在电视上对好的性爱内容和不好的性爱内容有所区分。例如，他说NBC的《宋飞正传》里的性爱场面处理得非常有修养。甚至那一集四个主要角色竞争看谁能最长时间不手淫的著名剧集--查尔斯先生没有写这一集--也执行得很微妙。“最重要的是，”他说，“它非常、非常好笑。”

source: Lookout Mountain , Ga . - Bob and Carol Webber have just taken a quantum leap backward in the history of American tourism . Employees of Disney World , they 've driven 540 miles from the virtual reality of Orlando to the craggy antiquity of Lookout Mountain . On a crisp , sunny spring day , they 're meandering down the paths of Rock City , cooing over the geological garden 's weird natural beauty , when something catches Mrs. Webber 's eye .
domestication: 卢图山，佐治亚州——鲍勃和卡罗尔·韦伯夫妇已经穿越时空来到了美国旅游业的过去。作为迪士尼世界的员工，他们从奥兰多的虚拟世界驱车五百四十英里来到了粗犷古老的卢图山。在一个清爽的春日，他们漫步在巨石城的路径上，对着这座地质花园奇特的自然美景啧啧称赞。这时，卡罗尔夫人注意到了一些东西...

source: However , further Japanese stock market drops - say a 5,000-point dive in the Nikkei - could be damaging to U.S. markets long-term . Such a vast evaporation of wealth and liquidity could cripple Japanese investors ' ability to buy U.S. bonds . " If Japan fails to show up at our Treasury auctions because of a lack of new money , we 'd have to raise interest rates here substantially to attract buyers , " says Gavin Dobson , president of investment firm Murray Johnstone International . " That 's the greatest danger . " Contributing : Mark Schilling in Tokyo
domestication: 不过，如果日本股市再大幅下跌，比如日经指数暴跌5000点，对美国市场的长期影响可能会很糟糕。这么大的财富和流动性蒸发掉，会让日本投资者无法再购买美国国债。投资公司Murray Johnstone International的总裁Gavin Dobson说：“如果日本因为没有新钱而不再参加我们的国债拍卖，我们就得大幅提高利率来吸引买家。这是最大的危险。”本文由驻东京记者Mark Schilling提供素材。
foreignization: 然而，进一步的日股下跌——比如日经指数暴跌5000点——可能会对美国市场造成长期损害。如此大量财富和流动性的蒸发可能会削弱日本投资者购买美国债券的能力。“如果日本因缺乏新资金而不参加我们的国库券拍卖，我们将不得不大幅提高利率以吸引买家，”投资公司Murray Johnstone International总裁Gavin Dobson说：“这才是最大的危险。”_contributor：东京的Mark Schilling

" That 's the greatest danger . " Contributing : Mark Schilling in Tokyo

然而，进一步的日股下跌——比如日经指数暴跌5000点——可能会对美国市场造成长期损害。如此大量财富和流动性的蒸发可能会削弱日本投资者购买美国债券的能力。“如果日本因缺乏新资金而不参加我们的国库券拍卖，我们将不得不大幅提高利率以吸引买家，”投资公司Murray Johnstone International总裁Gavin Dobson说：“这才是最大的危险。”_contributor：东京的Mark Schilling

source: It was a symbol and a sacrifice . Some Kenyans muttered that President Daniel arap Moi would n't win his people 's congratulations for incinerating wealth that could have been used for urgent public needs , including wildlife protection . " They could have sold it in some other country ; the animals were already dead , " said one worker .
domestication: 这不仅是一种象征，也是一种牺牲。一些肯尼亚人私下议论说，总统丹尼尔·阿拉普·莫伊（Daniel arap Moi）不太可能因为烧掉本可以用于紧急公共需求（包括野生动物保护）的财富而受到人们的祝贺。“他们本可以把这些象牙卖到其他国家去，反正大象已经死了，”一名工人说。

source: Sure , there was always a better-than-decent chance 2016 would yield a historic result : Hillary Clinton becoming the first woman to be president . It 's easy to forget now that Mrs. Clinton might have been the most admired political figure of either party until a few months before she started running again ; before Bernie Sanders , before Donald J. Trump , before the " damn emails . " She appeared , at the outset , to have a nuisance-free path to the Democratic nomination and entered the race as a clear favorite over the demographically hobbled G.O.P. , whose default manifesto entering this election was called an " autopsy . " Even as young voters declared themselves uninspired by Mrs. Clinton , the " historic nature of her candidacy , " as her campaign put it so clinically , made for a momentous backdrop to all the disruption that followed .
domestication: 当然，当时就有很多人觉得2016年的大选会有一个历史性的结果，那就是希拉里·克林顿成为第一位女性总统。当时大家都觉得她是最有希望赢得大选的人，不管是在民主党还是共和党，她的支持率都很高，在某种程度上说，没有人能跟她比。而且，到了现在大家也都忘了，希拉里·克林顿在宣布竞选前的几个月里可是所有政治人物中最受尊敬的，她甚至比伯尼·桑德斯和唐纳德·特朗普更受欢迎，当然那时“邮件门”还没出现呢。在希拉里宣布参选后，她在民主党内基本上没什么阻碍，而共和党由于其选民结构的问题，根本就没什么获胜的可能，他们的党纲居然叫做“尸检报告”。虽然年轻人对希拉里不太感兴趣，但是她的“历史性意义”，如她的竞选团队所说的那样，使得她之后的一切行为都显得格外重要。
foreignization: 当然，有一个比不错的机会在2016年会产生历史性的结果：希拉里·克林顿成为第一位女总统。现在很容易忘记，直到几个月前开始再次竞选之前，希拉里·克林顿可能是双方最受钦佩的政治人物；在伯尼·桑德斯之前，在唐纳德·J·特朗普之前，在“该死的电子邮件”之前。她看起来一开始拥有通往民主党提名的无忧之路，并以对人口结构受损的共和党的明显优势进入了竞选，这个党的默认宣言在此次选举中被称为“尸检”。即使年轻的选民宣称他们对希拉里·克林顿不感兴趣，“她竞选的历史性质”，就像她的竞选活动所说的那样，形成了所有随后混乱的重大背景。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Sure , there was always a better-than-decent chance 2016 would yield a historic result : Hillary Clinton becoming the first woman to be president . It 's easy to forget now that Mrs. Clinton might have been the most admired political figure of either party until a few months before she started running again ; before Bernie Sanders , before Donald J. Trump , before the " damn emails . " She appeared , at the outset , to have a nuisance-free path to the Democratic nomination and entered the race as a clear favorite over the demographically hobbled G.O.P. , whose default manifesto entering this election was called an " autopsy . " Even as young voters declared themselves uninspired by Mrs. Clinton , the " historic nature of her candidacy , " as her campaign put it so clinically , made for a momentous backdrop to all the disruption that followed .

当然，当时就有很多人觉得2016年的大选会有一个历史性的结果，那就是希拉里·克林顿成为第一位女性总统。当时大家都觉得她是最有希望赢得大选的人，不管是在民主党还是共和党，她的支持率都很高，在某种程度上说，没有人能跟她比。而且，到了现在大家也都忘了，希拉里·克林顿在宣布竞选前的几个月里可是所有政治人物中最受尊敬的，她甚至比伯尼·桑德斯和唐纳德·特朗普更受欢迎，当然那时“邮件门”还没出现呢。在希拉里宣布参选后，她在民主党内基本上没什么阻碍，而共和党由于其选民结构的问题，根本就没什么获胜的可能，他们的党纲居然叫做“尸检报告”。虽然年轻人对希拉里不太感兴趣，但是她的“历史性意义”，如她的竞选团队所说的那样，使得她之后的一切行为都显得格外重要。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

It 's easy to forget now that Mrs. Clinton might have been the most admired political figure of either party until a few months before she started running again ; before Bernie Sanders , before Donald J. Trump , before the " damn emails . " She appeared , at the outset , to have a nuisance-free path to the Democratic nomination and entered the race as a clear favorite over the demographically hobbled G.O.P. , whose default manifesto entering this election was called an " autopsy . " Even as young voters declared themselves uninspired by Mrs. Clinton , the " historic nature of her candidacy , " as her campaign put it so clinically , made for a momentous backdrop to all the disruption that followed .

当然，有一个比不错的机会在2016年会产生历史性的结果：希拉里·克林顿成为第一位女总统。现在很容易忘记，直到几个月前开始再次竞选之前，希拉里·克林顿可能是双方最受钦佩的政治人物；在伯尼·桑德斯之前，在唐纳德·J·特朗普之前，在“该死的电子邮件”之前。她看起来一开始拥有通往民主党提名的无忧之路，并以对人口结构受损的共和党的明显优势进入了竞选，这个党的默认宣言在此次选举中被称为“尸检”。即使年轻的选民宣称他们对希拉里·克林顿不感兴趣，“她竞选的历史性质”，就像她的竞选活动所说的那样，形成了所有随后混乱的重大背景。

source: Thank you , Kathy Hixson , for pointing out that , when you came to live in Colorado 30 years ago , it was a perfect state . We had no trash on our streets and highways ; no aggressive , rude , impatient drivers ; no drug or violent crimes ; no horrible acts of animal cruelty ; no one taking our jobs ; and no one completely disrespecting the environment . I jumped for joy to find that out our problems were caused solely by our ' million new residents . '
domestication: 谢谢你，凯西·希克森，提醒我，当你30年前来到科罗拉多州的时候，这里简直是完美无缺。我们的街道和高速公路上没有垃圾；司机们不粗鲁，不冲动，也很有耐心；这里没有毒品和暴力犯罪；没有惨绝人寰的虐待动物事件；没有人抢夺我们的工作岗位；也没有人完全漠视环境保护。知道我们的问题竟然完全是因为新增加的一百万居民引起的，我真是松了一口气！
foreignization: 感谢凯西·希克森（Kathy Hixson）指出，当她在三十年前搬到科罗拉多州时，这是一个完美的州。当时，我们的街道和高速公路上没有垃圾；没有咄咄逼人、粗鲁、缺乏耐心的驾驶员；没有毒品或暴力犯罪；没有令人发指的虐待动物行为；没有人抢我们的工作；也没有人完全不尊重环境。我听到我们的问题完全是由“百万新居民”引起的时，高兴得跳了起来。

A Style of One 's Own

"

source: California wants to know if it gained six Congressional seats or seven ; Pennsylvania wants to know if it lost two or three . New Jersey towns want to know local population figures so they can determine how many liquor licenses to issue . Oklahoma City and Rochester want to know if they have lost their places among the top 50 metropolitan markets , meaning millions of advertising dollars would go elsewhere .
domestication: 加利福尼亚州想知道自己究竟是增加了六个国会席位还是七个，宾夕法尼亚州想知道自己是减少了两个席位还是三个。新泽西州的城镇想知道当地的人口数字，这样他们就能确定应该颁发多少酒类许可证。俄克拉荷马城和罗切斯特想知道自己是否已经在前五十大都市市场中失去了自己的位置，这意味着数百万美元的广告费将流向别处。这些地方对人口普查数据都非常关注，因为这直接关系到自己的切身利益。
foreignization: 加利福尼亚州想知道是否获得了六个国会席位或七个席位； 宾夕法尼亚州想知道它失去了两个还是三个。 新泽西州的城镇想知道当地的人口数据，以便确定他们可以发行多少酒类许可证。 俄克拉荷马城和罗切斯特想知道他们是否在前50个大都会市场中失去了自己的位置，这意味着数百万广告美元将流向其他地方。

source: " It is a silent revolution that has taken place in our country , " said Morshed Khan , the foreign minister of Bangladesh , one of the few democracies in the Muslim world . " For the first time in a Muslim country , hundreds of thousands of women in their late teens and early 20 's are wearing cosmetics , carrying handbags and walking to work every day .
domestication: 在我们国家发生了一场悄然的革命，孟加拉国外交部长莫尔谢德·汗如是说，他的国家是少数几个伊斯兰世界的民主国家之一。现在，成千上万的年轻女性，十六七岁或者二十出头的样子，都开始化妆了，提着手袋，每天上班。这种场景以前在穆斯林国家是不可想象的，但现在已经习以为常了。
foreignization: “ 这是一场发生在我们国家的默默革命， ” 孟加拉国外交部长莫尔谢德·汗说，孟加拉国是穆斯林世界中少数民主国家之一。 “ 在一个穆斯林国家里，成千上万的十几岁和二十出头的女性第一次戴化妆，提手袋并且每天步行去工作。 ”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" It is a silent revolution that has taken place in our country , " said Morshed Khan , the foreign minister of Bangladesh , one of the few democracies in the Muslim world . " For the first time in a Muslim country , hundreds of thousands of women in their late teens and early 20 's are wearing cosmetics , carrying handbags and walking to work every day .
在我们国家发生了一场悄然的革命，孟加拉国外交部长莫尔谢德·汗如是说，他的国家是少数几个伊斯兰世界的民主国家之一。现在，成千上万的年轻女性，十六七岁或者二十出头的样子，都开始化妆了，提着手袋，每天上班。这种场景以前在穆斯林国家是不可想象的，但现在已经习以为常了。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" It is a silent revolution that has taken place in our country , " said Morshed Khan , the foreign minister of Bangladesh , one of the few democracies in the Muslim world . " For the first time in a Muslim country , hundreds of thousands of women in their late teens and early 20 's are wearing cosmetics , carrying handbags and walking to work every day .
“ 这是一场发生在我们国家的默默革命， ” 孟加拉国外交部长莫尔谢德·汗说，孟加拉国是穆斯林世界中少数民主国家之一。 “ 在一个穆斯林国家里，成千上万的十几岁和二十出头的女性第一次戴化妆，提手袋并且每天步行去工作。 ”

source: The outcome was all the more remarkable when you consider Mr. Trump had 16 opponents to contend with in the Republican primaries and faced a Democratic nominee who 's been one of the biggest political celebrities in the world for nearly a quarter-century . Mr. Trump 's complete command of the coliseum is the prime reason 2016 will go down as a line-of-demarcation campaign in which every presidential election that came before it will seem quaint , tame and antiquated by comparison .
domestication: 这个结果真是令人惊叹，因为特朗普在共和党初选中面临了16个对手，并且还要对抗一个近二十五年来世界上最著名的政治名人——民主党提名人。特朗普完全掌控了竞选舞台，这也使得2016年的竞选活动成为了一个分水岭，每一届之前的总统大选相比之下都显得过时、保守和古板。可以说，特朗普让所有人见识到了竞选的新高度，这也使得他在历史上占据了一席之地。
foreignization: 结果更加值得注意的是，当你考虑到特朗普先生在共和党初选中有 16 位对手，并面临一位已经成为世界上最大的政治名人之一近四分之一世纪的民主党提名人时。特朗普先生完全控制了竞技场，这是 2016 年将被载入史册为一条界限的竞选活动的主要原因，每次在此之前的总统选举相比之下似乎都很古雅，很温和和过时。

source: That evening , Kennedy zeroed in on the Mafia . He phoned Julius Draznin in Chicago , an expert on union corruption for the National Labor Relations Board , asking him to look into a possible mob angle on Dallas . More important , the attorney general activated Walter Sheridan , his ace Justice Department investigator , locating him in Nashville , where Sheridan was awaiting the trial of their longtime nemesis , Teamster leader Jimmy Hoffa .
domestication: 那天晚上，肯尼迪将注意力集中在黑手党身上。他给芝加哥的朱利叶斯·德拉兹宁打电话，德拉兹宁是国家劳工关系委员会反腐专家，让他调查达拉斯是否有黑帮介入。更重要的是，司法部长让他的得力助手、司法部调查员沃尔特·谢里登开始行动，当时谢里登正在纳什维尔等待审判他们的宿敌——国际卡车司机工会领袖吉米·霍法。
foreignization: 那天晚上，肯尼迪专注于黑手党。他给芝加哥的朱利叶斯·德拉兹宁（Julius Draznin）打电话，朱利叶斯是国家劳工关系委员会（National Labor Relations Board）关于工会腐败的专家，要求他调查达拉斯可能存在的黑帮联系。更重要的是，司法部长激活了他的王牌司法部调查员沃尔特·谢里登（Walter Sheridan），并在纳什维尔找到他，谢里登当时正在等待他们长期宿敌——国际货车司机工会（Teamster）领导人吉米·霍法（Jimmy Hoffa）的审判。

source: But for many people within the industry -- and no doubt many viewers -- there is a more important issue at stake than the moral one . " It 's that most of the sex on TV today just is n't funny . It 's stupid and boring . "
domestication: 但在许多业内人士（以及无疑很多观众）看来，还有比这更重要的问题。曾在上世纪70年代冲破电视界性禁忌以提高社会意识的电视制作人诺曼·勒尔说：“现在电视上有多少性内容最大的问题不是是否冒犯了观众，而是大部分电视上的性内容根本就不好笑，太傻太无聊了。”
foreignization: 但是对于行业内的许多人来说——毫无疑问，也有很多观众——比起道德问题，另一个更重要的问题是： “现在电视上性行为的数量带来的最大的问题不是它是否冒犯了某些人，”诺尔曼·勒尔说，他就是在20世纪70年代打破电视性禁忌以提高社会意识的人之一。 “而是现在大多数电视上的性行为根本就不好笑。它们很愚蠢和乏味。”

source: When nudged to say something about the first 30 years of her life , she proceeds carefully : " " I was born into a middle-class Jewish family . Our Judaism was a part of everyday life in an ethnic sense , and I was taught a very Jewish approach to life . Jews tend to wear their passions on their sleeves . Jews tend to care . Jews tend to go out and get it done , whatever it is . " Williamson was the baby of the family . She has a brother , Peter , an immigration lawyer , and a sister , Jane , who teaches fifth-grade history at St. John 's School .
domestication: 有人提到她前三十年的生活时，她谨慎地开口说话。她说，“我出生在一个中产阶级的犹太家庭，犹太教在我们日常生活中扮演着不可或缺的角色，我的家庭也教会了我很多犹太人的做事方法。”她继续说，“犹太人通常都很有激情，很关心他人，并且总是会全力以赴去实现自己的目标。”威廉姆森在她的家庭中排行最小，有一个哥哥彼得，是一名移民律师，还有一个姐姐简，在圣约翰学校教五年级的历史课。
foreignization: 当被要求谈论她生命中的头30年时，她小心地开始说：“我出生在一个中产阶级的犹太家庭。我们信奉的犹太教是日常生活中的一部分，在民族意义上说也是如此，我也被灌输了非常犹太化的人生观。犹太人倾向于将他们的情感都表现在脸上。犹太人倾向于关心他人。犹太人倾向于走出去并完成任何事情，不管是什么。”威廉森是家里最小的孩子。她有一个叫彼得的哥哥，是一名移民律师，还有一个叫简的姐姐，在圣约翰学校教五年级的历史。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Our Judaism was a part of everyday life in an ethnic sense , and I was taught a very Jewish approach to life . Jews tend to wear their passions on their sleeves . Jews tend to care . Jews tend to go out and get it done , whatever it is . " Williamson was the baby of the family . She has a brother , Peter , an immigration lawyer , and a sister , Jane , who teaches fifth-grade history at St. John 's School .
有人提到她前三十年的生活时，她谨慎地开口说话。她说，“我出生在一个中产阶级的犹太家庭，犹太教在我们日常生活中扮演着不可或缺的角色，我的家庭也教会了我很多犹太人的做事方法。”她继续说，“犹太人通常都很有激情，很关心他人，并且总是会全力以赴去实现自己的目标。”威廉姆森在她的家庭中排行最小，有一个哥哥彼得，是一名移民律师，还有一个姐姐简，在圣约翰学校教五年级的历史课。

When nudged to say something about the first 30 years of her life , she proceeds carefully : " " I was born into a middle-class Jewish family . Our Judaism was a part of everyday life in an ethnic sense , and I was taught a very Jewish approach to life . Jews tend to wear their passions on their sleeves . Jews tend to care . Jews tend to go out and get it done , whatever it is . " Williamson was the baby of the family . She has a brother , Peter , an immigration lawyer , and a sister , Jane , who teaches fifth-grade history at St. John 's School .
当被要求谈论她生命中的头30年时，她小心地开始说：“我出生在一个中产阶级的犹太家庭。我们信奉的犹太教是日常生活中的一部分，在民族意义上说也是如此，我也被灌输了非常犹太化的人生观。犹太人倾向于将他们的情感都表现在脸上。犹太人倾向于关心他人。犹太人倾向于走出去并完成任何事情，不管是什么。”威廉森是家里最小的孩子。她有一个叫彼得的哥哥，是一名移民律师，还有一个叫简的姐姐，在圣约翰学校教五年级的历史。

Earth Girls is one of three films - along with Transylvania 6-5000 and The Fly - she did with ex-husband Jeff Goldblum before their three-year marriage broke up last fall . " It 's something we 're both sad about , " she says . " We went into it with high hopes , but it 's just the way things go . " They 're still friends , and yes , there is a new man , but she 's not naming names .
地球女孩是她与前夫杰夫·高布林一起拍摄的三部电影之一，另外两部分别是《特兰西瓦尼亚6500》和《苍蝇》，在他们结婚三年后去年秋天离婚之前。“那是一件让我们俩都感到悲伤的事情，”她说。“我们怀着很高的希望开始了这段婚姻，但只是事情的发展方向就是这样。”他们仍然是朋友，而且，是的，有一个新的男人，但是她不提他的名字。

source: According to the Regional Plan Association , 98 percent of the work force in the New York metropolitan region commutes to work each day ; on any given day in the year 2010 , 10 percent will " commute " by wire . Nationwide , 30 million of us are expected to be working at home by the year 2000 , more than a fifth of the labor force . Welcome to the Staples economy .
domestication: 根据区域规划协会的统计，在纽约都市圈，大概有98%的员工每天都要通勤上班，而到了2010年，每天有10%的人会通过网络远程办公。从全国范围来看，预计到2000年，将会有3000万人在家工作，这个数字占劳动力总数的五分之一还多。所以，现在可以说，我们已经进入了“办公用品经济”的时代。
foreignization: 根据区域计划协会的数据，纽约都会区98％的劳动力每天通勤上班；在2010年里，任意一天都有10％的人通过“电线”通勤。全国范围内，预计到2000年，3000万人将在家工作，这已经超过了劳动力的五分之一。欢迎来到斯泰普斯经济时代。

source: Like any NASCAR driver , Schrader yearns to win the Daytona 500 or Brickyard 400 and end the season as Winston Cup champion . But his dreams do n't begin , or end , there . Asked what he still wants to accomplish in a career that shows four Winston Cup wins and more than $ 11 million in prize money , he grins and reaches for his briefcase .
domestication: 对于任何一名纳斯卡赛车手来说，赢得代托纳500或布里克雅德400的冠军，并成为温斯顿杯总冠军都是梦寐以求的目标。然而，对肯·施雷德来说，这仅仅是梦想的开始。他在采访中被问到，事业上还有什么目标尚未实现时，他脸上露出笑容，从公文包里拿出了一份文件，原来他不仅仅满足于四次温斯顿杯的胜利和1100多万美元的奖金。
foreignization: 像其他NASCAR车手一样，Schrader渴望赢得Daytona 500或Brickyard 400，并以Winston Cup冠军的身份结束赛季。但是他的梦想并非从那里开始，也不会在那里结束。当被问及他还想在一个有四个Winston Cup胜利和超过1100万美元奖金的职业生涯中取得什么成就时，他咧嘴笑着并伸手去拿他的公文包。

source: Dottie Lamm asks " Whose kids are they anyway ? " ( Jan. 21 ) . The answer is that they are their parents kids . Why is that people like Lamm always want the government to protect our children ? When I was growing up there was no pornography on TV , but there were programs my parents considered worthless and I was n't allowed to watch . I was n't allowed to read " Mad " magazine unless I also read something " good . "
domestication: 多蒂·拉姆问：“他们到底是谁的孩子呢？”（1月21日）。答案是，他们是父母的孩子啊！为什么像拉姆这样的人总是希望政府来保护我们的孩子呢？我小时候，电视上没有黄色内容，但是有我父母认为没价值的节目，我就不被允许看。我也不能看《疯狂》杂志，除非我同时读点“正经”的东西。
foreignization: 多蒂·拉姆问道“他们到底是谁的孩子呢？”（1月21日）。答案是，他们是自己的父母的孩子。为什么像拉姆这样的人总是希望政府来保护我们的孩子？在我成长的过程中，电视上没有色情内容，但是有一些节目，我的父母认为没价值，所以我不被允许看。我除非也读一些“好的”东西，否则不被允许读“疯狂”杂志。

source: New Salem 's living-history village of two dozen log homes and shops , staffed in season by interpreters in period dress , is the most youngster-friendly of the Lincoln sites . There 's a spanking-new visitor center , where this summer 's productions by the Great American People Show troupe are scheduled for June 19-Aug. 16 on an indoor stage .
domestication: 新塞勒姆有一座历史悠久的村庄，有二十多栋木屋和店铺，一到旺季，就有身穿古装的人来演绎当年的生活场景，这对孩子们来说是再合适不过了。游客中心更是崭新伫立，今年夏天，大美人剧团就在里面举办演出，时间是六月十九到八月十六之间，每天都有精彩的演出。
foreignization: 新塞勒姆的活历史村由二十多栋木屋和店铺组成，季节性地有身穿历史服装的解说员，在林肯遗迹中最适合年轻人。这里有一座崭新的游客中心，美国人民剧团今年夏天的演出定于6月19日至8月16日在室内舞台上演出。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: In the last two decades , the census has also recorded more and more minority groups who clamored for statistical recognition - and policy benefits . But the groups often felt shortchanged . The minority groups ' desires for recognition in the census mingled with a distrust of motive and method was most recently shown by the leaders of the Gay and Lesbian Task Force , which wants gay couples to identify themselves as unmarried partners , a new category .
domestication: 这二十年来，人口普查也记录了越来越多的少数群体，他们要求获得统计学上的认可和相应的政策福利。但是，这些群体通常感到自己吃亏。少数群体渴望在人口普查中得到认可是与对动机和方法的不信任交织在一起的，最典型的例子是同性恋者权益促进组织的领导人，他们希望同性恋情侣可以自我认定为“未婚伴侣”，这样才能被归入一个新的分类。其实，少数群体需要的是真诚的对话，而不是敷衍了事的姿态。
foreignization: 在过去的二十年中，人口普查也记录了越来越多少数群体，他们要求得到统计学上的承认和政策福利。但是，这些群体通常感到自己的愿望并没有被满足。少数群体对于人口普查中的承认的渴望与对动机和方法的不信任混合在一起，这一点最近被同性恋者任务小组的领导人所表现出来，他们希望同性恋情侣将自己识别为未婚伴侣，这是一个新的分类。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In the last two decades , the census has also recorded more and more minority groups who clamored for statistical recognition - and policy benefits . But the groups often felt shortchanged . The minority groups ' desires for recognition in the census mingled with a distrust of motive and method was most recently shown by the leaders of the Gay and Lesbian Task Force , which wants gay couples to identify themselves as unmarried partners , a new category .
这二十年来，人口普查也记录了越来越多的少数群体，他们要求获得统计学上的认可和相应的政策福利。但是，这些群体通常感到自己吃亏。少数群体渴望在人口普查中得到认可是与对动机和方法的不信任交织在一起的，最典型的例子是同性恋者权益促进组织的领导人，他们希望同性恋情侣可以自我认定为“未婚伴侣”，这样才能被归入一个新的分类。其实，少数群体需要的是真诚的对话，而不是敷衍了事的姿态。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In the last two decades , the census has also recorded more and more minority groups who clamored for statistical recognition - and policy benefits . But the groups often felt shortchanged . The minority groups ' desires for recognition in the census mingled with a distrust of motive and method was most recently shown by the leaders of the Gay and Lesbian Task Force , which wants gay couples to identify themselves as unmarried partners , a new category .
在过去的二十年中，人口普查也记录了越来越多少数群体，他们要求得到统计学上的承认和政策福利。但是，这些群体通常感到自己的愿望并没有被满足。少数群体对于人口普查中的承认的渴望与对动机和方法的不信任混合在一起，这一点最近被同性恋者任务小组的领导人所表现出来，他们希望同性恋情侣将自己识别为未婚伴侣，这是一个新的分类。

source: Elizabeth Franz was viewed as so critical to the current revival of " Death of a Salesman " that her name is listed above the title . But to improve her chances for an award , the producers successfully petitioned to have her moved from the leading-actress to featured category . Still , when the producers of " You 're a Good Man , Charlie Brown " tried to have two cast members elevated to the leading-actor category , they were rejected .
domestication: 伊丽莎白·弗兰茨在《推销员之死》的演出中表现得非常出色，她的名字被放在了剧名上方。但为了增加她获得奖项的机会，制作人成功地将她从女主角类别改到了配角类别。但当《查理布朗的你是个好人》的制作人试图将两位演员提升到男主角类别时，却遭到了拒绝。
foreignization: 伊丽莎白·弗朗茨被认为对于当前的《推销员之死》的复兴至关重要，以至于她的名字在标题上方列出。但是为了提高她获得奖项的机会，制作人成功地将她从女主角类别转移到了特邀类别。尽管如此，当《你是个好人，查理布朗》的制作人试图将两名演员提升到男主角类别时，他们还是被拒绝了。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Elizabeth Franz was viewed as so critical to the current revival of " Death of a Salesman " that her name is listed above the title . But to improve her chances for an award , the producers successfully petitioned to have her moved from the leading-actress to featured category . Still , when the producers of " You 're a Good Man , Charlie Brown " tried to have two cast members elevated to the leading-actor category , they were rejected .
伊丽莎白·弗兰茨在《推销员之死》的演出中表现得非常出色，她的名字被放在了剧名上方。但为了增加她获得奖项的机会，制作人成功地将她从女主角类别改到了配角类别。但当《查理布朗的你是个好人》的制作人试图将两位演员提升到男主角类别时，却遭到了拒绝。

source: But naval expert Norman Friedman says there 's a way to sell a long stay in Saudi Arabia - as a peacekeeping force : " We 're in Europe forever , and that works , " he says . " This could be a replacement for our NATO commitment . As long as people have a sense that this is a finite thing - not in the sense of short - but in the sense you can imagine how this war ends , it could work . "
domestication: 海军专家诺曼·弗里德曼认为，长期驻扎在沙特阿拉伯是有道理的，因为他们可以作为维和部队。就像我们永远驻扎在欧洲一样，效果很好。他说：“这可以取代我们对北约的承诺，只要人们认为这种局面是有尽头的——并不是说时间短暂，而是说我们可以想象出战争的结局，那么这种安排就可以接受。”换句话说，只要能看到希望，人们就不会感到太过绝望。
foreignization: 海军专家诺曼·弗里德曼（Norman Friedman）表示，可以将在沙特阿拉伯长期驻扎解释为维和部队：“我们可以永远呆在欧洲，这样行得通，”他说。“这可以取代我们对北约的承诺，只要人们觉得这是一个有限的事情——不是指时间短暂——而是说你可以想象这场战争如何结束，那么它就有可能行得通。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But naval expert Norman Friedman says there 's a way to sell a long stay in Saudi Arabia - as a peacekeeping force : " We 're in Europe forever , and that works , " he says . " This could be a replacement for our NATO commitment . As long as people have a sense that this is a finite thing - not in the sense of short - but in the sense you can imagine how this war ends , it could work . "
海军专家诺曼·弗里德曼认为，长期驻扎在沙特阿拉伯是有道理的，因为他们可以作为维和部队。就像我们永远驻扎在欧洲一样，效果很好。他说：“这可以取代我们对北约的承诺，只要人们认为这种局面是有尽头的——并不是说时间短暂，而是说我们可以想象出战争的结局，那么这种安排就可以接受。”换句话说，只要能看到希望，人们就不会感到太过绝望。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But naval expert Norman Friedman says there 's a way to sell a long stay in Saudi Arabia - as a peacekeeping force : " We 're in Europe forever , and that works , " he says . " This could be a replacement for our NATO commitment . As long as people have a sense that this is a finite thing - not in the sense of short - but in the sense you can imagine how this war ends , it could work . "

Translate the following text to Chinese.

A : Yes , but that has n't got anything to do ... Racial discrimination and gender are two different things . Do you know of any constitutional lawyer that 's ever said they were the same ? Do you know any civil rights activists that said it was the same ? Do you ? It 's not relevant . Nobody accepts them as being the same .
A：是的，但那与此无关……种族歧视和性别是两回事。你知道有哪位宪法律师说过它们相同吗？你知道有哪位民权活动家说过它们相同吗？你知道吗？这无关紧要。没有人认为它们相同。

source: " Plaintiffs won the case , and for that reason alone have some entitlement to a remedy of their choice . Moreover , plaintiffs ' proposed final judgment is the collective work product of senior antitrust law enforcement officials of the United States Department of Justice and the attorneys general of 19 states , in conjunction with multiple consultants . These officials are by reason of office obliged and expected to consider -- and act in -- the public interest ; Microsoft is not . "
domestication: 这场官司的胜利者理应得到他们所选择的补偿，这也是理所当然的事。另外，他们提出的最终判决书是由美国司法部的高级反垄断执法官员和19个州的总检察长，以及多名顾问共同努力的结果。这些官员由于职务的原因，有义务并且有望考虑和维护公众利益；而微软则没有这种义务。因此，可以看出谁才是真正站在公众立场上维护正义的人。
foreignization: 原告赢得了案件，因此仅凭这一原因就有一定的权利获得他们选择的补救措施。此外，原告提出的最终判决是美国司法部高级反垄断执法官员和 19 个州的总检察长与多名顾问合作的集体作品。这些官员由于其职位而有义务并被期望考虑到——并代表——公众利益；微软则没有这种义务。

source: Hundreds of major hospitals -- including Virginia Commonwealth University in Richmond and Children 's in Philadelphia -- do not plan to immunize any workers unless circumstances change . Several statewide nurses ' associations have advised against vaccination , while the AFL-CIO , the Service Employees International Union and the American Federation of State , County and Municipal Employees have urged the Bush administration to postpone the program .
domestication: 美国有数百家大医院，包括维吉尼亚联邦大学的医学院以及费城儿童医院，都没有计划给员工接种这种疫苗，除非情况有所改变。几个州的护士协会都建议不要接种，而美国劳联、服务业雇员国际工会和州、县、市雇员联合会则敦促布什政府推迟实施这一计划。这么看来，问题还挺复杂的。

source: While the Blue Chips ' results do n't indicate much about how the Washington area economy did last year , there are plenty of clues in the performance of companies whose businesses are heavily concentrated in the region . Atop that list are retailers Giant Food Inc. and Hechinger Co. in Landover ; the Potomac Electric Power Co. and The Washington Post Co. in the District ; Rockville 's Mid Atlantic Medical Services Inc. , the metro area 's largest health maintenance organization ; and NVR Inc. in McLean , the holding company for Ryan Homes and NVHomes , the region 's largest home builder .
domestication: 蓝筹股的业绩并不能说明太多关于华盛顿地区经济去年的表现，但是有一些线索可以从那些业务集中在该地区的公司的业绩中看出来。排在最前面的公司包括位于兰多弗的零售商Giant Food Inc.和Hechinger Co.；位于华盛顿特区的Potomac Electric Power Co.和《华盛顿邮报》公司；位于罗克维尔的中大西洋医疗服务公司，这是大都会地区最大的健康维护组织；以及位于麦克林的NVR Inc.，它是Ryan Homes和NVHomes的母公司，也是该地区最大的房屋建筑商。这些公司的业绩可以作为判断华盛顿地区经济走势的一个参考。

source: There is n't one impressive thing about the owners sticking together . It is sad , embarrassing , inexcusable . The only way they could have saved baseball would be to find some common sense from a Peter O'Malley , Peter Magowan , or anyone else with a shred of integrity . Except , our main man Bud Selig did n't allow any contrary thought . He orchestrated this thing from the beginning . The owners are unified , all right . Unified in hell .
domestication: 老板们团结一致有什么值得骄傲的？这实在令人惭愧、尴尬，简直是不可理喻！要挽救棒球，他们唯一的办法就是向像彼得·奥马利（Peter O'Malley）或彼得·马戈恩（Peter Magowan）这样有人品的人寻求一些常识。然而，我们的主事人布德·塞里格（Bud Selig）根本不允许有任何相反的意见，他从头到尾都在操控这件事。好吧，老板们确实团结了，团结在了错误的一边，陷入了困境。
foreignization: 业主们团结在一起并没有令人印象深刻的地方。这是悲伤的，尴尬的，无可原谅的。他们唯一能拯救棒球的方法，就是找到彼得·奥马利（Peter O'Malley）、彼得·马戈恩（Peter Magowan）或其他任何有廉耻心的人的一些常识。除此之外，我们的主要人物巴德·塞利格（Bud Selig）不允许有任何相反的想法。他从一开始就策划了这件事。业主们团结在了一起，没错。统一在地狱里。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

There is n't one impressive thing about the owners sticking together . It is sad , embarrassing , inexcusable . The only way they could have saved baseball would be to find some common sense from a Peter O'Malley , Peter Magowan , or anyone else with a shred of integrity . Except , our main man Bud Selig did n't allow any contrary thought . He orchestrated this thing from the beginning . The owners are unified , all right . Unified in hell .
老板们团结一致有什么值得骄傲的？这实在令人惭愧、尴尬，简直是不可理喻！要挽救棒球，他们唯一的办法就是向像彼得·奥马利（Peter O'Malley）或彼得·马戈恩（Peter Magowan）这样有人品的人寻求一些常识。然而，我们的主事人布德·塞里格（Bud Selig）根本不允许有任何相反的意见，他从头到尾都在操控这件事。好吧，老板们确实团结了，团结在了错误的一边，陷入了困境。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

There is n't one impressive thing about the owners sticking together . It is sad , embarrassing , inexcusable . The only way they could have saved baseball would be to find some common sense from a Peter O'Malley , Peter Magowan , or anyone else with a shred of integrity . Except , our main man Bud Selig did n't allow any contrary thought . He orchestrated this thing from the beginning . The owners are unified , all right . Unified in hell .
业主们团结在一起并没有令人印象深刻的地方。这是悲伤的，尴尬的，无可原谅的。他们唯一能拯救棒球的方法，就是找到彼得·奥马利（Peter O'Malley）、彼得·马戈恩（Peter Magowan）或其他任何有廉耻心的人的一些常识。除此之外，我们的主要人物巴德·塞利格（Bud Selig）不允许有任何相反的想法。他从一开始就策划了这件事。业主们团结在了一起，没错。统一在地狱里。

source: The culture in which Enron flourished blends politics , business and social relationships so thoroughly that the distinctions sometimes lose their meaning . The internal pressure applied to employees at Enron , at Vinson &; Elkins and at Arthur Andersen to contribute to the companies ' political action committees was heavy , according to interviews and documents . Each of the companies ranked among the Bush presidential campaign 's 10 largest contributors .
domestication: 恩隆公司崛起的文化背景是政治、商业和社交关系的大杂烩，这些元素混杂在一起，让人常常分不清孰先孰后。在恩隆、文森与埃尔金斯（Vinson & Elkins）以及安达信（Arthur Andersen）这几家公司内部，对员工施加的压力让他们为公司的政治行动委员会捐款，这种现象十分普遍。这从采访和文件中可见一斑。每一家公司都是小布什总统竞选活动的最大捐助者之一。这种文化氛围让人很难区分公私界限，人们在其中摸不清自己的角色和立场，最后只好随波逐流。
foreignization: 恩能公司蓬勃发展的文化将政治、商业和社会关系融合得如此紧密，以至于有时会使这些区别失去意义。在Enron公司、Vinson&Elkins公司以及安达信公司内部，对员工施加的压力要求他们向公司的政治行动委员会捐款是非常大的，根据采访和文件显示，每一家公司都跻身于布什总统竞选活动的十大捐助者之列。

source: As his Stryker command vehicle drove along a crowded avenue Colonel Norris spied several Shiite women in black abayas wailing over a body sprawled near a mosque as distraught relatives smeared the dead man 's blood on their faces . The American officer tried to wave down an Iraqi National Police truck for help , but the driver gave him an icy stare and kept going .
domestication: 诺里斯上校的斯特莱克指挥车沿着拥挤的大街行驶时，看见几名穿着黑色阿巴雅的什叶派妇女在清真寺附近的一具尸体旁痛哭失声。死者的亲属们十分痛苦，竟然把死者身上的血抹在了自己的脸上。美国军官试图招呼一辆伊拉克国家警察的卡车过来帮忙，但司机只是给了他一个冷漠的眼神，然后就开车走了。
foreignization: 当他的斯特賴克指揮車沿著擁擠的街道行駛時，诺里斯上校发现了几名什叶派女性穿著黑色阿巴耶在清真寺附近的一具尸体旁哀嚎，痛苦的亲戚們將死者的血塗抹在他們的臉上。美国军官試圖招呼一辆伊拉克国家警察卡车來幫忙，但是司機給了他冰冷的目光并繼續開走。

source: Oil industry sources in Yemen said the 36,330-ton Ain Zalah unloaded at Aden but that the nature of the cargo was not immediately known . They said two more Iraqi tankers were waiting offshore , including the Baba Karkar , which U.S. warships had been shadowing through the Persian Gulf after firing warning shots Saturday in an unsuccessful attempt to halt it .
domestication: 也门的石油业内人士说，那艘3.63万吨的“艾因扎拉号”油轮已经抵达亚丁港，但是它运载的货物是什么还不得而知。他们说，还有两艘伊拉克油轮在海上等待靠港，其中一艘叫“巴巴卡卡尔号”，美军战舰一直在波斯湾跟踪它。星期六，美军战舰曾向这艘油轮发射了警告炮弹，试图阻止它靠港，但没成功。
foreignization: 也门石油行业消息来源说，3.3630万吨的安·扎拉（Ain Zalah）号在亚丁港卸货，但货物性质尚不清楚。他们说，还有两艘伊拉克油轮正在海上等待卸货，其中包括巴巴·卡尔卡尔（Baba Karkar）号，美国军舰曾在周六向其开火示警后一直跟踪其通过波斯湾的行程，这是在未能阻止该船行进的尝试之后。

source: The payments have proved to be a huge success among consumers across Europe since they were introduced in late 2008 . In Germany , they have helped increase sales by about 40 percent from a year ago . But for car companies , living without them will not be easy , said Carlos Ghosn , the chief executive of Renault and Nissan and chairman of the European Automobile Manufacturers Association .
domestication: 这些补贴自2008年底引入以来，在整个欧洲范围内都大受消费者青睐。尤其是在德国，这种政策使得汽车销量比去年同期高出了大约40%。不过，雷诺和日产的CEO卡洛斯·戈恩也就是欧洲汽车制造商协会主席，他表示，想要让汽车公司没有这些补贴而正常运营，那将会是一件很难的事情。
foreignization: 这些付款方式自 2008 年底推出以来一直在整个欧洲范围内消费者中广受欢迎。 在德国，它们帮助汽车销量比去年同期增加了大约 40%。但对于汽车制造商来说，没有它们将会很难生存，雷诺和日产的首席执行官以及欧洲汽车制造商协会主席卡洛斯·戈恩说。

source: We consume and experience films ( and music , and , for that matter , sports ) for many reasons . To be enlightened , to be entertained , to experience beauty and grapple with ugliness . As human beings , we need this , emotionally and intellectually . And while the artists who offer this to us are linked to their work -- it 's their work , after all -- they are n't the work , themselves . And their pasts , however repellent they are , do n't negate the value in what they create .
domestication: 我们看电影（还有听音乐，或者说体育比赛）有很多原因。为了开阔视野，为了娱乐，为了欣赏美丽，为了直面丑陋。作为人，我们在情感和智力上都需要这些。虽然那些为我们带来这些艺术的创作者与他们的作品密不可分——毕竟这是他们自己的作品——但他们自己并不是作品。而他们过去的经历，无论多么令人憎恶，也不能抹杀他们创造的东西的价值。就像我们常说的，「要区分事物的本质和表现形式」，对待艺术作品和它的创作者也是这样。
foreignization: 我们观看和体验电影（以及音乐，同样，体育比赛）有很多理由。为了开阔视野，为了娱乐，为了体验美丽和直面丑陋。作为人类，我们在情感和智力上都需要这些。而当艺术家们给予我们这些东西时——毕竟这是他们的作品——他们与自己的作品有关，但他们自己并不是作品。并且他们的过去，无论多么令人憎恶，也不能否认他们创造的东西的价值。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

We consume and experience films ( and music , and , for that matter , sports ) for many reasons . To be enlightened , to be entertained , to experience beauty and grapple with ugliness . As human beings , we need this , emotionally and intellectually . And while the artists who offer this to us are linked to their work -- it 's their work , after all -- they are n't the work , themselves . And their pasts , however repellent they are , do n't negate the value in what they create .

source: Figuring a decadent breakfast deserved an equally indulgent beverage , I ordered a Nutty Monkey ( $4.89 for a small ) , a latte with chocolate , hazelnut and banana . It tasted like liquid Nutella , and I adored every last sip , even though the plastic mug did n't seem to keep the drink warm for long enough . I also admit to being slightly disappointed that the barista did n't bother to create a temporary art piece within the foam . No Instagram picture here .
domestication: 想到这顿丰盛的早餐应该配一款同样奢侈的饮品，我就点了一杯 Nutty Monkey （小杯4.89美元），它是一种加了巧克力、榛子和香蕉的拿铁。喝起来感觉就像液态的Nutella，每一口都让人回味无穷，尽管塑料杯似乎不能很好地保温，但我还是爱不释手。说实话，我还对咖啡师没有在泡沫上创作一幅临时艺术品感到有点失望。这样的话，就算拍照上传到Instagram也不会有太大意思了。

source: Handcuffed in a wheelchair and wearing an orange jumpsuit , Joseph James DeAngelo , 72 , was arraigned on charges that he killed a Sacramento County couple in 1978 -- the first of many killings he allegedly committed between Northern California and Orange County , earning the moniker the Golden State Killer .
domestication: 72岁的约瑟夫·詹姆斯·德安吉洛（Joseph James DeAngelo）被戴上手铐推着轮椅走进法庭，他穿着一身橙色的囚服，听取指控。他涉嫌在1978年杀害了萨克拉门托郡的一对夫妇，这只是他随后几十年里犯下的众多案件中的第一起，而这些罪行让他获得了“黄金州杀人魔”的绰号，这些案件的发生地点从北加州一直延伸到橙县。
foreignization: 戴着手铐坐在轮椅上，穿着橙色连身服，72岁的约瑟夫·詹姆斯·德安吉洛（Joseph James DeAngelo）被控告在1978年杀害了萨克拉门托县的一对夫妇-- 这是他在北加州和橙县之间所犯下的大量谋杀案中的第一起， 从而获得了“黄金州杀手”的绰号。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Handcuffed in a wheelchair and wearing an orange jumpsuit , Joseph James DeAngelo , 72 , was arraigned on charges that he killed a Sacramento County couple in 1978 -- the first of many killings he allegedly committed between Northern California and Orange County , earning the moniker the Golden State Killer .
72岁的约瑟夫·詹姆斯·德安吉洛（Joseph James DeAngelo）被戴上手铐推着轮椅走进法庭，他穿着一身橙色的囚服，听取指控。他涉嫌在1978年杀害了萨克拉门托郡的一对夫妇，这只是他随后几十年里犯下的众多案件中的第一起，而这些罪行让他获得了“黄金州杀人魔”的绰号，这些案件的发生地点从北加州一直延伸到橙县。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Handcuffed in a wheelchair and wearing an orange jumpsuit , Joseph James DeAngelo , 72 , was arraigned on charges that he killed a Sacramento County couple in 1978 -- the first of many killings he allegedly committed between Northern California and Orange County , earning the moniker the Golden State Killer .
戴着手铐坐在轮椅上，穿着橙色连身服，72岁的约瑟夫·詹姆斯·德安吉洛（Joseph James DeAngelo）被控告在1978年杀害了萨克拉门托县的一对夫妇-- 这是他在北加州和橙县之间所犯下的大量谋杀案中的第一起， 从而获得了“黄金州杀手”的绰号。

source: Instead of using antibiotics , Zhu regularly gives his fish Gandankang , a Tibetan blend that people take for liver and gall bladder problems . He also sometimes uses a " magic grass pill " made from a root used to treat diarrhea or dysentery and help stop miscarriages in humans . The claim that giving fish traditional Chinese medicine is safe is backed up by China Catfish Institute , a research group affiliated with the Ministry of Agriculture .
domestication: 朱老板不给鱼吃抗生素，而是定期给它们喂一种叫做“甘丹康”的藏药，这种药人吃可以治肝胆问题。他有时还会用一种叫做“神奇草丸”的中药，这种药是从治疗腹泻、痢疾和帮助防止人类流产的根部提取的。中国鲶鱼研究所是农业部下属的一个研究机构，他们认为给鱼吃中药是安全的。他们这样做有理有据，因为中药毕竟是天然的，对鱼的身体没有抗生素那么大的伤害。
foreignization: 与其使用抗生素，朱经常给他的鱼吃“甘丹康”，这是一种藏族药方，用于治疗肝脏和胆囊问题。他有时还会使用一种“神奇的草药丸”，由治疗人类腹泻或痢疾以及帮助预防流产的根制成。中国鲶鱼研究所，这是一家隶属于农业部的研究团体，支持了给鱼喂中草药是安全的说法。

source: The deficit spending traces back to the 1980s and , in fact , I put into effect a deficit-reduction plan in 1995 . Had it been carefully followed , the district 's finances might be in better shape today . It was not , and changes are under way . To be sure , spending cuts and job reductions will be made as needed . But a work force of 1,150 , responsible for managing 67,790 acres of land , falls short of your characterization as a bloated payroll .
domestication: 这个财政赤字的历史可以追溯到80年代，实际上，我在95年就已经实施了一份减少赤字的计划。如果当时认真执行，这个地区的财政状况可能会更好。但事实并非如此，现在正在进行着改变。当然，需要的话就会削减开支和裁员。但是，有一千一百五十名员工负责管理六万七千九百英亩土地，并不算是一个冗员过多的组织。说白了，你的描述有些过头了。
foreignization: 财政赤字可以追溯到20世纪80年代，事实上，我于1995年实施了减赤计划。如果它被仔细遵循，地区的财务状况可能今天会更好。它没有，而且正在进行的改变。当然，需要时将会进行削减开支和裁员。但是，负责管理67,790英亩土地的1,150名员工，与你所描述的冗员相比还差得远。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The deficit spending traces back to the 1980s and , in fact , I put into effect a deficit-reduction plan in 1995 . Had it been carefully followed , the district 's finances might be in better shape today . It was not , and changes are under way . To be sure , spending cuts and job reductions will be made as needed . But a work force of 1,150 , responsible for managing 67,790 acres of land , falls short of your characterization as a bloated payroll .
这个财政赤字的历史可以追溯到80年代，实际上，我在95年就已经实施了一份减少赤字的计划。如果当时认真执行，这个地区的财政状况可能会更好。但事实并非如此，现在正在进行着改变。当然，需要的话就会削减开支和裁员。但是，有一千一百五十名员工负责管理六万七千九百英亩土地，并不算是一个冗员过多的组织。说白了，你的描述有些过头了。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

The deficit spending traces back to the 1980s and , in fact , I put into effect a deficit-reduction plan in 1995 . Had it been carefully followed , the district 's finances might be in better shape today . It was not , and changes are under way . To be sure , spending cuts and job reductions will be made as needed . But a work force of 1,150 , responsible for managing 67,790 acres of land , falls short of your characterization as a bloated payroll .
财政赤字可以追溯到20世纪80年代，事实上，我于1995年实施了减赤计划。如果它被仔细遵循，地区的财务状况可能今天会更好。它没有，而且正在进行的改变。当然，需要时将会进行削减开支和裁员。但是，负责管理67,790英亩土地的1,150名员工，与你所描述的冗员相比还差得远。

source: The raid appeared to be a complete surprise to the Tupac Amaru Revolutionary Movement after months of inconclusive international globe-trotting by Japanese and Peruvian leaders seeking a peaceful settlement . In the end , the rebels reportedly refused offers of safe passage to Cuba or the Dominican Republic unless they achieved their principal goal : the release of hundreds of their comrades held in Peruvian prisons .
domestication: 突袭似乎让图帕克·阿马鲁革命运动措手不及，之前几个月日本和秘鲁领导人四处奔走，试图找到一个和平的解决方案，但收效甚微。最终，据说这些叛军拒绝了去古巴或多米尼加共和国的安全通道，除非他们能够实现自己的首要目标：释放被关押在秘鲁监狱里的数百名战友。整个事件算是彻底打乱了之前的僵局。
foreignization: 突袭似乎在数月国际社会的斡旋下让图帕克·阿马鲁革命运动完全措手不及，日本和秘鲁领导人寻求和平解决方案却毫无进展。最终，据报道，这些叛军拒绝了去古巴或多米尼加共和国的安全通道，除非他们实现主要目标，即释放秘鲁监狱中关押的数百名战友。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The raid appeared to be a complete surprise to the Tupac Amaru Revolutionary Movement after months of inconclusive international globe-trotting by Japanese and Peruvian leaders seeking a peaceful settlement . In the end , the rebels reportedly refused offers of safe passage to Cuba or the Dominican Republic unless they achieved their principal goal : the release of hundreds of their comrades held in Peruvian prisons .
突袭似乎让图帕克·阿马鲁革命运动措手不及，之前几个月日本和秘鲁领导人四处奔走，试图找到一个和平的解决方案，但收效甚微。最终，据说这些叛军拒绝了去古巴或多米尼加共和国的安全通道，除非他们能够实现自己的首要目标：释放被关押在秘鲁监狱里的数百名战友。整个事件算是彻底打乱了之前的僵局。

source: She is considered a rising star in the tribe , which is seeking qualified members to lead its future business efforts . She says the tribe 's culture is not disappearing with its growing wealth , but it 's the responsibility of the membership to pass along the meaning of Seminole life to members who may not have a historical perspective .
domestication: 她在部落中算是个冉冉升起的新星，而部落现在正在寻找合格的人才来领导未来的商业活动。她说，随着经济的增长，部落的文化并没有消亡，而是会员们有责任把塞米诺尔人的生活意义传递给那些可能没有历史视角的会员。这就需要会员们不忘本，传承和弘扬部落的文化。

source: Meanwhile , a U.S. defense official said Tuesday that a Russian intelligence-collection ship has been operating off the U.S. East Coast in international waters . The official was not authorized to discuss an intelligence matter and spoke on condition of anonymity . The ship had made a port call in Cuba before moving north , where it has been monitored off Delaware , the official said .
domestication: 与此同时，有一位美国防御官员在星期二说，俄罗斯的一艘情报收集船正游荡在美国东海岸的国际水域。该官员没有得到授权讨论这一机密事宜，因此要求保持匿名。这艘船先是到古巴进行了停靠，然后向北移动，在那里被监测到正在靠近特拉华州。
foreignization: 与此同时，美国一名国防官员在星期二表示，一艘俄罗斯的情报收集船一直在美国东海岸的国际水域进行作业。这名官员没有被授权讨论情报事务，并且在保持匿名的前提下发表了看法。这艘船曾经在向北移动之前访问过古巴，之后被监测到了特拉华州海岸附近，官员说。

source: I always suspected Chuck Green was the Church Lady out of drag , but his July 5 column on banning fireworks sales proves it . Sure , just let the nanny state keep us all safe and tuck us in bed at a reasonable hour , after impressing us with a G-rated display that only the government is capable of conducting .
domestication: 我一直怀疑查克·格林就是变装后的教堂女士，而他七月五日的那篇呼吁禁止烟花销售的专栏更让我深信不疑。唉，这样下去也好，就让我们都在保姆国家的保护下安全无恙吧。大家一起上床睡觉，睡前还要被政府安排看一场适合所有年龄段的烟花表演，这样的生活多美好啊。
foreignization: 我一直怀疑 Chuck Green 是变装的教堂女士，但他7月5日关于禁止烟花销售的专栏文章证实了这一点。当然，只要让保姆国家让我们所有人都安全，并在合理的时间给我们盖上被子，之前用只有政府才能进行的G级展示给我们留下深刻印象就行了。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I always suspected Chuck Green was the Church Lady out of drag , but his July 5 column on banning fireworks sales proves it . source: Audiohighway never sold many of its Listen-Up Players , which used proprietary software to digitize music , and ceased selling the device in 1998 . That , ironically , is roughly when the new crop of portable digital players began to appear -- using the free , MP3 software for digitizing sound and using the Web as the download path .
domestication: 音频高速公路公司的Listen-Up播放器销量一直不佳，其使用专有软件来数字化音乐，但到了1998年，就停止了设备的销售。讽刺的是，这差不多是新一代便携式数字播放器出现的时候，而这些播放器正是利用免费的MP3软件来数字化声音，并且利用网络作为下载路径。
foreignization: Audiohighway 從未售出過太多其Listen -UpPlayers，它們使用專有軟體來數位化音樂，並於 1998 年停止銷售該設備。這，諷刺的是，大約是新一批便攜式數位播放器出現的時候 -- 使用免費的MP3軟體來數位化聲音並使用網際網路作為下載路徑。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Audiohighway never sold many of its Listen-Up Players , which used proprietary software to digitize music , and ceased selling the device in 1998 . That , ironically , is roughly when the new crop of portable digital players began to appear -- using the free , MP3 software for digitizing sound and using the Web as the download path .

source: So true . Late spring is a big season for roaming turtles . The other morning , I picked up a box turtle crossing my street and carried it to the other side . Denise Maples sent the photo above of a box turtle that she had carried across her road in Kempsville . Maples said maybe the turtle was smiling to thank her .
domestication: 这还真不假。晚春确实是乌龟们四处游荡的季节。前几天早上，我就在自家门口路上发现一只陆龟准备过马路，我赶紧把它捡起来送到了对面。Denise Maples也发来了她帮助一只陆龟过马路的照片，那只乌龟就在肯普斯维尔她家的路上。Maples说，也许那只乌龟在跟她说谢谢呢，毕竟它的表情看起来好象是在微笑嘛。
foreignization: 没错。 晚春是乌龟四处游荡的季节。 前几天早晨，我捡起一只正要穿过我家门口的街上的陆龟，然后把它带到了马路的另一边。 丹尼斯·梅普尔斯（Denise Maples）发来了一张她在肯普斯维尔（Kempsville）帮助一只陆龟过马路的照片。 梅普尔斯说，也许这只乌龟之所以微笑，是想感谢她。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

So true . Late spring is a big season for roaming turtles . The other morning , I picked up a box turtle crossing my street and carried it to the other side . Denise Maples sent the photo above of a box turtle that she had carried across her road in Kempsville . Maples said maybe the turtle was smiling to thank her .

source: So I say : Close up the liquor stores ; put a piece of rope in every jail cell ; hang or shoot the drug pushers 24 hours after convicted ; shoot the taggers who deface walls ; close up gun shops ; outlaw guns ; if someone needs to be in prison over 20 years , hang them ; send unruly kids with guns and knives to a desert boot camp for six months .

source: Well , maybe not ALL politics , but it 'd be pretty easy to argue that case , considering that Landau also once managed nominee MC5 . Or that committee member Tom Morello is a member of nominee Rage Against the Machine . Both are Rock Hall-worthy , but just as it in the newspaper business , the appearance of a conflict of interest is just as bad as a real conflict of interest .

source: Somali-born and London-based writer and poet Warsan Shire remarks , " No one leaves home unless home is the mouth of a shark . " Indeed , no human dares the unforgiving desert or the rising tides of the oceans if the beams of opportunity , freedom and peace do not shine on the other side of the border .

source: Here are some suggestions for talking with your parents about incidents that have hurt or angered you . Be aware that expressing your feelings , even in the most expert manner , is not a guarantee of a positive outcome and should only be attempted when you feel emotionally ready . Communicating in this manner , however , may help you discover whether a relationship is ready to move toward reconciliation .
domestication: 与父母讨论那些令你痛苦或愤怒的往事时，有几点需要注意。首先，你要明白，即使你表达得再合理、再冷静，也不一定能得到正面的结果，所以在这种对话前，一定要确保自己有足够的情绪准备。然而，如果你觉得自己已经准备好了，那么就可以试着开口。通过这样的沟通，你也许能够弄清楚你们的关系是否已经准备好走向和解了。记住，这种对话不是为了改变对方，而是为了你自己的内心平衡。所以，深呼吸，选择合适的时机和方式，平和地表达你的感受，哪怕结果不如意，也不会留下遗憾。
foreignization: 这里有一些建议供你在与父母讨论那些伤害或激怒过你的事件时参考。要知道，即使以最专业的方式表达你的感受，也不能保证有积极的结果，你应该只在感到情绪准备好了的时候尝试这样做。然而，以这种方式进行交流，可能会帮助你发现一段关系是否准备好朝着和解的方向发展。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Here are some suggestions for talking with your parents about incidents that have hurt or angered you . Be aware that expressing your feelings , even in the most expert manner , is not a guarantee of a positive outcome and should only be attempted when you feel emotionally ready . Communicating in this manner , however , may help you discover whether a relationship is ready to move toward reconciliation .

source: As the peacekeepers left , another activist group , Juntos , spilled into the room in green shirts that said " Si Se Puede , " ( " Yes , We Can " ) fresh off a march calling for immigration reform . As they collapsed on the pews to escape the screaming heat , they placed large photos of Latinos and signs that said " DISMANTLE ICE " -- an apparent reference to Immigration and Customs Enforcement -- at the foot of the altar .
domestication: 维持和平的人员一离开，另一群活动人士“联合起来”（Juntos）就涌进了房间，他们穿着绿色T恤，上面印着“Si Se Puede”（就是我们可以的意思），他们刚刚从一场呼吁移民改革的游行回来。他们瘫倒在长椅上，想摆脱酷热的侵扰，然后他们把很多拉丁裔的照片和写有“拆除ICE”的标语（显然是在说移民和海关执法局）放在祭坛脚下。

" We want everyone to keep calm heads , " she said .

source: Eugene R. Karczewski , 60 , a prominent Polish-American businessman of Brooklyn , and his 29-year-old son , Eugene F. Karczewski Jr. , were accused Thursday of violating SEC regulations . The SEC is seeking fines and return of $ 7 million the men allegedly diverted for personal investments and expenses. ; AROUND THE WORLD
domestication: 在布鲁克林，有一位华裔名叫尤金·卡切夫斯基，今年60岁，在美国波兰裔社区里算是个有头有脸的人物。他和他29岁的儿子小尤金·卡切夫斯基最近被指控违反了美国证券交易委员会（SEC）的相关规定。根据指控，父子俩涉嫌挪用公款高达700万美元，用于个人投资和消费。目前，SEC要求他们退回挪用的资金，并处以罚款。

source: Meeropol chose to focus on a far more personal story of the Rosenbergs , the grandparents she never knew , and touchingly reconstructs their lives through interviews with their friends and family members . " Heir " also examines the impact of the Rosenbergs ' untimely death -- both were in their mid-30s , the age Meeropol is now -- on the two young sons they left behind , not knowing what would become of them .
domestication: 梅罗波尔决定讲述一个关于罗森伯格夫妇的更私人的故事，她从未见过的祖父母，并通过与他们的朋友和家人交谈，感人地重现了他们的生活。《继承人》还探讨了罗森伯格夫妇过早去世的影响——他们都在三十多岁，梅罗波尔现在就是这个年龄——对他们留下来的两个年轻儿子产生了什么影响，他们不知道孩子们的未来会怎样。梅罗波尔想要探索的是，罗森伯格夫妇的死对他们的孩子，尤其是自己的父亲罗伯特，到底产生了什么样的影响。

source: The lump meat is the luscious single piece of muscle that works the swimming , short leg of the male blue crab . The female produces backfin meat , but the male produces the eye , the " filet mignon " of crabmeat . One hundred pounds of crabmeat produce 15 pounds of flesh ; 20 percent of that is lump meat .
domestication: 蓝蟹的雄性有块叫做“肉团”的东西，是一大块美味的肌肉，负责它游泳和支撑短腿用的。而雌性蓝蟹则长了叫做“背鳍”的肉，不过没什么特别的，反而是雄性长了“眼肉”，这才是最好的蟹肉，被称为“小排”。一百斤的蟹肉能得出十五斤的实质部分，而这其中只有20%是肉团。
foreignization: 块状肉是使蓝蟹的游泳腿运动的肥美的单块肌肉。雌性螃蟹生产背鳍肉，但雄性螃蟹则生产眼部，即“嫩牛排”般的蟹肉。一百磅蟹肉可生产出15磅的肉；其中20％是块状肉。

messages_domestication.content:

source: The documents also include records of alleged Khmer Rouge " traitors , " whose confessions were sent up the chain of command to Pol Pot from the director of Tuol Sleng prison through the Khmer Rouge defense minister , Son Sen , and his wife , Yun Yat , the minister of propaganda . The two were killed last month with their family and bodyguards in a purge reportedly ordered by Pol Pot at a Khmer Rouge guerrilla stronghold in the jungles of northern Cambodia .
domestication: 这些文件还包括了红色高棉的所谓“叛徒”的记录，他们的供词从土伦斯莱监狱长那里传到了波尔布特的手中，中间经过了国防部长宋森和他的妻子、宣传部长尹叶特。上个月，这两个人连同他们的家人和保镖一起在柬埔寨北部丛林中的一个红色高棉游击队基地被杀，据说这是波尔布特下令清除的结果。

source: This week brought some insight into the sect 's rituals . A hidden meeting room and chapel at the farmhouse in Cheiry was decorated with symbols variously inspired by Catholicism , astrology , Spiritualism , Templarism and Rosicrucianism . A golden chalice was used to burn incense . Members wore white , red or black capes , depending on their rank . A painting of a bearded Christ-like figure , with a rose above his head , presided over the area .
domestication: 这周，我们对这个教派的仪式有了一些了解。在瑞士希里镇的一处农舍里，有一个隐藏的会议室和礼拜堂，墙上装饰着各种符号，这些符号灵感来自天主教、占星术、灵论、圣殿骑士主义和玫瑰十字会。他们使用金杯来焚烧香。成员们根据自己的等级穿着白色、红色或黑色的斗篷。在这个区域，一个长着胡子的基督般的人物画像占据了中心位置，头顶上有一朵玫瑰。这一切都透露出一种神秘和诡异的气氛。

source: Coast Guard helicopters and boats returned for several hours Sunday to search for two men still missing since the accident at the mouth of Tillamook Bay a day earlier . On shore , federal investigators walked the beach , collecting the remaining soaked life jackets that had washed up from the wreck of the Taki Tooo .
domestication: 星期日上午，海岸警卫队的直升机和船只返回事故现场，花了几个小时搜索仍然下落不明的两名男子。他们是在塔拉木克湾入口外发生事故一天后失踪的。当天，联邦调查人员在岸边走来走去，收集从塔基图号沉船上漂洗到岸边的救生衣。

source: The stark black-and-white drawings depict the suffering of the prisoners : a teacupful of rice for dinner . Hard labor for 16 to 18 hours at a time at a camp in Woo Sung , China , their first destination before being moved to Japan four months later . The bitter winters , where the POWs marched up and down inside their flimsy cabins to keep warm . Beatings with bamboo sticks that caused running sores .
domestication: 那些黑白画面生动地描绘了战俘的苦难：晚餐只有一杯米饭。他们在中国吴川的一个集中营里，每天辛苦劳动长达16到18个小时，四个月后才被转移到日本。 寒冷的冬天，战俘们在简陋的屋子里来回踱步取暖。被竹棍打得伤口流脓。
foreignization: 生动的黑白画描绘了囚犯的痛苦：晚餐只有一杯米饭。在中国武城的一个集中营里，他们被迫长时间辛苦劳动，工作时间长达16到18个小时，这是他们在四个月后被转移到日本之前的第一个目的地。那里冬天异常寒冷，战俘们不得不在他们狭窄的木屋里来回走动以保持温暖。竹竿的殴打导致伤口化脓。

source: Mr. Fujimori shared his plans with only a handful of advisers during the crisis . But a break in Government planning that led to a violent resolution appeared to occur last weekend , when the President shuffled the leadership of his security forces . The Interior Minister and police commander were forced to resign , and after they took responsibility for the hostage-taking five months before , they were replaced by two hard-line generals .
domestication: 藤森总统在危机期间只与少数几个心腹顾问商量他的计划。但政府决策层似乎在上周出现了转折，导致局势以暴力方式解决。当时，藤森总统重新调整了安全部队的领导层。内政部长和警察司令被迫辞职，他们五个月前就承担了人质事件的责任，现在他们被两位强硬派将军取代了。
foreignization: 藤森在危机期间仅与少数顾问分享了他的计划。但是，似乎是在上周末发生的政府计划中断导致了暴力解决，当时总统重新洗牌了他安全部队的领导层。内政部长和警察司令被迫辞职，在他们在五个月前为人质事件承担责任后，他们被两名强硬派将军取代。

Mr. Fujimori shared his plans with only a handful of advisers during the crisis . The Interior Minister and police commander were forced to resign , and after they took responsibility for the hostage-taking five months before , they were replaced by two hard-line generals .

source: The V.A . hospital estimates that the work done by hundreds of volunteers like Mrs. Brown is worth at least $350,000 a year . But none of it registers on the gauge most widely used to assess the nation 's well-being -- the gross domestic product -- which represents the estimated total of goods and services produced in the American marketplace .
domestication: 美国退伍军人医院估计，像布朗夫人这样的数百名志愿者每年的贡献至少价值35万美元。但这些都没被我们通常用来衡量一个国家繁荣程度的指标——国内生产总值（GDP）所统计，后者代表着美国市场上所有商品和服务的总估算值。可以说，这是一个很大的盲区。
foreignization: 退伍军人管理局医院估计像布朗夫人这样的数百名志愿者所做的工作每年至少价值35万美元。但是，其中没有一项能在最广泛地用于评估一个国家福祉的衡量标准--国内生产总值（GDP）上体现出来，后者代表了美国市场上生产的商品和服务的估计总和。

source: In the airy sitting room of the ranch house where he has lived for 48 years , Byron Nelson holds a picture in his gnarled hands and peers back through time . In the frame , a lean young man is in the perfect golf position , his arms extended and the shaft of his club bowed , head behind the ball , body in absolute balance .
domestication: 拜伦·尼尔森在他住了48年的牧场房子的宽敞客厅里，双手粗糙，握着一张照片，凝视着遥远的过去。在相框中，一个年轻人身材瘦削，摆出标准的高尔夫姿势，双臂伸展，球杆弯曲，头部保持在球后，身体处于绝对平衡的状态。这位老人回忆往事，仿佛又回到了青春年少的岁月，那时的他风华正茂，意气风发，每一次挥杆都充满自信和希望。
foreignization: 在他居住了48年的牧场房屋中宽敞的客厅里，拜伦·纳尔逊用他那布满老年斑的手握着一张照片并通过它回顾过去。在相框中，一个瘦削的年轻人处于完美的高尔夫姿势，他的双臂伸展开来，球杆的杆身弯曲着，头部位于球后，身体处于绝对平衡之中。

source: FDA says Schein failed to follow regulations Washington -- Schein Pharmaceutical Inc. , a maker of generic drugs , distributed drugs after they had failed quality control tests , the Food and Drug Administration said in a warning letter . The problems at Schein 's Marsam Pharmaceuticals Inc. manufacturing facility in Cherry Hill , N.J. , were serious enough that the FDA said it is suspending all of the company 's applications for new drug approvals until the facility is found to be in compliance with the agency 's regulations .
domestication: 美国食品和药物管理局（FDA）指控，制药公司Schein Pharmaceutical Inc. 未能按照规定办事。这个生产仿制药的公司在新泽西州Cherry Hill市的工厂Marsam Pharmaceuticals Inc. 生产了不合格的药品，却仍然把它们送到市场上出售。FDA 在一封警告信中表示，这些问题很严重，他们已经停止审批该公司所有新的药品申请，直到工厂能够符合他们的规定。这样一来，Schein 的生意可真是“有苦难言”啊。
foreignization: 美国食品和药物管理局（FDA）称，Schein 未能遵守法规。 华盛顿——生产通用药的Schein Pharmaceutical Inc. 在药品未通过质量控制测试后仍然发放药品，美国食品和药物管理局在一份警告信中表示。 在新泽西州Cherry Hill 的Schein 的Marsam Pharmaceuticals Inc. 制造厂存在的问题严重到足以让美国食品和药物管理局表示，除非该厂被发现符合该机构的法规，否则他们将暂停所有新的药品批准申请。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

FDA says Schein failed to follow regulations Washington -- Schein Pharmaceutical Inc. , a maker of generic drugs , distributed drugs after they had failed quality control tests , the Food and Drug Administration said in a warning letter . The problems at Schein 's Marsam Pharmaceuticals Inc. manufacturing facility in Cherry Hill , N.J. , were serious enough that the FDA said it is suspending all of the company 's applications for new drug approvals until the facility is found to be in compliance with the agency 's regulations .

source: " They 're going to be pulling out bodies up and down this whole parish , " Arceneaux said as National Guard teams farther north began searching houses , marking them with green Os if clear and red Xs if not . The stench of decay cut the air in one part of Empire , and Arceneaux hoped it was a dead animal .
domestication: 他们将会在整个教区范围内挨家挨户地找出死者，阿坎索说，这时，国民警卫队的搜救队伍已经开始在北面较远的地方进行搜索，清理过的房子上标记绿色的“O”，未清理的则标上红色的“X”。在帝国镇的一个地方，空气中弥漫着一股难以忍受的臭味，阿坎索希望只是某种动物的尸体发出的恶臭。
foreignization: “ 他们将会在整个教区搜寻尸体 ，” 阿森诺说 ， 国民警卫队的团队在北部地区开始了对房屋的搜索工作 ， 如果房屋安全 ， 则在上面标记绿色的'O' ， 否则标记红色的'X' 。 在帝国的一个地方 ， 腐烂的气味弥漫空气中 ， 阿森诺希望这只是死动物的气味 。

" They 're going to be pulling out bodies up and down this whole parish , " Arceneaux said as National Guard teams farther north began searching houses , marking them with green Os if clear and red Xs if not . The stench of decay cut the air in one part of Empire , and Arceneaux hoped it was a dead animal .

source: A second group of high-tech companies is unique to the Washington region -- Beltway contractors with the alphabet soup names who furnish federal and state governments with information technology services , specialized software and systems management expertise . BDM International Inc. in McLean , American Management Systems Inc . ( AMS ) in Fairfax , CACI International Inc. in Arlington , Rockville 's Computer Data Systems Inc. and two Vienna neighbors , GRC International Inc. and BTG Inc. , top this list .
domestication: 在华盛顿地区，还有一批高科技公司非常特殊——这些公司以提供信息技术服务、专业软件和系统管理咨询为主，客户大多是联邦政府和州政府，这些公司的名字里通常都带有像BDM、AMS、CACI这样的缩写，比如总部位于麦克林的BDM国际公司，总部位于费尔法克斯的美国管理系统公司，总部位于阿灵顿的CACI国际公司，总部位于洛克维尔的计算机数据系统公司，以及总部位于维也纳的GRC国际公司和BTG公司等。
foreignization: 第二组高科技公司仅限于华盛顿地区 —— 带状公路（Beltway）承包商，名字中充满了字母组合的缩写，他们向联邦和州政府提供信息技术服务、专业软件以及系统管理专长。 位于麦克莱恩（McLean）的BDM国际公司（BDM International Inc.）、位于费尔法克斯（Fairfax）的美国管理系统公司（American Management Systems Inc.，简称AMS）、位于阿灵顿（Arlington）的CACI国际公司（CACI International Inc.）、洛克维尔（Rockville）的计算机数据系统公司（Computer Data Systems Inc.）以及两个位于维也纳（Vienna）的邻居——GRC国际公司（GRC International Inc.）和BTG公司（BTG Inc.），名列前茅。

source: Critics worry that the ministry may have lost its way at a moment when leaders in the United States and other industrial nations are demanding that it take more steps to help prevent an Asian tailspin . Economists say that by trying to tighten the country 's belt even during hard times , the ministry risks throwing Japan into recession .
domestication: 批评人士担心，日本财务省可能在美国和其他工业化国家要求其采取更多措施防止亚洲经济陷入螺旋下降之时迷失了方向。经济学家认为，财务省即使在困难时期也试图紧缩国内财政，这样做有可能让日本陷入经济衰退。他们说，日本经济已经到了山重水复的关口，财务省的政策可能会雪上加霜，使情况更加糟糕。
foreignization: 批评者担心，其他工业国的领导人在要求日本采取更多措施帮助防止亚洲经济大幅下滑之际，日本财务省可能已经迷失了方向。经济学家认为，通过在困难时期试图收紧日本财政政策，财务省冒着将日本推入衰退的风险。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Critics worry that the ministry may have lost its way at a moment when leaders in the United States and other industrial nations are demanding that it take more steps to help prevent an Asian tailspin . Economists say that by trying to tighten the country 's belt even during hard times , the ministry risks throwing Japan into recession .

source: Nor is it apparent what " violent productions " have to contribute to these operas . The world of " Cavalleria " is in fact one of extreme order . It certainly contains violence , but you would hardly know it from most of what happens in the opera , and even the act of violence in which it culminates is specific and contained -- Turiddu knows the inevitable outcome of his involvement with Alfio 's wife . The world of " Pagliacci , " apart from the demons lurking in Canio 's mind , is n't noticeably violent at all .
domestication: “狂暴主义”与这些歌剧有什么关联，这一点并不明显。“骑士气”里的世界，其实是一个极有序的世界。虽然它包含着暴力，但从歌剧的大部分情节中，你几乎无法感觉到这一点，即使是高潮部分的那一幕暴力场面也是特定且受到控制的——图里杜很清楚，他和阿尔菲奥的妻子来往的结局将会如何。在“小丑”，除了卡尼奥脑海中的恶魔外，其余部分并没有明显的暴力色彩。
foreignization: 也不清楚“暴力制作”将为这些歌剧带来什么。“骑士气”世界实际上是一个极端有序的世界。它肯定包含暴力，但你很难从歌剧中大多数发生的事情中感受到这一点，即使它最终达到高潮的暴力行为也是具体的和被控制的——图里杜知道他与阿尔菲奥妻子的纠缠将会带来不可避免的后果。在卡尼奥心灵中潜伏着的恶魔之外，“小丑”的世界根本就没有明显的暴力。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Nor is it apparent what " violent productions " have to contribute to these operas . The world of " Cavalleria " is in fact one of extreme order . It certainly contains violence , but you would hardly know it from most of what happens in the opera , and even the act of violence in which it culminates is specific and contained -- Turiddu knows the inevitable outcome of his involvement with Alfio 's wife . The world of " Pagliacci , " apart from the demons lurking in Canio 's mind , is n't noticeably violent at all .
“狂暴主义”与这些歌剧有什么关联，这一点并不明显。“骑士气”里的世界，其实是一个极有序的世界。虽然它包含着暴力，但从歌剧的大部分情节中，你几乎无法感觉到这一点，即使是高潮部分的那一幕暴力场面也是特定且受到控制的——图里杜很清楚，他和阿尔菲奥的妻子来往的结局将会如何。在“小丑”，除了卡尼奥脑海中的恶魔外，其余部分并没有明显的暴力色彩。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Nor is it apparent what " violent productions " have to contribute to these operas . The world of " Cavalleria " is in fact one of extreme order . It certainly contains violence , but you would hardly know it from most of what happens in the opera , and even the act of violence in which it culminates is specific and contained -- Turiddu knows the inevitable outcome of his involvement with Alfio 's wife . The world of " Pagliacci , " apart from the demons lurking in Canio 's mind , is n't noticeably violent at all .
也不清楚“暴力制作”将为这些歌剧带来什么。“骑士气”世界实际上是一个极端有序的世界。它肯定包含暴力，但你很难从歌剧中大多数发生的事情中感受到这一点，即使它最终达到高潮的暴力行为也是具体的和被控制的——图里杜知道他与阿尔菲奥妻子的纠缠将会带来不可避免的后果。在卡尼奥心灵中潜伏着的恶魔之外，“小丑”的世界根本就没有明显的暴力。

source: Now , the pharmaceutical industry finds itself under siege from insurers , hospitals , Congress and the Clinton Administration , which calls the containment of health-care costs a major priority in its fight to reduce the Federal deficit . On Friday , the President singled out the industry for criticism , calling its prices " shocking " and saying drug companies are spending too much on advertising and lobbying .
domestication: 眼下，这个制药行业正受到保险商、医院、国会和克林顿政府的围攻，后者称控制医疗费用是减少联邦赤字斗争中的重要任务。星期五，总统对这个行业提出批评，称其价格“令人震惊”，并且表示制药公司在广告宣传和游说方面花费太多。这样一来，制药业真的是四面受敌了，好在业内人士早有准备，应对措施早就开始实施了。现在，他们正在积极应对这一挑战，争取找到出路，扭转被动局面。
foreignization: 现在，制药行业发现自己受到来自保险商、医院、国会和克林顿政府的围攻，后者称控制医疗保健成本是其减少联邦赤字斗争中的一个主要优先事项。周五，总统单独指出该行业批评，称其价格“令人震惊”，并且说制药公司在广告宣传和游说方面花费了太多。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Now , the pharmaceutical industry finds itself under siege from insurers , hospitals , Congress and the Clinton Administration , which calls the containment of health-care costs a major priority in its fight to reduce the Federal deficit . On Friday , the President singled out the industry for criticism , calling its prices " shocking " and saying drug companies are spending too much on advertising and lobbying .
眼下，这个制药行业正受到保险商、医院、国会和克林顿政府的围攻，后者称控制医疗费用是减少联邦赤字斗争中的重要任务。星期五，总统对这个行业提出批评，称其价格“令人震惊”，并且表示制药公司在广告宣传和游说方面花费太多。这样一来，制药业真的是四面受敌了，好在业内人士早有准备，应对措施早就开始实施了。现在，他们正在积极应对这一挑战，争取找到出路，扭转被动局面。

Translate the following text to Chinese.
