source: Still , the cultural expression of quarterlife crisis is gaining momentum . Another QLC book , " Conquering Your Quarterlife Crisis " by Alexandra Robbins ( Perigee Books , $14.95 ) , landed on bookshelves across the country in October . Musician John Mayer croons about what " might be a quarterlife crisis or just the stirring in my soul " and asks , " Am I living it right ? " in his song " Why Georgia . "
domestication: 尽管如此，关于四分之一人生危机的文化表达却越来越受到关注。又有一本有关四分之一人生危机的书《征服你的四分之一人生危机》（作者：亚历山德拉·罗宾斯，出版社：Perigee Books，售价14.95美元）在十月份登上了全国各地的书架。音乐家约翰·梅尔在他的歌曲"Why Georgia"中感叹着“这可能是一场四分之一人生危机，或者只是我灵魂的某种躁动”，并问道：“我是不是过得对了？”
foreignization: 尽管如此，关于四分之一人生危机的文化表达正在逐渐增强。 另一本关于QLC的书，《征服你的四分之一人生危机》（Conquering Your Quarterlife Crisis）作者是亚历山德拉·罗宾斯（Alexandra Robbins）（Perigee Books，$14.95），在十月份上架在全国各地的书店。 音乐家约翰·梅尔（John Mayer）在他的歌曲“Why Georgia”中哀叹着什么“可能是四分之一人生危机或者只是我灵魂深处的萌动”，并且询问道“是否我过得正确？”。

source: Deregulation was supposed to do for the power industry what it did in the airline and telecommunications industries : bring consumers lower prices and more competition . Instead , utility bills are rising sharply for residents in many states that unshackled their power markets as rate caps , the final remnants of regulation , expire .
domestication: 放松管制原本是要让电力行业像航空和电信行业那样，给消费者带来更低的价格和更多的竞争。但结果，很多已经解除电力市场管制的州的居民发现自己的电费却直线上涨。这主要是因为最后的管制残余——价格上限，也开始过期了。
foreignization: 放松管制原本应对电力行业产生与其对航空和电信业一样的影响：为消费者带来更低的价格和更多的竞争。相反，许多解除了电力市场限制的州的居民的公用事业账单却急剧上涨，因为最后残存的管制——价格上限到期失效。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Deregulation was supposed to do for the power industry what it did in the airline and telecommunications industries : bring consumers lower prices and more competition . Instead , utility bills are rising sharply for residents in many states that unshackled their power markets as rate caps , the final remnants of regulation , expire .
放松管制原本是要让电力行业像航空和电信行业那样，给消费者带来更低的价格和更多的竞争。但结果，很多已经解除电力市场管制的州的居民发现自己的电费却直线上涨。这主要是因为最后的管制残余——价格上限，也开始过期了。

Instead , utility bills are rising sharply for residents in many states that unshackled their power markets as rate caps , the final remnants of regulation , expire .
放松管制原本应对电力行业产生与其对航空和电信业一样的影响：为消费者带来更低的价格和更多的竞争。相反，许多解除了电力市场限制的州的居民的公用事业账单却急剧上涨，因为最后残存的管制——价格上限到期失效。

source: His daughter does not smoke . But some research has shown a direct connection between working in tobacco farms and youth smoking , making the question of school tobacco farms all the more nettlesome . Children are more likely to smoke -- boys 10 times as likely , girls 51/2 times as likely -- if they work on tobacco farms and have a parent who smokes , a University of Kentucky study shows . Melody Noland , the researcher who conducted the study , recalled one mother packing a single cigarette in her third-grader 's lunch every day . One of her survey forms asked students when they started smoking . The earliest date on the form was first grade . A boy raised his hand and asked : " What if you started in kindergarten ? "
domestication: 他的女儿不吸烟，但一些研究显示，在烟草农场工作和青少年吸烟之间存在直接的联系，这使得关于学校烟草农场的问题更加棘手。如果孩子们在烟草农场工作，并且父母中有人吸烟，那么他们更容易开始吸烟——男孩的可能性是10倍，女孩的可能性是5.5倍。肯塔基大学的一项研究表明了这一点。该研究的负责人梅洛迪·诺兰回忆起，一位母亲每天给她的三年级学生打包一包单独的香烟。在她的调查问卷中，有一个问题是询问学生什么时候开始吸烟，最早的日期是在第一年级。一位男孩举手问道：“如果你从幼儿园开始吸烟怎么办？”这件事让人感到非常震惊，也让我们意识到有些孩子可能从非常小的年龄就开始接触香烟。

source: When Napoleon started conquering Europe , he attacked from the right flank in violation of principles of combat that had been in place since Richard the Lionhearted . By the time Napoleon was idling on St. Helena , only Britain and Sweden - the two countries he did n't reach in western Europe - were still driving on the left . In most of the nations of eastern Europe , the rule of the left prevailed until the Nazis imposed their will during World War II .
domestication: 当拿破仑开始征服欧洲时，他从右翼发动攻击，这违反了理查一世狮心王以来就确立的战争原则。到拿破仑在圣赫勒拿岛闲置的时候，只有英国和瑞典这两个他没能征服的西欧国家还在靠左行驶。在东欧的大多数国家，靠左行驶的惯例一直持续到二战期间纳粹强加他们的意志。
foreignization: 当拿破仑开始征服欧洲时，他从右翼发动攻击，违反了自狮心王理查以来一直存在的战斗原则。到拿破仑在圣赫勒拿岛闲逛的时候，只有英国和瑞典——他在西欧没有到达的两个国家——仍然靠左行驶。在东欧大多数国家，左侧通行的规则占主导地位，直到纳粹在第二次世界大战期间强加他们的意志。

When Napoleon started conquering Europe , he attacked from the right flank in violation of principles of combat that had been in place since Richard the Lionhearted . By the time Napoleon was idling on St. Helena , only Britain and Sweden - the two countries he did n't reach in western Europe - were still driving on the left . In most of the nations of eastern Europe , the rule of the left prevailed until the Nazis imposed their will during World War II .

Has won more than 6,000 races and $ 170 million . Inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1989 . TRAINER : Tony Reinstedler . A Louisville native . Won first trainer 's title at Churchill Downs in 1993 . OWNER : William K. Warren . Chairman of the William K. Warren Foundation , Warren America Oil Co. and CEO of Cellular One in New York . SIRE : Dixieland Band ( by Northern Dancer ) DAM : Double Smooth ( by Overskate ) RECORD : 5 starts : 3 wins , 1 second ; $ 175,057 LAST START : 2nd , Wood Memorial COMMENT : Has n't proved he can run with this lot
domestication: 小有来头的第十二号马“Knockadoon”赔率为12比1，骑师是经验丰富的Chris McCarron。这已经是他第十三次参加德比赛，他曾在1987年和去年分别骑着“Alysheba”和“Go for Gin”夺得冠军。McCarron已经赢得了六千多场比赛，奖金高达一亿七千万美元。他早在1989年就被收入名人堂。训练这匹马的是来自路易斯维尔的托尼·莱恩斯特德勒，他在1993年第一次在丘吉尔唐斯赛马场获得训练师冠军。马主是威廉·K·沃伦，他是威廉·K·沃伦基金会、沃伦美国石油公司和纽约Cellular One公司的董事长。“Knockadoon”的父系是“Dixieland Band”，它的母系“Double Smooth”则出自“Overskate”。这匹马出道五次，已经三胜一负，总奖金达17万5000多元。上一次比赛，它在木制纪念赛中以第二名的成绩结束。然而，它还没有证明自己能跟这些强手抗衡。

source: As part of his chaplain 's duties while a prisoner in Japan , Mace said he was put in charge of cremating and storing the ashes of his compatriots who died in the camps . Many of the small boxes were packed with personal possessions and affixed with identification labels with the goal of delivering them to surviving family members after the war .
domestication: 当时，马塞担任战俘营的牧师，他说自己被安排负责火化并保管同胞战俘的骨灰。很多小木盒里装着遗物，还贴着身份标签，目的是等战争结束后交给他们的家人。这些小木盒很快就装满了，足以说明那些年在日本战俘营里的中国人遭遇了不幸。
foreignization: 作为日本战俘时期担任牧师职责的一部分，梅斯说他负责焚烧并存放在集中营中去世的同胞的骨灰。许多小盒子里装满了个人财物，并附有带有身份标签，目的是在战争结束后将它们送给幸存的家庭成员。

source: Sen. Jim DeMint , R-S.C. , plans to introduce a bill to use the surplus to fund individual accounts , with investments limited only to Treasury bonds . The idea was first proposed in April by Alex Pollack , a scholar at the American Enterprise Institute , who argued that it " will deliver all of the benefits of personal accounts with none of the costs or risks cited by opponents . "
domestication: 南卡罗来纳州的参议员吉姆·德明特计划提出一项议案，利用政府的盈余资金设立个人账户，但是投资只会被限制在国库券上。这一想法最早是四月份由美国企业研究所的学者亚历克斯·波拉克提出来的，他认为“这样可以带来所有个人账户的好处，同时避免了反对者提出的所有弊端和风险”。
foreignization: 参议员吉姆·德明特（Jim DeMint）计划提出一项法案，利用多余资金为个人账户提供资金，其投资仅限于国库券。这个想法最先在四月份由美国企业研究所的学者亚历克斯·波拉克（Alex Pollack）提出来，他认为“它将带来个人账户的所有好处，而没有反对者所说的任何成本或风险”。

source: The most expensive kitchens can cost $400,000 or more , with two of everything from islands to dishwashers . The cabinetry alone can cost $250,000 , more than the average home in metro Atlanta . Smaller kitchens tucked into butler 's pantries may do most of the real work , so the showcase kitchen 's crystal chandeliers , porous countertops and furniture-grade cabinetry stay pristine .
domestication: 有钱人的厨房真不一般，价格最高的可以达到40万美元以上，什么东西都是一应俱全，连洗碗机和岛台都有一对。柜子就能花费25万美元，已经超过亚特兰大平均房价了。其实真正下大火的还不是这种外观厨房，而是那些被隐藏在管家室里的迷你厨房。所以，这些外观厨房才能保持着晶吊灯、透气的台面和家具级别的柜子的完美状态。
foreignization: 最昂贵的厨房可以花费 400,000 美元或更多，其中包括从岛屿到洗碗机的每样东西都是两份。橱柜单独的价格就可以达到 25 万美元，超过了亚特兰大市区普通住宅的平均价格。塞在管家食品储藏室里的小厨房可能承担着大部分真正的工作，这样展示厨房的水晶灯，多孔台面以及家具级橱柜保持完美无瑕。

source: Call it iSilly , a growing number of products in which fun is emphasized over function , and cute or irreverent often trumps wow . All of these items , some costing as little as $10 , have been created to plug into an iPod -- or , in many cases , any audio source that has a standard 3.5-millimeter headphone jack .
domestication: 现在有一种趋势，产品越来越玩味，强调乐趣而不是功能，很多东西都很可爱，也很不拘一格。不管是哪种产品，都很廉价，有的仅需十块钱，它们都是为了插在iPod上而设计的，或者说，能插在任何一个标准3.5毫米耳机孔的音源设备上。
foreignization: 我们可以把它称为iSilly，一种越来越多的产品，它们强调的是乐趣而不是功能，且常常使用可爱或不拘泥的设计，而不是惊人的功能。所有这些物品，其中一些价格低至10美元，都是为了插入iPod而设计的——或者，在很多情况下，任何具有标准3.5毫米耳机插孔的音频设备。

source: It took decades for the military to formally recognize the role of the civilian POWs in the defense of Wake Island . Mace said he received his discharge papers from the Navy in 1981 . " They were 36 years late , " he said . He also was awarded two bronze stars and five Purple Hearts for wounds sustained on Wake Island .
domestication: 花了几十年时间，军方才正式承认那些平民战俘在威克岛保卫战中所发挥的作用。梅斯说，他是在1981年收到海军的退役证明的，“晚了整整36年”，他感叹道。他还因在威克岛上的负伤而获得了两枚青铜星章和五枚紫心勋章。

It took decades for the military to formally recognize the role of the civilian POWs in the defense of Wake Island . Mace said he received his discharge papers from the Navy in 1981 . " They were 36 years late , " he said . He also was awarded two bronze stars and five Purple Hearts for wounds sustained on Wake Island .
花了几十年时间，军方才正式承认那些平民战俘在威克岛保卫战中所发挥的作用。梅斯说，他是在1981年收到海军的退役证明的，“晚了整整36年”，他感叹道。他还因在威克岛上的负伤而获得了两枚青铜星章和五枚紫心勋章。

source: Although Carpenter and the Florida Marlins ' Dontrelle Willis are regarded as front-runners for the league 's Cy Young Award , all three Houston aces figure to get votes after finishing in the NL 's top seven in earned run average . Clemens ( 13-8 , 1.87 ) posted the NL 's lowest ERA since Greg Maddux 's 1.63 in 1995 ; Pettitte ( 17-9 , 2.39 ) was second . Oswalt ( 20-12 , 2.94 ) had his second 20-win season in a row .

source: According to the shelter 's own figures they took in 2,455 live dogs last year . After just 14 percent of those were returned to the owners , leaving 2,106 , the shelter euthanized 1,338 . That is 64 percent . It does n't matter whether an animal can be tested and graded and defined as " unadaptable . " They are all living creatures whose killing should concern us all .
domestication: 根据收容所自己的统计数据，他们去年接纳了2455只活狗。其中只有14%的狗被送回了主人，剩下的2106只，其中1338只被安乐死。这占到了总数的64%。不管一只动物能不能通过测试和评估，被定义为“无法适应”，它们都是活生生的生命，它们的死亡都应该引起我们的关注。我们不能因为它们可能没有什么用处或者不够完美，就对它们视而不见。每一条生命都是宝贵的，我们都应该为此感到担忧。

source: First . . . adding Internet support to Windows can not violate the antitrust laws , no matter what Microsoft 's " intent " was in doing so . Indeed , Microsoft 's addition of such functionality to Windows was but a single instance of a pervasive practice in high-technology industries -- the improvement of a product through the integration of new functionality previously provided by separate products .
domestication: 首先，给Windows添加互联网支持这件事是不能违反反垄断法的，无论微软出于什么样的“意图”。事实上，微软在Windows中增加这种功能只不过是高科技行业中普遍做法的一个例子，即通过集成之前由单独产品提供的新功能来改进产品。这种做法在行业里十分常见，比如说智能手机，它既能打电话又能上网，还能拍照和看视频，这些功能以前都是需要单独设备才能实现的。

' " Ms. Barr also used other epithets to describe the pilot , but you will not read them in this newspaper .
“他们特意雇佣一些人来激怒我，”巴尔女士说。“直到我们最后拍出了不适合播出的试播剧，我们才意识到自己被耍了。我们当时想：‘哦天哪，现在我明白为什么他们雇佣的人都这么没能力了。’”巴尔女士还用了一些其他难听的话来形容这部试播剧，不过你在这份报纸上是不会看到的。

source: Hurrah for the National Basketball Association . It 's about time some restraint be placed on players who make millions passing a ball around and thus think they have privileges and rights far above that of the average citizen . Sprewell simply overstepped the bounds which have been approached by too many players . It is well known that coaches are often outspoken , but no player is forced to play . Let him quit and try to find a job - I suspect he could n't hold a regular one .
domestication: NBA终于有所行动了！那些挣了钱就以为自己了不起的球员该收敛点儿了，他们只是传传球就赚大钱，感觉自己比普通人高一等，实在是没道理。斯普雷维尔这次过分了，之前也有很多球员都这样，但他更是无所顾忌。大家都知道教练的话可能比较直白，但是没人逼着球员打球。如果他们觉得不爽，就让他们走人去找份普通工作看看吧，我估计他们也干不了几天。
foreignization: 万岁，国家篮球协会。终于有人对那些通过传球赚取百万美元并且因此认为自己拥有远超过普通公民的特权和权利的球员施加了限制。斯普雷维尔简单地越过了界限，而太多的球员也已经接近了这个界限。众所周知，教练通常都很直言不讳，但是没有哪个球员被迫打球。他可以选择退出，并尝试找一份工作——我怀疑他连一份正常的工作都做不了。

source: It took Bill Romanowski more than three hours to finally catch up with Kansas City tight end Tony Gonzalez . By then , it was too late . Gonzalez , shoved and slapped by Denver 's rambunctious linebacker last year , caught 10 passes for 127 yards - both career highs . Romanowski was hardly a factor and he approached Gonzalez afterward to resume their rivalry .
domestication: 比尔·罗马诺夫斯基花了三个多小时才终于追上堪萨斯城队的近端锋托尼·冈萨雷斯。但为时已晚，冈萨雷斯已经收获了10次接球127码，这都是他职业生涯的最高纪录。去年，冈萨雷斯被丹佛队这位爱出风头的线卫推搡和扇耳光。比赛结束后，表现平平的罗马诺夫斯基走向冈萨雷斯，想要继续他们之间的宿怨。
foreignization: 比尔·罗马诺夫斯基花了超过三个小时才终于赶上堪萨斯城的紧端球员托尼·冈萨雷斯。在那时，已经太晚了。冈萨雷斯，去年被丹佛这位喧闹的线卫推搡和打耳光，这次接到了10次传球，获得127码——两者都是他职业生涯的新高。罗马诺夫斯基几乎没有发挥作用，他赛后走近冈萨雷斯以继续他们之间的竞争。

source: I have given instructions to draft a temporary agreement between republics on economic issues for 1991 . The draft has been considered in all republics , and we have their remarks . It will be redrafted and signed . This will remove obstacles to normal functioning of the state during the period of transition to the market . ...
domestication: 我已经指示起草了各共和国关于1991年经济问题的临时协议，该草案已经在各个共和国进行了讨论，我们也收到了他们的意见。接下来，我们会根据这些反馈重新修订，并最终签署。这将有助于在转向市场经济的过渡期内，解决国家运作中的障碍。
foreignization: 我已经下令起草了一份关于1991年经济问题的临时协议，该草案已在所有共和国中被讨论，我们也获得了他们的意见。它将被重新拟定并签署。这将消除国家在向市场过渡期间正常运作的障碍。...

I have given instructions to draft a temporary agreement between republics on economic issues for 1991 . The draft has been considered in all republics , and we have their remarks . It will be redrafted and signed . This will remove obstacles to normal functioning of the state during the period of transition to the market . ...

source: Therefore , let us be careful not to leave one another alone , but affirm faith wherever we hear of it and see it in action . At the same time , in light of recent tragic events , we must be just as careful not to affirm any fanatical faith that crosses the line from love to hatred -- of oneself or others . WALTRAUT STEIN , Decatur
domestication: 所以，我们应该互相关心，不能让对方孤单一人。当我们听到或者看到信仰的时候，要给予肯定和支持。但是，最近发生的悲剧告诉我们，也不能盲目肯定任何极端的信仰，特别是那些已经从爱转变为恨的信仰，无论是对自己还是对他人。--沃尔特劳特·斯坦，迪凯特
foreignization: 因此，让我们小心不要彼此孤单，而是要确认我们无论何时何地听到或看到的信仰。在此同时，在最近悲剧事件的光下，我们必须同样小心，不要肯定任何狂热的信仰，这种信仰从爱转向了恨——不管是对自己还是他人。瓦尔特劳特·斯坦，迪凯特

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Therefore , let us be careful not to leave one another alone , but affirm faith wherever we hear of it and see it in action . WALTRAUT STEIN , Decatur

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Therefore , let us be careful not to leave one another alone , but affirm faith wherever we hear of it and see it in action . At the same time , in light of recent tragic events , we must be just as careful not to affirm any fanatical faith that crosses the line from love to hatred -- of oneself or others . WALTRAUT STEIN , Decatur
因此，让我们小心不要彼此孤单，而是要确认我们无论何时何地听到或看到的信仰。在此同时，在最近悲剧事件的光下，我们必须同样小心，不要肯定任何狂热的信仰，这种信仰从爱转向了恨——不管是对自己还是他人。瓦尔特劳特·斯坦，迪凯特

source: The resulting fast-paced games , and big victories , have electrified the town and set off a frenzy of ticket buying . Saturday 's game has been declared a sellout at 24,535-seat Thompson-Boling Arena -- the first time in Lady Vols history that a game there has been sold out in advance . The crowd may become the largest to see a women 's college basketball game . The mark was set here Jan. 3 , when Tennessee met Connecticut and drew 24,597 , with standing-room tickets sold .
domestication: 这高速运转的比赛和大胜，让整个镇沸腾了，引发了一阵疯狂的抢票潮。星期六的比赛已经宣布在拥有24535个座位的汤普森-博林竞技场售罄，这也是田纳西女志愿者队历史上第一次提前将比赛门票全部售出。观众人数可能会成为观看大学女子篮球比赛的最多人次。之前的记录是在1月3日创下的，当时田纳西队对阵康涅狄格队，吸引了24597名观众，包括购买站票的观众。

source: The official opening ribbon cutting ceremony at Angel Park , a community-sponsored $1.5 million all-inclusive playground conceived and designed in memory of Kelli and Andy Szczybor 's son Ryan who died of leukemia at age one , 19 years ago . The playground and amphitheater is one of the largest and most accessible playground for children with special needs in the Baltimore region .

source: Looking ahead , the diversity within the Top 100 list continues to provide insurance against a downturn . " It 's a broader universe than it has been in years past . If one company falls down , another comes on , " said Prabha Carpenter , manager of the Growth Fund of Washington , a mutual fund that makes most of its investments in Washington area companies . The fund had a " phenomenal " year , she said .

source: One of the best things you can do on a Saturday or Sunday is get a few friends together , install yourselves under El Huarache Azteca 's murals and spend some quality time with the platillo de barbacoa -- smoky , roasted lamb , by the plate or the pound -- and the cold beverage of your choice . Otherwise , corn is the thing here , in a dozen shapes with many fillings : Mmsa patted into thick sopes and grilled ; tortillas wrapped around chicken stewed with tomato and onion ; fried cornmeal pouches with pressed , deep-fried pork rind ; and the signature huaraches , extra-thick tortillas topped with meat , cactus or huitlacoche .
domestication: 周六或周日，最好的事情之一就是召集几个朋友，一起在 El Huarache Azteca 的壁画下安顿下来，享受高品质的platillo de barbacoa——烟熏、烤羊肉，可以按盘或按斤来点，还可以选择你喜欢的冷饮。另外，这里的玉米也很有特点，有十几种形状和馅料：Mmsa被拍成厚厚的sope，烤出来很香；玉米饼包裹着番茄洋葱炖鸡；炸玉米面粉袋里填着压碎的、油炸猪皮；还有招牌菜huarache，超厚的玉米饼上面加肉、仙人掌或者huitlacoche。
foreignization: 在星期六或星期日，最好的选择之一就是聚集几个朋友，坐在El Huarache Azteca壁画下，和朋友们一起享受高品质的platillo de barbacoa——烟熏烤羊肉，可以按盘或按磅来点，还有您选择的冷饮。另外，这里的玉米有十几种形状和馅料：Mmsa被拍成厚厚的sopes然后烤制；玉米饼包裹着番茄洋葱炖鸡；油炸的玉米粉袋子里有压制的、油炸的猪皮；还有招牌菜huaraches——超厚的玉米饼上面加有肉、仙人掌或huitlacoche。

source: ARIZONA : Matt Williams , who came out of Saturday 's game after two innings because of recurring plantar fasciatis in his left foot , had a cortisone shot after the game and was back in the lineup Sunday . ... Todd Stottlemyre , on the 15-day DL with tendinitis in his right elbow , is scheduled to start against Kevin Brown in Los Angeles on Thursday . ... source: Gaylord Perry is in the Hall of Fame , and he is famous for throwing a spit ball , which is an illegal pitch . If one cheater is in the Hall of Fame , the rest of the " cheaters " should be there , too . Barry Bonds , Mark McGwire , Roger Clemens , Rafael Palmeiro and Alex Rodriguez should all be in the Hall of Fame . Are their numbers inflated ? Probably so , but their numbers are so astronomical they would still have Hall of Fame numbers if stats were taken away from them .
domestication: 盖洛德·佩里已经进入名人堂，他以投出唾液球而闻名，这是一种违规的投球动作。如果一个作弊者可以进入名人堂，那么其他“作弊者”也应该进去吧。巴里·邦德斯、马克·麦奎尔、罗杰·克莱门斯、拉斐尔·帕尔梅罗和亚历克斯·罗德里格斯都应该在名人堂。他们的数据夸张了吗？可能是这样，但即使从他们身上拿走一些成绩，他们的数据仍然足以跻身名人堂。毕竟，好汉不吃眼前亏，他们在球场上的表现确实让人惊叹，如果硬要因为一点小问题就否定他们的成就，那就有些不近人情了。
foreignization: 盖洛德·佩里在名人堂中，他以投掷唾液球闻名，这是一种违法的投球。如果一个作弊者进入名人堂，其余的“作弊者”也应该在那里。巴里·邦兹，马克·麦奎尔，罗杰·克莱门斯，拉斐尔·帕尔梅罗和亚历克斯·罗德里格斯都应该在名人堂中。他们的数据是虚假的吗？很可能是这样的，但他们的数据如此惊人，即使从他们那里拿走数据，他们仍然会有名人堂级别的数据。

source: Run-of-the-mill hazing also remains an overriding feature of plebe life . For the benefit of a visitor to a mess-hall table , one plebe ( his name withheld to protect his own dignity ) was run through a routine that appeared to involve balancing bits of dessert on his upper lip . He ended by shouting , " Sir ! That 's expletive good Jell-O ! "
domestication: 新兵的生活仍然充满着一些老套的霸凌行为。有一次，在食堂里，一位新兵（为了保护他的自尊心，我们就不透露他的名字吧）被安排表演一个有趣的节目，他要在自己上唇上平衡几块甜点。最后，他大声喊道：“报告！这Jell-O太棒了！”这一切都是为了逗坐在一起吃饭的人开心。
foreignization: 平凡的欺凌仍然是新生生活中占主导地位的特征。为了给一位来到食堂餐桌的访客留下深刻印象，一位新生（他的名字被隐去以保护他的尊严）被要求进行一个表演，这似乎涉及在他的上唇上平衡甜点。他最后大声喊道，“先生！那是非常好的果冻！”

source: The artist went by the same name . Jim Willoughby was known around town . He was a successful cartoonist whose work appeared twice-weekly in The Daily Courier newspaper , usually lampooning the mayor or the town council 's latest pet project . Years before , he 'd worked at Hanna-Barbera and Walt Disney , helping give life to Scooby Doo , Yogi Bear , Darkwing Duck .
domestication: 这位艺术家也叫吉姆·威洛比，在当地十分出名。他是一位成功的漫画家，作品每周在《每日快报》上刊登两次，通常嘲笑市长或镇议会最新的项目。很多年前，他曾在汉纳-巴伯拉和沃尔特迪士尼工作，为史酷比、伊尤奇熊、黑暗之翼鸭等角色赋予了生命。他的名字在镇上无人不知，无人不晓，谁都知道他是个有才华的家伙。
foreignization: 艺术家使用相同的名字。吉姆·威洛比在镇上很有名。他是一位成功的漫画家，他的作品每周两次出现在《每日快递》报纸上，通常嘲笑市长或镇议会最新的宠儿项目。多年前，他曾在汉纳-巴伯拉和沃尔特·迪斯尼工作，帮助赋予史酷比狗，伊奥吉熊，达克黑鸭生命。

source: The service capped eight days of grieving for the 87-year-old nun , who earned the nickname " Saint of the Gutters " for her devotion to the destitute and dying . About 500,000 viewed her body during the week at St. Thomas ' Church ; when the doors to the small church were finally closed to the public , Mother Teresa 's religious community prayed there through the night , with back-to-back Masses .
domestication: 这场追悼会标志着对这位87岁修女八天的哀悼告一段落，她因对穷人和垂死者的奉献而被称为“下水道圣人”。在圣托马斯教堂，一周之内大约有50万人瞻仰了她的遗体；当教堂的大门终于关闭时，圣母特蕾莎的修道社区整夜祈祷，连续举行弥撒，一场接着一场。
foreignization: 这场追悼会结束了对这位87岁修女八天的哀悼，她因为献身于穷人和垂危者而获得“圣人”这一绰号。在圣托马斯教堂里，约有50万人在一周内瞻仰了她的遗体，当教堂大门终于关闭时，特蕾莎修女的修道社区整夜祈祷，进行连续的弥撒。

The service capped eight days of grieving for the 87-year-old nun , who earned the nickname " Saint of the Gutters " for her devotion to the destitute and dying . About 500,000 viewed her body during the week at St. Thomas ' Church ; when the doors to the small church were finally closed to the public , Mother Teresa 's religious community prayed there through the night , with back-to-back Masses .
这场追悼会标志着对这位87岁修女八天的哀悼告一段落，她因对穷人和垂死者的奉献而被称为“下水道圣人”。在圣托马斯教堂，一周之内大约有50万人瞻仰了她的遗体；当教堂的大门终于关闭时，圣母特蕾莎的修道社区整夜祈祷，连续举行弥撒，一场接着一场。

source: Lightly oil a large bowl . Place the dough in the bowl and lightly spray or rub the top of the dough with additional oil . Cover tightly with plastic wrap and place in a warm spot . Set aside to rise until the dough has doubled in size , about 1 hour . ( Gently stick a finger into the center of the dough ; if the indentation remains once you 've removed your finger , it should be ready . )

source: The Cubs enter the offseason with almost $96 million in guaranteed base salaries committed to 13 players for next season -- representing $21.7 million in combined raises for those players . Considering the uncertainty over team ownership and a 2007 payroll of about $100million , one of the biggest questions this winter will be how much room that payroll has to grow .

source: In the early spring of 1926 the metal framework for the new men 's gymnasium at the University of Arizona is beginning to take shape . The structure is where the Wildcats are expected to play their basketball games , the first maybe as early as January , 1927 . It is located east of the Old Main , the original building on campus .
domestication: 1926年初春，亚利桑那大学新建的男子体育馆开始成形，钢骨架已经初具规模。这座建筑将会成为野猫队打篮球比赛的主场，预计最早可能在1927年1月就开始使用。它坐落在校园内的老主楼以东，令人耳目一新。这座体育馆的建成，将会为野猫队带来崭新的比赛体验，也会成为校园内的一大亮点。

source: 5:30 p.m. : Twenty-two-year-old Zac Posen holds a small preview of his spring show to be held on Thursday . There 's a camisole with pailettes the color of abalone shells , a celadon stretch leather bolero and a Grecian-style white cocktail dress made of silk ribbon appliqued onto chiffon . There will be no black on the runway this time , he says . I notice that other designers are also using less black than usual .
domestication: 五点半，二十二岁的扎克·波森举办了一个小型预览会，展示他将于周四举行的春季秀。整个秀场上，一件带有珠光的吊带背心吸引了众人的注意，颜色就像海螺壳一样闪耀，搭配上一件青绿色的弹力皮革马甲和一件用丝带贴花在薄纱上的希腊风格白色鸡尾酒礼服，看起来真是美轮美奂。扎克·波森说，这次秀场上不会出现黑色。细观其他设计师的作品，我发现他们这次也都较少使用黑色。
foreignization: 下午 5:30：二十二岁的 Zac Posen 举办了他将在星期四举行的春季秀的小型预览会。有一件带有六角星形亮片的吊带背心，亮片的颜色像鲍鱼壳，一件青绿色拉伸皮革开衫和一件希腊风格的白色鸡尾酒礼服，礼服是由丝带贴花到薄纱上制成的。他说，这次不会有黑色出现在T台上。我注意到其他设计师这次也用的黑色比平常少。

source: We ask around Baghdad for Ezzis , and ask them if they know of a Majed who was arrested by - or a Walid who worked for - the intelligence service . After several days , we have nothing . At times , our plan seems like driving around Germany just after World War II and asking people to help us find relatives who had been in the Gestapo . Increasingly disheartened , we drive an hour outside of Baghdad to a village called Tarmiya - the seat of the Ezzi tribe .
domestication: 在巴格达四处打听艾兹人，询问他们是否知道一个叫马杰德的人被情报机构逮捕，或者一个叫瓦利德的人曾在那里工作。几天过去了，我们一无所获。有时候，我们的计划就像二战后在德国开车，向人们寻求帮助，去找那些加入盖世太保的亲戚一样不可思议。我们越来越感到沮丧，就驱车一个小时到达巴格达郊外的一个叫塔米亚的村庄——那是艾兹部落的老巢。
foreignization: 我们在巴格达周围打听埃兹伊人，并且问他们是否知道一个叫马吉德的人被情报机构逮捕，或者一个叫瓦利德的人为情报机构工作。经过几天，我们一无所获。在某些时候，我们的计划就像是二战后开车在德国四处寻找人们，以便帮助我们找到那些曾经在盖世太保任职的亲戚一样。我们越来越感到沮丧，然后开车一个小时，到达了巴格达郊外的一个叫塔米亚的村庄——这是埃兹族的根据地。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

We ask around Baghdad for Ezzis , and ask them if they know of a Majed who was arrested by - or a Walid who worked for - the intelligence service . After several days , we have nothing . At times , our plan seems like driving around Germany just after World War II and asking people to help us find relatives who had been in the Gestapo . Increasingly disheartened , we drive an hour outside of Baghdad to a village called Tarmiya - the seat of the Ezzi tribe .

source: In Boise , Wehr introduced English handbell choirs . He conducted a regional premiere of Leonard Bernstein 's " " Chichester Psalms . " His adult choir sang such major choral works as George Fridric Handel 's Messiah and Johannes Brahms ' " " A German Requiem " with the city 's orchestra . source: Her push to be a Tony Blair-style reformer inside the Socialist party , and to move the party toward the center , was attacked by the intellectual left . Sources who know Royal say that by taking over the Socialist party with her domestic partner Francois Hollande , by introducing reforms , and by creating an innovative Internet registration rule last fall that gave her the nomination - she is a proven political heavyweight .
domestication: 她想在社会党内扮演托尼·布莱尔式的改革者，试图将党派拉向中间路线，却遭到了知识分子左派的攻击。了解罗亚尔的人说，她通过与其伴侣弗朗索瓦·奥朗德一起掌控社会党、推行改革，并去秋天推出了一项创新的互联网注册规定，从而获得提名——这一切都证明了她是一位政治上的强力人物。

source: " He planted thousands of Rambo apple trees in Pennsylvania , Ohio and Indiana in the 1800s , " said Joe Besecker , director emeritus of the Johnny Appleseed Museum . " The Rambo apple is a tart , cooking apple . It 's large and matures in August . The trees are tenacious , very hard to kill . It was very important to the settlers who used it to make apple butter , cider , pies , juice and apple vinegar . "
domestication: 19世纪的时候，他在宾夕法尼亚州、俄亥俄州和印第安纳州种下了成千上万棵拉姆博苹果树，”约翰尼·苹果种植博物馆的名誉馆长乔·贝塞克说，“拉姆博苹果是一种味道酸涩的烹饪苹果，个大，八月份就成熟了。这些苹果树非常顽强，很难被杀死。当时的拓荒者们非常需要它，他们用它来制作苹果酱、苹果酒、苹果派、苹果汁和苹果醋。

source: The sea change came in about 1970 , largely prompted by two men : Mr. Lear and James L. Brooks . True products of their era 's new cultural explicitness , they were the first to champion sitcoms as realistic , albeit deeply ironic , reflections of the human condition . In 1971 , Mr. Lear created " All in the Family , " which , in addition to attacking bigotry , limned topics like abortion , breast cancer and sexual fantasy . Although Mary Richards , the heroine Mr. Brooks created for " The Mary Tyler Moore Show , " was never shown puffing on a post-coital cigarette , it was understood that she sometimes had sex with the men she dated .
domestication: 大约在1970年，电视剧发生了翻天覆地的变化，主要是因为两个人：勒尔先生和詹姆斯·L·布鲁克斯。这两个人是那个时代新文化的产物，他们是第一个将情景喜剧看作是对人类生活的现实反映，尽管这种反映带有深刻的讽刺意味。在1971年，勒尔先生创作了《全家福》，除了批判偏见以外，还探讨了诸如堕胎、乳腺癌和性幻想等话题。虽然《玛丽·泰勒·摩尔秀》中的主人公玛丽·理查兹从来没有被描绘成在约会后吸烟的样子，但大家都理解她有时会与约会对象发生性关系。这是一个隐含的信息，电视剧不需要明确说明，观众也能明白其中的意思。这个时候的电视剧开始更加贴近生活现实，探讨一些社会问题和个人隐私，内容变得更加丰富和复杂。
foreignization: 大变革发生在1970年左右，很大程度上是由两个人促成的：勒尔先生和詹姆斯·L·布鲁克斯。在他们那个时代新的文化坦率的真正产物中，他们是第一个提倡情景喜剧作为对人类状况的现实主义、尽管深刻讽刺的反映的人。在1971年，勒尔先生创作了“全家福”，除了攻击偏见外，还涉及到诸如堕胎、乳腺癌和性幻想等话题。虽然“玛丽·泰勒·摩尔秀”中玛丽·理查兹，这位布鲁克斯先生创造的女英雄，从未被描绘成在性交后吸烟的样子，但人们都明白她有时会与约会的男人发生性关系。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

The sea change came in about 1970 , largely prompted by two men : Mr. Lear and James L. Brooks . True products of their era 's new cultural explicitness , they were the first to champion sitcoms as realistic , albeit deeply ironic , reflections of the human condition . In 1971 , Mr. Lear created " All in the Family , " which , in addition to attacking bigotry , limned topics like abortion , breast cancer and sexual fantasy . Although Mary Richards , the heroine Mr. Brooks created for " The Mary Tyler Moore Show , " was never shown puffing on a post-coital cigarette , it was understood that she sometimes had sex with the men she dated .

source: Chris Cofty , a former vice president with MediaOne Inc. , has been hired as a $ 55,000-a-year assistant to County Administrator Billy Beckett . Cofty will be handling special project projects initially , such as negotiating the county 's franchise agreements with cable television companies and overseeing a community relations program , but will be given direct control of some departments eventually , Beckett said .
domestication: 媒體一公司（MediaOne Inc.）前副總裁克里斯·科夫蒂（Chris Cofty）被聘為縣政主管比利·貝克特（Billy Beckett）的助理，每年薪水五萬五千美元。科夫蒂一開始負責一些特殊項目，例如與有線電視公司協商縣級特許協議、監督社區關係計畫等，但最終會被交付一些部門的直接控制權，貝克特表示。

source: At least a dozen electronics contract manufacturers - ranging from small firms like Compass to multibillion-dollar giants such as Solectron Corp . of Milpitas , Calif. - have been involved in piecework arrangements in the past year , a San Jose Mercury News investigation shows . Contract manufacturers build parts and systems for companies such as Hewlett-Packard Co. , Sun Microsystems Inc. and Cisco Systems Inc .
domestication: 近期，旧金山墨西哥湾区的一家报社——圣何塞信使报进行了一项调查，结果显示，至少有12家电子产品的代工厂都曾在过去一年里采用计件工资制，涉及到的公司从小型公司Compass到规模达数十亿美元的巨头Solectron Corp.等均有涉足。这些代工厂为包括惠普、阳光微系统和思科等公司制造电脑零部件和系统。
foreignization: 至少有十二家电子产品代工制造商-从像Compass这样的小公司到总部位于加利福尼亚州Milpitas的价值数十亿美元的巨头Solectron Corp. -过去一年里都参与了计件工作安排，一项由San Jose Mercury News进行的调查显示。 这些代工制造商为像Hewlett-Packard Co.、Sun Microsystems Inc. 和Cisco Systems Inc.这样的公司生产零部件和系统。

source: On Sunday , the Raptors ' Butch Carter and Sonics ' Paul Westphal refused to be miked , and both teams Monday were fined $ 100,000 . Jerry Sloan of the Jazz and Pat Riley of the Heat have moaned about the intrusion into their inner sanctum as if they were CIA operatives . The Manhattan Project did not merit the secrecy some league geniuses believe they deserve .
domestication: 星期天，猛龙队的巴奇·卡特和超音速队的保罗·韦斯法尔拒绝戴麦克风，被采访。第二天，两支球队每队都被罚款10万美元。不只他们两个，爵士队的杰里·斯隆和热火队的帕特·莱利也抱怨说这样会侵犯到他们的私人空间，就像他们是中情局的间谍一样。他们好像以为自己在研制原子弹，需要保密一样，真是荒唐！
foreignization: 星期日，猛龙队的巴奇·卡特和声响队的保罗·韦斯法尔拒绝佩戴麦克风，于是两支球队在星期一被罚款10万美元。爵士队的杰里·斯隆和热火队的帕特·莱利抱怨打扰了他们的内殿，就好像他们是中央情报局的特工一样。曼哈顿计划也没有得到一些联赛天才认为他们值得的保密。

source: Retailers that target consumers with more moderate incomes are selling pieces of the dream , too . Wal-Mart stocks stainless steel appliances , Sears markets Bosch dishwashers , Home Depot displays granite slabs in its parking lots , and Expo Design Center recently added laminate countertops in granite , concrete and limestone patterns .

source: Memphis was the first major city to answer President Bush 's call to become an " America 2000 " community by drawing up a plan to fix its schools . Slowly and laboriously , parents , educators , business leaders and civil rights advocates are working to build sturdy coalitions for change . To win agreement , they have already had to jettison one of Mr. Bush 's key planks -- public money for private schools -- and add several different goals to make Mr. Bush 's plan their own .
domestication: 美国总统布什号召全美各地建设“2000年美国社区”，而孟菲斯是第一个响应的主要城市，他们制定了一个全面计划来整顿当地的教育。父母、教育工作者、企业领袖和民权倡导者正逐步艰难地合作，建立牢固的改革联盟。为了取得共识，他们不得不放弃布什先生的一个关键主张——使用公款资助私立学校，并加入了几个不同的目标，使布什的计划真正成为他们自己的计划。在孟菲斯，这个计划不再只是空头支票，而是有了具体的实施方案，体现了社区的智慧和决心。
foreignization: 孟菲斯是第一个响应布什总统号召成为“美国2000”社区的主要城市，通过制定计划来解决学校问题。缓慢而艰难地，家长、教育工作者、商界领袖和民权倡导者正在努力建立牢固的改革联盟。为了达成协议，他们已经不得不放弃布什先生的一个关键主张——为私立学校提供公共资金——并添加了几个不同的目标，使布什先生的计划成为他们自己的。

source: Dwares also has developed a training manual on Social Security cases and trains other lawyers . He sits on Whitman-Walker 's legal services committee , and according to staff lawyer Philip Fornaci , Dwares 's " enthusiasm has attracted other firms " to tackle this dry , thankless work . Fornaci also commended Dwares 's habit , one he has passed on to others , to visit each client at his home . " These attorneys make six-figure incomes , " said Fornaci . " They are not used to going to areas like Southeast or dealing with a really sick person . " But , said Fornaci , Dwares insists a home visit is vital to gain the client 's trust and to present each case more effectively to a judge .
domestication: 杜瓦尔斯不仅自己接手社会保障案件，还编写了相关培训手册并培训其他律师。他是惠特曼-沃克法律服务委员会的成员，根据工作人员律师菲利普·福纳西的说法，杜瓦尔斯的“热情吸引了其他公司”来承担这项枯燥无味、没什么回报的工作。福纳西还称赞杜瓦尔斯的一个习惯，就是去每个客户家中拜访，这个习惯他也传给了其他人。“这些律师的年薪六位数，”福纳西说，“他们不习惯去像东南部这样的地方，也不习惯处理真正生病的人。”但是，福纳西说，杜瓦尔斯坚持认为家访对于获得客户的信任和更有效地向法官提出案件至关重要。杜瓦尔斯这种做法，换来了客户的感激和尊重，也让同行钦佩有加。他的这种精神，不仅提高了自己，也影响了其他律师，为社会带来了积极的影响。
foreignization: Dwares 还编写了一本有关社会保障案件的培训手册，并培训其他律师。他是惠特曼-沃克法律服务委员会的成员，根据工作人员律师菲利普·福纳奇的说法，Dwares 的“热情吸引了其他公司”来处理这项枯燥、没有报酬的工作。福纳奇还赞扬了 Dwares 的习惯，这是他传给别人的，去每个客户的家里看望他们。福纳奇说：“这些律师赚六位数的收入，他们不习惯去东南部这样的地区或者处理真正生病的人。”但是，福纳奇说，Dwares 坚持认为，家庭访问对于获得客户的信任和更有效地向法官提出每个案件至关重要。

" They are not used to going to areas like Southeast or dealing with a really sick person . " But , said Fornaci , Dwares insists a home visit is vital to gain the client 's trust and to present each case more effectively to a judge .

source: The Chronicle 's Food department compared four recipes and found that if we played with the proportions of body to claw or leg meat , we got a lump-kind of texture . Picked crabmeat is available in three mixtures -- all leg meat ; 60 percent body meat and 40 percent leg meat ; or 45 percent body , 45 percent broken leg meat and 10 percent leg meat . We found that a mix of straight leg meat with mixed meat created a whole-meat texture .
domestication: 报纸的美食版块比较了四种食谱，发现如果我们改变蟹肉和蟹腿肉的比例，就会得到一种团状的口感。拣好的蟹肉有三种混合方式：全部是蟹腿肉；或者是60%的蟹身肉和40%的蟹腿肉；或者是45%的蟹身肉，45%的断蟹腿肉和10%的完整蟹腿肉。我们发现，用纯蟹腿肉和混合肉制作，可以做出整块蟹肉的口感。
foreignization: The Chronicle 的食品部门比较了四种食谱，发现如果我们改变身体和蟹爪或腿肉的比例，我们会得到一种块状质地。拣好的蟹肉有三种混合方式可供选择：全部都是腿肉；体肉占60%，腿肉占40%；或者体肉占45%，破碎的腿肉占45%，腿肉占10%。我们发现，将直腿肉与混合肉结合可以制作出整块肉的质地。

source: A : This " Contract With America " is a serious issue because the first item is that they want to take over and assume control of Hetch Hetchy and take $ 25 million a year for the next five years , which would be $ 125 million of revenue from Hetch Hetchy that goes into our general fund every year .

source: Fitzgibbons , 51 , left the AFL-CIO in 1988 to become the committee 's communications director , then jumped to deputy staff director from 1992 to 2000 , before joining DaimlerChrysler 's Washington office as director of public policy . In his days on the committee , Fitzgibbons helped map out Dingell 's myriad investigations , especially on defense and energy issues .
domestication: 菲茨吉本斯（Fitzgibbons），51岁，1988年离开AFL-CIO，成为委员会的传播总监，随后在1992年至2000年间担任副工作总监，之后加入戴姆勒克莱斯勒（DaimlerChrysler）的华盛顿办事处，出任公共政策总监。在他担任委员会职务期间，菲茨吉本斯帮助制定了众多调查计划，尤其是在国防和能源问题上，为丁格尔（Dingell）提供了重要支持。可以说，他是丁格尔的得力助手，在关键时刻发挥了重要作用。

source: As we lie there , I often fall asleep wondering what he 'll really remember of all this , how he 'll remember his father after all the secrets we 've shared , his secrets and mine - about my fears , my disappointments , my doubts and dreams , all the things I 've always wanted to do but never have and , maybe never will . And I wonder what kind of man he 'll be .
domestication: 我躺在那里，常常沉入睡眠，想知道他到底会记住这其中的多少，之后又会如何记得他的父亲。我们分享过那么多秘密，他的和我的——关于我的恐惧、失望、疑虑和梦想，我一直想做但从未做成的事情，也许永远都不会做成。而我还想知道，他长大后会变成什么样的人。
foreignization: 当我们躺在那里，我常常在思考他到底会记住这些的哪些，怎样记住他的父亲在我们分享所有秘密之后，他的秘密和我的——关于我的恐惧、失望、疑虑和梦想，我一直想要做但从未做过的事情，以及我也许永远不会做的事情。而且我想知道他将会成为什么样的人。

source: I 'm still no opera lover -- but that voice . . . The force of that voice was something else . It soothed and caressed , but it haunted , and it seemed to have limitless power . Someone said that upon hearing Barbara Jordan address the Democratic National Convention recently , they thought they were hearing the voice of God . These folks apparently never heard Marian Anderson . That deep , passionate voice had to be like the voice Moses heard on that mountain .
domestication: 我仍然不是歌剧爱好者，但那声音……那声音的力量真令人叹为观止。它既能抚慰人心，又能深深打动人心灵，似乎具有无穷的力量。有人说最近在民主党全国代表大会上听了芭芭拉·乔丹的演讲后，感觉就像是在听上帝的声音。很显然，这些人从没听过玛丽安·安德森的歌声。那低沉而充满激情的声音一定就像摩西在山上听到的上帝的声音一样令人肃然起敬。
foreignization: 我仍然不是歌剧爱好者 —— 但是那种声音 …… 那种声音的力量却是完全不同的东西 。 它抚慰人并轻轻地抚摸着人们 ， 但是它也困扰着人们 ， 而且似乎拥有无限的力量 。 有人说 ， 最近他们听了芭芭拉·乔丹在民主党全国代表大会上的演讲后 ， 他们以为自己正在听到上帝的声音 。 很明显 ， 这些人从来没有听过玛丽安·安德森的歌声 。 那低沉而充满激情的嗓音一定就像摩西在那座山上听到的声音一样 。

These folks apparently never heard Marian Anderson . That deep , passionate voice had to be like the voice Moses heard on that mountain .

source: There are still others . There 's still the possibility of Quentin Kopp , who keeps talking about it . There 's a possibility of ( City Attorney ) Louise Renne running ; they 're out there testing the water . Of course I have concerns about Louise because of the people she 's hired in the past six months . She has a tremendous number of people ( in her office ) who are politically astute but not so much city attorneys . She 's building a team in there that is much more ( prepared ) for a campaign than it is for settling law cases .
domestication: 别说了，还有其他人呢。昆汀·科普一直在谈论此事，他仍然有可能参选。市律师路易斯·雷内也有可能参加竞选，他们现在正在试探水温。不过，我对路易斯还是有点担心，因为最近六个月里，她聘请了一些不太令人放心的人。她办公室里虽然有一大批精明能干的人，但更多的是擅长政治而不是打官司的类型。她正在组建一个团队，更加注重竞选活动而不是解决法律案件。

source: Ms. Lampkin 's principal complaint was reflex sympathetic dystrophy -- pain without underlying cause , the sort of phantom limb pain amputees sometimes suffer . She had broken her neck in a motorcycle accident when she was 23 , but it did not affect her until she was 47 , and since then she had had several surgeries . Now , at 53 , she felt numbness along her right cheek down to her first two toes . " I feel a burning sensation and a tingling , " she said . " I feel like I 've been electrocuted . "
domestication: 兰普金小姐的主要抱怨是反射性交感神经失调，这是一种没有根本原因的疼痛，就像截肢者有时会遭受的幻肢痛一样。她23岁时在摩托车事故中摔断了脖子，但直到47岁才开始影响她，此后她又进行了几次手术。现在53岁的她感到从右脸颊一直到大脚趾的无力感。“我感到灼热和麻刺，”她说。“我觉得自己被电击了。”
foreignization: 兰普金女士的主要抱怨是反射性交感性 muscle 痛 - 没有潜在原因的疼痛，这是截肢者有时会遭受的幻肢痛的一种。她在23岁时因摩托车事故折断了颈部，但直到47岁时才开始感到影响，从那时起她已经做了几次手术。现在，53岁的她感觉到了从右脸颊一直到第一、二脚趾的麻木感。“我感觉到一种灼热感和刺痛，”她说。“我感觉好像被电击了一样。”

source: Market turbulence puts new pressure on the Federal Reserve to produce a major interest rate cut when it meets Tuesday . For now , most Fed-watchers say , policymakers are likely to produce another half-point cut -- substantial compared with the Fed 's preferred quarter-point moves , but no bigger than the two half-point cuts the Fed made in January , which have yet to deliver measurable benefits .
domestication: 市场的动荡给美联储带来了新的压力，要求他们在星期二会议上出台大幅降息的措施。目前，大多数观察家认为，决策者可能会实施再次的半个百分点的降息，这相对于美联储偏爱的四分之一百分点的调整来说是很大的，但与美联储一月份实施的两次半个百分点的降息并无不同，而后者至今尚未见到实质性的效果。说白了，大家都在拭目以待，想看看美联储这次会不会有所作为。
foreignization: 市场动荡给美联储在周二会议上施加了新的压力，要求其出台大幅降息措施。目前，多数观察人士认为，政策制定者可能会实施又一次半个百分点的降息——相比美联储偏爱的季度百分点调整，这是一个实质性的举动，但并不比一月份美联储实施的两次半个百分点的降息更大，而这些降息措施尚未带来可衡量的收益。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Market turbulence puts new pressure on the Federal Reserve to produce a major interest rate cut when it meets Tuesday . For now , most Fed-watchers say , policymakers are likely to produce another half-point cut -- substantial compared with the Fed 's preferred quarter-point moves , but no bigger than the two half-point cuts the Fed made in January , which have yet to deliver measurable benefits .
市场的动荡给美联储带来了新的压力，要求他们在星期二会议上出台大幅降息的措施。目前，大多数观察家认为，决策者可能会实施再次的半个百分点的降息，这相对于美联储偏爱的四分之一百分点的调整来说是很大的，但与美联储一月份实施的两次半个百分点的降息并无不同，而后者至今尚未见到实质性的效果。说白了，大家都在拭目以待，想看看美联储这次会不会有所作为。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Market turbulence puts new pressure on the Federal Reserve to produce a major interest rate cut when it meets Tuesday . For now , most Fed-watchers say , policymakers are likely to produce another half-point cut -- substantial compared with the Fed 's preferred quarter-point moves , but no bigger than the two half-point cuts the Fed made in January , which have yet to deliver measurable benefits .
市场动荡给美联储在周二会议上施加了新的压力，要求其出台大幅降息措施。目前，多数观察人士认为，政策制定者可能会实施又一次半个百分点的降息——相比美联储偏爱的季度百分点调整，这是一个实质性的举动，但并不比一月份美联储实施的两次半个百分点的降息更大，而这些降息措施尚未带来可衡量的收益。

source: Charles Johnson , a blogger in Los Angeles with an expertise in typography , suspected forgery : The documents looked too contemporary . He typed one of the memos into a Microsoft Word document - using the program 's default settings - and found that the CBS documents were an exact match . He sent Power Line a link to his findings at LittleGreenFootballs.com .
domestication: 洛杉矶的一位博客作者查尔斯·约翰逊精通字体学，怀疑这些文件是伪造的，因为它们看起来太现代化了。他在微软Word中输入了一份备忘录，使用默认设置，发现CBS的文件与之完全一致。他将自己的发现发布到了LittleGreenFootballs.com，并将链接发给了Power Line。结果显示，这些文件确实有问题，事情开始变得耐人寻味起来。

source: Graham uses several brands of chocolate , Valrhona and Callebaut among them . For the tempering demonstration , he poured melted chocolate onto a marble-topped table . It oozed freely onto the surface and spread into a puddle . Using an 8-inch stainless steel scraper available at hardware stores , he pushed the chocolate over the marble to lower the temperature of the lovely goo .
domestication: 格雷厄姆用了好几种巧克力品牌，其中就有瓦洛纳和卡伯乐两大名牌。为了展示调温巧克力的过程，他把熔化的巧克力倒在了大理石台面上。巧克力自由地流淌到表面，渐渐变成了一摊。格雷厄姆利用一把八英寸不锈钢刮刀，这种东西在五金店随便都能买到，把巧克力推过大理石，降低了美味糊状物的温度。他一边做，一边说，这样可以让巧克力冷却到合适的温度。

source: Mr. Clinton 's partisans say the President reminded Americans at the height of the Republican Revolution of what they value in Government . Noting that the Republicans have moderated their tone on issues like education and the environment , Vice President Al Gore said , " It 's a measure of how far President Clinton has come in defining not only the Democratic Party but also the center of gravity in our country . "
domestication: 克林顿的支持者说，总统在共和党革命如火如荼之时，提醒美国人政府应该具备什么样的价值观。由于共和党对教育和环保等问题的立场有所缓和，副总统戈尔说：“这说明了克林顿总统在定义民主党和国家政治中心方面取得了多大的成就。” 克林顿的支持者认为，在共和党革命如火如荼的时候，总统提醒美国人政府应该具备什么样的价值观。同时，共和党对一些问题的态度也变得温和了，比如说教育和环保。副总统戈尔说，这说明克林顿总统不仅让大家清楚了民主党的主张，也让大家知道了国家政治的重心到底在哪里。这既是对克林顿的肯定，也是对共和党的讽刺，嘲笑他们现在的主张不过是抄袭民主党的作业罢了。
foreignization: 克林顿先生的拥护者说，总统在共和党革命鼎盛时期提醒美国人他们在政府中珍视什么。提到共和党人已对诸如教育和环境等问题的语气有所缓和，副总统阿尔·戈尔说：“这是一个衡量标准，表明克林顿总统不仅定义了民主党，还定义了我们国家的中心重力，已经走了多远。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

"

source: As for the pirate skiffs themselves , they are usually kept for evidence in potential prosecution . The only time when they are destroyed is when there is insufficient evidence to prosecute but enough suspicious paraphernalia like ladders , weapons or hooks to warrant dumping the occupants back on land and destroying the boat .
domestication: 至于海盗的快艇，他们通常会被保存作为证据以备可能的起诉。只有当没有足够的证据来起诉，但却有足够的可疑物品，如梯子、武器或钩子，才会将船员送回陆地并摧毁这艘船。这就像俗话说的“旁证充分”，虽然没有确凿的证据，但种种迹象表明这艘船很可能是用于海盗活动。因此，为了避免他们继续作乱，就会将船员遣返并销毁船只。
foreignization: 至于海盗小船本身，它们通常会作为潜在检控的证据而保留。它们被销毁的时候是指当没有足够的证据来起诉，但有足够可疑的随身物品，如梯子、武器或钩子，从而将乘客送回陆地并销毁该船只的时候。

source: Blumenfeld was born in Berlin on the eve of the birthday of the Kaiser , whom he described as a " mustachioed Majesty ( Court barber Haby marketed his patent mustache-trainer under the name ' Mission Accomplished ' ) with the permanent expression of a child in a huff . In those days the whole world was in a permanent huff . A ham with a passion for dressing up , a partial cripple with the historic mission of brandishing his gilded field marshal 's baton and leading the world toward the glorious days of Herr Hitler : mission accomplished ! "
domestication: 布鲁门费尔德出生在柏林，正值德皇的生日前夕，他形容德皇是一个“胡须威严的陛下（宫廷理发师哈比以“任务完成”之名推销他的专利胡子训练器）”，脸上总带着一副小孩子撅嘴的表情。那时候整个世界都是一副怒气冲天的样子。一个喜欢打扮的火腿，一个部分瘸痪的人，有着挥舞镀金元帅权杖、引领世界走向希特勒辉煌时代的历史使命：任务完成！这位德皇算是成功地完成了自己的使命吧。

source: " I thought they would get me , instead of the president , " he told his Justice Department press aide , Edwin Guthman , as they walked back and forth on the backyard lawn at Hickory Hill on the afternoon of Nov. 22 . Guthman and others around Bobby that day thought " they " might be coming for the younger Kennedy next . So apparently did Bobby . Normally opposed to tight security measures -- " Kennedys do n't need bodyguards , " he had said with typical brashness -- he allowed his aides to summon federal marshals , who quickly surrounded his estate .
domestication: 当天下午，鲍勃和他的司法部新闻助手埃德温·古斯曼在海鹰山的后院草坪上来回踱步时，他说：“我以为他们会来抓我，而不是总统。”古斯曼和其他围绕在鲍勃身边的人都觉得“他们”可能会下一个来对付这个年轻的肯尼迪。看起来鲍勃也有这种感觉。尽管他平时反对严密的安保措施——他曾经带着一贯的傲气说过，“肯尼迪不需要保镖”，但这次他还是允许他的助手们叫来了联邦法警，很快就将他的庄园围了起来。
foreignization: “ 我以为他们会抓我，而不是总统， ” 他告诉他的司法部新闻助手埃德温·古斯曼，当时他们正在11月22日下午在黑山的后院草坪上来回走。古斯曼和那天周围的其他人以为 “ 他们 ” 可能会来找小肯尼迪。很明显，小肯尼也是这么认为的。通常反对严格的安全措施 —— “ 肯尼迪不需要保镖， ” 他曾经以典型的大胆态度说 —— 他允许他的助手召唤联邦警官，他们迅速包围了他的庄园。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" I thought they would get me , instead of the president , " he told his Justice Department press aide , Edwin Guthman , as they walked back and forth on the backyard lawn at Hickory Hill on the afternoon of Nov. 22 . Guthman and others around Bobby that day thought " they " might be coming for the younger Kennedy next . So apparently did Bobby . Normally opposed to tight security measures -- " Kennedys do n't need bodyguards , " he had said with typical brashness -- he allowed his aides to summon federal marshals , who quickly surrounded his estate .
当天下午，鲍勃和他的司法部新闻助手埃德温·古斯曼在海鹰山的后院草坪上来回踱步时，他说：“我以为他们会来抓我，而不是总统。”古斯曼和其他围绕在鲍勃身边的人都觉得“他们”可能会下一个来对付这个年轻的肯尼迪。看起来鲍勃也有这种感觉。尽管他平时反对严密的安保措施——他曾经带着一贯的傲气说过，“肯尼迪不需要保镖”，但这次他还是允许他的助手们叫来了联邦法警，很快就将他的庄园围了起来。

Guthman and others around Bobby that day thought " they " might be coming for the younger Kennedy next . So apparently did Bobby . Normally opposed to tight security measures -- " Kennedys do n't need bodyguards , " he had said with typical brashness -- he allowed his aides to summon federal marshals , who quickly surrounded his estate .
“ 我以为他们会抓我，而不是总统， ” 他告诉他的司法部新闻助手埃德温·古斯曼，当时他们正在11月22日下午在黑山的后院草坪上来回走。古斯曼和那天周围的其他人以为 “ 他们 ” 可能会来找小肯尼迪。很明显，小肯尼也是这么认为的。通常反对严格的安全措施 —— “ 肯尼迪不需要保镖， ” 他曾经以典型的大胆态度说 —— 他允许他的助手召唤联邦警官，他们迅速包围了他的庄园。

source: Not everyone on the battlefield may be as well versed in handling DU , Dr. Kilpatrick said , noting that his greater concern is DU 's chemical toxicity , not its radioactivity : " What we worry about like lead in paint in housing areas - children picking it up and eating it or licking it - getting it on their hands and ingesting it . "

source: Whether or not they are thirsty for blood is irrelevant , because their positioning automatically raises the level of tension in the atmosphere . Why , I wonder , are n't they walking around in the crowds in pairs , protecting people from pickpockets ? So I am not surprised , only disgusted , when I open The Denver Post the next day to find that the inevitable has happened . The police have panicked over a gridlock on Federal , donned riot gear and broken up the party .
domestication: 他们是不是有暴力倾向已经不重要了，因为他们的出现就已经让现场气氛紧张起来。奇怪的是，他们为什么不成双成对地在人群中巡逻，保护人们免受扒窃？所以当我第二天打开《丹佛邮报》看到不可避免的事情发生时，我并不感到意外，只是感到恶心。警察们因为联邦大道的交通堵塞而惊慌失措，穿上防暴装备并强行驱散了聚会的人群。

source: Both Mrs. Clinton and Mr. Trump helped accentuate each other 's best and worst arguments . If you were running as a battering-ram outsider like Mr. Trump , it would be hard to invent a better contrast than the Secretary of Same ; if you were running as a safe and familiar grown-up like Mrs. Clinton , who better than Mr. Trump to embody the volatile opposite ?
domestication: 希拉里和特朗普互相成就了对方的优点和缺点。如果你像特朗普一样，以一匹脱缰的野马的姿态参选，那么比起克林顿夫人这个“常规之人”，再也找不到更鲜明的对比了；如果你像希拉里一样，以一个稳妥而又熟悉的政治家姿态参选，那么还有谁能比特朗普更好地体现出那种反面的、暴躁的形象呢？
foreignization: 克林顿夫人和特朗普先生都帮助对方强调了彼此最好的和最坏的论点。如果你像特朗普先生一样作为一名冲撞者参选，将很难想出比国务卿更好的对比；如果你像克林顿夫人一样作为一个安全和熟悉的大人参选，谁比特朗普先生更能体现出易变的对立面？

source: It will break no news and spoil nobody 's fun to note that McKay is not a fan of his protagonist . His argument is essentially that much of what critics of the current president fear most -- the erosion of democratic norms ; the manufacture of " alternative facts " ; the rise of an authoritarian executive branch -- already came to pass when George W. Bush was in office . But " Vice " offers more than Yuletide rage-bait for liberal moviegoers , who already have plenty to be mad about . Revulsion and admiration lie as close together as the red and white stripes on the American flag , and if this is in some respects a real-life monster movie , it 's one that takes a lively and at times surprisingly sympathetic interest in its chosen demon .
domestication: 没必要大惊小怪地说，麦凯并不太喜欢自己的主角。他的论点基本上是说，现在很多人对现任总统最担心的事情——民主规范的侵蚀，“另类事实”的制造，专制行政部门的崛起——在乔治·W·布什执政时期就已经发生了。但《副总统》不仅仅是一部让自由派观众在圣诞节愤怒的电影，这些人已经有足够多的事情可以生气了。厌恶和钦佩就像美国国旗上的红白条纹一样密切相连，如果这部电影在某种程度上是一部真实的怪物电影，那么它对选定的恶魔表现出了活跃和有时令人惊讶的同情。
foreignization: 指出麦凯不是他主角的粉丝不会有任何新闻价值，也不会破坏任何人的乐趣。 他基本上认为很多人最害怕的现任总统所带来的问题——民主规范的侵蚀，“另类事实”的制造，专制行政部门的崛起——在乔治·W·布什执政期间就已经发生了。但是“副总统”为自由派电影观众提供的不仅仅是圣诞节的愤怒诱发点，他们已经有足够多的理由生气。厌恶和钦佩就像美国国旗上的红白条纹一样紧密相连，如果从某些方面来说这是一部真实的怪物电影，那么它就是对所选择的恶魔产生了生动的、有时令人惊讶的同情。

Bush was in office . But " Vice " offers more than Yuletide rage-bait for liberal moviegoers , who already have plenty to be mad about . Revulsion and admiration lie as close together as the red and white stripes on the American flag , and if this is in some respects a real-life monster movie , it 's one that takes a lively and at times surprisingly sympathetic interest in its chosen demon .

source: But his sauerkraut tout made me a fan . Any Houston waiter bold enough to proselytize for snapper on a bed of pickled cabbage and fennel - a maritime riff on Alsatian choucroute - was a man after my own heart . So , I hoped , was a chef who would dare to serve it in a town where the bankable bet would be a lemon-butter treatment with crab or shrimp on top .
domestication: 不过，那个小伙子对德国酸菜的宣传让我很佩服。在休斯顿，这样的伙计居然大胆地推荐以腌白菜和茴香为底料的红鲷鱼——这可算是阿尔萨斯式酸菜炖肉的海鲜版——这简直就是我的心头好。所以，我希望厨师也能敢于在这个地方提供这样的菜品，而不是选择更保守的柠檬黄油酱加蟹肉或虾仁的做法，因为后者才是大家都喜欢吃的。
foreignization: 但他的德国酸菜推销让我成为粉丝。 任何一个足够大胆的休斯顿服务员，能宣扬在泡菜和茴香床上端上红鲷鱼——这是在阿尔萨斯式卷心菜上添加的一种海洋风味——对我来说就是一个有理想的人。 所以，我希望，敢于在城镇上端上这种菜肴的厨师也是如此，在那里，将柠檬黄油涂抹在螃蟹或虾上才是稳赚不赔的选择。

But his sauerkraut tout made me a fan . Any Houston waiter bold enough to proselytize for snapper on a bed of pickled cabbage and fennel - a maritime riff on Alsatian choucroute - was a man after my own heart . So , I hoped , was a chef who would dare to serve it in a town where the bankable bet would be a lemon-butter treatment with crab or shrimp on top .
不过，那个小伙子对德国酸菜的宣传让我很佩服。在休斯顿，这样的伙计居然大胆地推荐以腌白菜和茴香为底料的红鲷鱼——这可算是阿尔萨斯式酸菜炖肉的海鲜版——这简直就是我的心头好。所以，我希望厨师也能敢于在这个地方提供这样的菜品，而不是选择更保守的柠檬黄油酱加蟹肉或虾仁的做法，因为后者才是大家都喜欢吃的。

source: BackWeb Technologies Inc. , a San Jose company that got its feet wet creating channels from consumer-oriented Web content , has followed Marimba 's footsteps and entered the software-distribution business . Late last year , the company signed a deal with McAfee Associates , the Santa Clara company known for anti-virus software .

source: 14 . MORGAN PARK : There is n't a lot of size , but the Mustangs , who have become regulars in the city 's Final Four , are as athletic as any team . Morgan Park will challenge in the Red-South with seniors Shawntay Williams and 6-foot Monica Richardson . Sophomores Camille Williams and Jasmine Moore gained valuable experience last season and will start . A newcomer to watch is freshman Constance Jinks .

source: If insurers expected a teaching hospital like St. Luke's-Roosevelt to groom a generation of doctors willing to obey the managed-care mantra , that did not seem to be happening . In the course of their year , all three of the interns , while appreciating some of the waste excised from medicine , had become of a piece in their increasing resistance to cost pressures and managed care .
domestication: 如果保险公司指望像圣路加-罗斯福医院这样的教学医院能够培养出一代听命于管理式医疗理念的医生，那么这种情况似乎并没有发生。在实习过程中，三个实习医生尽管对医疗行业的一些浪费进行了削减表示赞赏，但他们都逐渐抵制成本压力和管理式医疗，形成了一种共识。他们越来越反对那种为了省钱而影响医疗质量的做法。
foreignization: 如果保险公司期望像圣路加-罗斯福医院这样的教学医院能够培养一代愿意遵循管理式医疗理念的医生，那么这种情况似乎并没有发生。在他们的实习过程中，所有三个实习医生虽然在一定程度上赞赏从医学中剔除了某些浪费，但他们对成本压力和管理式医疗的抵制态度逐渐变得一致。

If insurers expected a teaching hospital like St. Luke's-Roosevelt to groom a generation of doctors willing to obey the managed-care mantra , that did not seem to be happening . In the course of their year , all three of the interns , while appreciating some of the waste excised from medicine , had become of a piece in their increasing resistance to cost pressures and managed care .

source: Despite the decades of distance , the worst part still was watching the assassination . She was in the Audubon Ballroom that day in 1965 with her daughters . When the first of 16 bullets hit Malcolm X , she threw her four children on the wooden floor and covered them with her body . " It was the realization that I could n't take him home , " she says of the replay of that finality . " Mentally you do understand realistically that he is dead , dead for 27 years and not coming back . Instinctually your wish to take him home is stronger than reality . "
domestication: 尽管过去了几十年，但最痛苦的还是那次暗杀。1965年，她带着女儿们在奥杜邦舞厅（Audubon Ballroom）目睹了那一幕。当第一颗子弹击中马尔科姆·X时，她急忙将四个孩子按倒在地板上，用身体护住他们。“直到现在，我仍然无法接受事实，”她说，“你理智上知道他已经死了，死了27年，不可能回来了。但是骨子里，你还是希望能把他带回家，强过一切现实。”
foreignization: 尽管已经过去了几十年，但最糟糕的部分仍然是看着那场暗杀事件。她当时和她的女儿们一起在1965年的奥杜邦舞厅。当十六颗子弹中的第一颗击中马尔科姆·X时，她把四个孩子推到木地板上，用身体护住他们。关于重温那一刻的绝望，她说：“我意识到我无法把他带回家。心理上，你理性地明白他已经死了，死了27年，不会再回来。但是，出于本能，你希望把他带回家的愿望比现实更强烈。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Despite the decades of distance , the worst part still was watching the assassination . She was in the Audubon Ballroom that day in 1965 with her daughters . When the first of 16 bullets hit Malcolm X , she threw her four children on the wooden floor and covered them with her body . " It was the realization that I could n't take him home , " she says of the replay of that finality . " Mentally you do understand realistically that he is dead , dead for 27 years and not coming back . Instinctually your wish to take him home is stronger than reality . "

source: Whisk the dissolved gelatin mixture into the syrup . Whisking continuously , gradually pour this mixture onto the stiffly beaten egg whites . If using an electric mixer , turn the machine on and continue to whisk . If whisking by hand , continue until the marshmallow mixture is a white opaque mass that is thick enough to hold its shape .
domestication: 好了，现在就来把刚才熔化的明胶混合物倒入糖浆中，一边倒一边搅拌，这样混合均匀比较容易。然后，你还得继续不停地搅拌，慢慢地往刚才打发好的蛋白上面倒这个混合物。如果你用电动搅拌器，就打开机器继续搅拌，如果是手动搅拌，那么你就得一直搅拌到棉花糖混合物变得白乎乎的一大块，变得浓稠到能保持自己的形状。

source: Le Titi de Paris , 1015 W. Dundee , Arlington Heights . Chef/owner Paul Pollin and chef de cuisine Michael Maddox will offer a series of classes beginning Sept. 15 . Classes start at noon . The cost is $60 and includes lunch . A special wine class will be offered for $75 and will include a six-course dinner . Call ( 847 ) 506-0222 .
domestication: 在阿灵顿高地有一家叫做“巴黎小歌手”的餐厅，地址是1015 W. Dundee。老板兼主厨保罗·波林和主厨迈克尔·马多克斯将从9月15日开始举办一系列的烹饪班，所有课程都从中午12点开始。每次课的费用是60美元，包括午餐。另外，他们还会开设一门特别的葡萄酒品鉴课，收费75美元，包括六道菜的晚餐。如果你感兴趣，可以拨打电话(847) 506-0222预订。

source: This rift can be easily amended if we come together and continue to focus on what is the real issue - racism and prejudice in this country . We have too many things in common ; blacks and Jews have suffered too many atrocities in this country and abroad . We are going down the wrong road if we do not show an alliance . Our survival is based on each other 's strength .
domestication: 我们之间的隔阂其实很容易弥补，只要我们团结起来，继续关注真正的问题——这个国家的种族歧视和偏见。黑人和犹太人有太多的共同点，我们都遭受过太多的不公正对待，无论是在国内还是国外。如果我们不能团结一致，就会走向错误的道路。我们的生存取决于彼此的力量。我们需要相互支持，携手应对挑战，而不是让差异拆散我们。只有这样，我们才能真正地战胜种族歧视和偏见，创造一个更加公平的社会。
foreignization: 这种鸿沟可以很容易地弥合，如果我们团结起来，继续专注于真正的问题——这个国家的种族主义和偏见。我们有太多共同点；黑人和犹太人在这个国家和国外遭受了太多暴行。如果我们不表现出联盟，我们将走向错误的道路。我们的生存是基于彼此的力量。

source: Canada May Have Found Cold War ' Lost Nuke ' : A Canadian diver off British Columbia spotted a metal object underwater so bizarre he thought it might be a UFO -- until an old-timer said , " Oh , you might have found that bomb . " He was referring to a Mark IV bomb dumped by a US jet in 1950 when it crashed while on a simulated nuclear bombing run . The Canadian Navy is checking it out , but this " nuke " is likely harmless .
domestication: 加拿大可能发现了“冷战遗物”——一名潜水员在不列颠哥伦比亚省海岸发现一个奇怪的金属物体，以至于他怀疑那可能是来自外太空的飞行物，直到一位老年人说：“哦，你可能找到了那枚炸弹。” 这位老年人所指的是1950年时，一架美国战机进行核轰炸演习时坠毁，将一枚Mark IV炸弹丢入大海。 加拿大海军正在进行调查，但这枚“核弹”可能已经失去威力。
foreignization: 加拿大可能已经找到了冷战时期“丢失”的核弹：一名加拿大潜水员在不列颠哥伦比亚省海岸附近发现了一个金属物体，看起来非常奇怪，他以为可能是飞碟——直到一位老人说，“哦，你可能找到了那枚炸弹。”他指的是1950年美国一架战机在进行模拟核轰炸任务时坠毁后丢弃的一枚马克四号炸弹。加拿大海军正在调查，但这枚“核弹”可能是无害的。

source: The closest thing to a ranking of business schools ' ethics programs is a semiannual survey by the Aspen Institute and the World Resources Institute , both nonprofits . The survey , Beyond Grey Pinstripes , ranks schools based on their commitment to social responsibility and environmental protection .
domestication: 在商学院的道德课程排名方面，有一份半年一度的调查最接近于排名，它是由非营利组织阿斯彭研究所和世界资源研究所联合进行的。这项名为《灰色条纹以外》的调查根据商学院对社会责任和环境保护的承诺来对其进行排名。
foreignization: 最接近商学院道德项目排名的是亚斯彭研究所和世界资源研究所这两个非营利组织的半年调查。该调查《超越灰色条纹》，根据商学院对社会责任和环境保护承诺的情况对它们进行排名。

source: Single women who are financially stable enough to buy their own homes are attracted to Woodland Park . For them , it offers gated security , limited access points , guards and managers on duty and a maintenance and landscaping staff . Single women in their late 30s and early 40s are buying enough that Northern Realty is focusing significant advertising on that target group . " Women professionals with steady careers are no longer waiting until they have families to buy homes , " Tobin explained . " Security is a primary concern for them . "
domestication: 有一些女性，经济条件比较宽裕，可以自己买房，她们很喜欢伍德兰公园这种社区，因为那里有保安，进出要经过门卫，经理随时在岗，还有专门的维护和园艺员。现在三四十岁的单身女性购买房屋的需求很多，北方地产公司也因此将目标锁定在了这个群体。据托宾说：“有稳定职业的女性不再等到组建家庭后才买房，而是选择提前拥有自己的房子。对于她们来说，安全是一个主要考虑因素。”
foreignization: 经济上已经足够稳定可以购买自己的房子的单身女性被Woodland Park所吸引。对于她们来说，Woodland Park提供了封闭的安全，有限的出入点，值班保安和管理员，以及维护和园林绿化人员。三十多岁和四十岁出头的单身女性购买的够多，以至于Northern Realty正在针对这个目标群体进行大量广告宣传。"事业稳定的职业女性不再等到组建家庭后才买房子，”托宾解释道。“安全问题是她们的主要关心。”

source: They had teamed up for grade-school baseball games , cradled one another 's newborns and raised beer bottles to celebrate retirements . Before Katrina scattered them to Las Vegas and Houston , they lived half-mile from one another in a quiet , mostly black neighborhood dotted with palm trees and ponds .
domestication: 他们曾一起参加小学棒球比赛，还互相抱过对方的新生儿，共同举起啤酒庆祝退休。卡特里娜飓风来临之前，他们住在一个安静的以非裔美国人为主的社区，到处都是棕榈树和池塘，彼此之间只有半英里的距离。但是这场灾难却让他们分散到了拉斯维加斯和休斯顿等地。
foreignization: 他们曾经一起参加小学棒球比赛，互相抱过对方的新生儿，并举起啤酒瓶来庆祝退休。在卡特里娜飓风将他们分散到拉斯维加斯和休斯顿之前，他们居住在一个安静、以非裔美国人为主的社区，社区里遍布棕榈树和池塘，他们的家距离彼此只有半英里。

They had teamed up for grade-school baseball games , cradled one another 's newborns and raised beer bottles to celebrate retirements . Before Katrina scattered them to Las Vegas and Houston , they lived half-mile from one another in a quiet , mostly black neighborhood dotted with palm trees and ponds .
他们曾一起参加小学棒球比赛，还互相抱过对方的新生儿，共同举起啤酒庆祝退休。卡特里娜飓风来临之前，他们住在一个安静的以非裔美国人为主的社区，到处都是棕榈树和池塘，彼此之间只有半英里的距离。但是这场灾难却让他们分散到了拉斯维加斯和休斯顿等地。

They had teamed up for grade-school baseball games , cradled one another 's newborns and raised beer bottles to celebrate retirements . Before Katrina scattered them to Las Vegas and Houston , they lived half-mile from one another in a quiet , mostly black neighborhood dotted with palm trees and ponds .
他们曾经一起参加小学棒球比赛，互相抱过对方的新生儿，并举起啤酒瓶来庆祝退休。在卡特里娜飓风将他们分散到拉斯维加斯和休斯顿之前，他们居住在一个安静、以非裔美国人为主的社区，社区里遍布棕榈树和池塘，他们的家距离彼此只有半英里。

source: There is also a lot of doomsday stuff out there . Because of my background , I have a propensity to believe things like that . source: Besides Landis and Silber , both from California , the passenger list included a woman whose first husband disappeared on a wartime flight out of Henderson Field ; about two dozen Germans and Austrians ; a retired member of the French diplomatic corps ; and other American veterans such as Lou Connick , the survivor of a Marine landing on Iwo Jima ( " My wife has quit going on these . source: Teddy is enamored of Doc , who though not a doctor seems to be able to cure almost anything . Teddy follows him around like a puppy , listening to his philosophy , watching him build and design . He loves Doc , wants most of all to be like him -self-sufficient , resilient , able to take on any complication and figure a way around it .
domestication: 泰迪非常崇拜Doc这个人，虽然Doc不是医生，但似乎什么都能治好。泰迪像小尾巴一样跟着Doc到处跑，听他讲道理，看他设计和制作东西。他太爱Doc了，最想做的事情就是变得和Doc一样——自给自足，能屈能伸，无论遇到什么麻烦都能想办法解决。泰迪觉得Doc真的是个人才，他有两下子，而且什么都懂，简直就跟神仙一样。
foreignization: 泰迪爱慕Doc，尽管Doc不是医生，但似乎可以治愈几乎所有疾病。泰迪像小狗一样跟着他，听他的哲学，观看他建造和设计。他爱Doc，最希望的是成为像他一样的自给自足、坚韧、能够接受任何复杂情况并找到解决方法的人。

source: Thus , the AARP study found , the average older boomer couple with a pension would need to save 3 percent of income annually to retire with 80 percent of pre-retirement income , assuming they live to normal life expectancy . A couple without a pension would need to save 8.3 percent of income to achieve the same goal .
domestication: 我们从美国退休人员协会（AARP）的研究中可以看到，普通的婴儿潮一代夫妇如果有养老金，他们每年只要存下收入的3%，就能在退休后拥有80%的退休前收入，假设他们能活到平均寿命。然而，如果没有养老金的话，他们就需要每年存下收入的8.3%，才能达到同样的目标。这说明了养老金对于退休后的生活质量有多重要。
foreignization: 因此，美国退休人员协会的研究发现，拥有养老金的平均老年嬉皮士夫妇每年需要节省3％的收入才能退休，并在预期寿命内保持80％的退休前收入。不拥有养老金的夫妇需要节省8.3％的收入来实现同样的目标。

source: One of the most intriguing mysteries about the assassination of John F. Kennedy , that darkest of American labyrinths , is why his brother Robert F. Kennedy apparently did nothing to investigate the crime . Bobby Kennedy was , after all , not just the attorney general of the United States at the time of the assassination -- he was his brother 's devoted partner , the man who took on the administration 's most grueling assignments , from civil rights to organized crime to Cuba , the hottest Cold War flash point of its day . But after the burst of gunfire in downtown Dallas on Nov. 22 , 1963 , ended this unique partnership , Bobby Kennedy seemed lost in a fog of grief , refusing to discuss the assassination with the Warren Commission and telling friends he had no heart for an aggressive investigation . " What difference does it make ? " he would say . " It wo n't bring him back . "
domestication: 约翰·F·肯尼迪遇刺案是美国历史上最耐人寻味的谜团之一。其中一个令人费解之处就是，他的弟弟罗伯特·F·肯尼迪似乎对此事毫无兴趣，连调查都没有进行过。要知道，当时的罗伯特·肯尼迪不仅是美国的司法部长，更是他哥哥的得力助手，承担着从民权到有组织犯罪再到古巴等最棘手的工作，古巴当时正是冷战的焦点。但是在1963年11月22日，德克萨斯州达拉斯市中心枪声四起，打破了这对兄弟的合作，罗伯特·肯尼迪似乎被悲痛所淹没，对沃伦委员会拒绝讨论遇刺案，只跟朋友说他没有心思进行深入调查。“有什么意义呢？”他会这么说，“这又不能让他复活。”
foreignization: 约翰·F·肯尼迪遇刺案最耐人寻味的谜团之一，就是他的兄弟罗伯特·F·肯尼迪似乎没有调查过这桩罪行。 鲍比·肯尼迪在遇刺时不仅是美国的司法部长，他还是他哥哥的忠诚伙伴，是承担管理层最艰巨任务的人，从民权到有组织犯罪再到古巴，这是当天最热点的冷战地点。 但是，1963年11月22日，德克萨斯州达拉斯市中心的一阵枪声结束了这种独特的合作伙伴关系之后，鲍比·肯尼迪似乎陷入了悲伤的迷雾之中，拒绝与沃伦委员会讨论暗杀事件，并告诉朋友们他没有心情进行积极的调查。 “ 这有什么区别？ ” 他会说。 “ 这不会把他带回来。 ”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

One of the most intriguing mysteries about the assassination of John F. Kennedy , that darkest of American labyrinths , is why his brother Robert F. Kennedy apparently did nothing to investigate the crime . Bobby Kennedy was , after all , not just the attorney general of the United States at the time of the assassination -- he was his brother 's devoted partner , the man who took on the administration 's most grueling assignments , from civil rights to organized crime to Cuba , the hottest Cold War flash point of its day . But after the burst of gunfire in downtown Dallas on Nov. 22 , 1963 , ended this unique partnership , Bobby Kennedy seemed lost in a fog of grief , refusing to discuss the assassination with the Warren Commission and telling friends he had no heart for an aggressive investigation . " What difference does it make ? " he would say . " It wo n't bring him back . "

source: Ironically , " Roselily 's " very examination of issues related to a middle-age first marriage of a mother of four to a man of a different religion must have been as threatening to traditionalists as the issues over which she ruminated . Purportedly a simple woman , the persona could not hold back conflicting , complex strands of considerations as she prepared to recite her marriage vows to a man who loved her and would care for her , but at the price of much of her freedom .
domestication: 说来有趣，“Roselily”的故事实际上是在探讨一位四个孩子的母亲与不同宗教信仰的男人结婚所产生的各种问题，这些问题对于传统主义者来说同样具有威胁性。表面上看，这位女性很简单朴实，但当她准备向深爱她的男人发誓时，却无法控制自己对各种复杂问题的思考和矛盾之情。这个男人爱她，会照顾她，但是却要求她付出很多自由作为代价。
foreignization: 讽刺的是，"罗西莉"对一个四个孩子的母亲与不同宗教信仰的人结婚的中年初婚问题的审视，可能对传统主义者来说和她沉思的问题一样具有威胁性。据称是一个简单的女人，这个人物无法抑制冲突的、复杂的考虑因素，当她准备向一个爱她并会照顾她的人发誓结婚，但要付出她大部分自由的代价时。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Ironically , " Roselily 's " very examination of issues related to a middle-age first marriage of a mother of four to a man of a different religion must have been as threatening to traditionalists as the issues over which she ruminated . Purportedly a simple woman , the persona could not hold back conflicting , complex strands of considerations as she prepared to recite her marriage vows to a man who loved her and would care for her , but at the price of much of her freedom .

source: It matters little that light heavyweight Antonio Tarver did not look sharp in an exhibition win over German Thomas Ulrich last week in Portland , Ore . But Olympic assistant coach Jesse Ravelo did n't hide his feelings . " He fought a tough guy but he needs to be more aggressive and not so timid with his punches , " Ravelo said . " He needs some work , but he is capable . He 'll be OK . " . . . Twelve Olympic team members and 12 alternates open their second stage of training camp today at Northern Michigan University . The Red and Blue squads will spend two weeks at NMU ( the home base of Olympic coach Al Mitchell ) , then split up again for two exhibitions against Russia ( June 14 in Portland , Ore. ; June 17 in Miami ) . The Olympians will open their final two-week camp June 25 in Augusta .
domestication: 半重量级拳击手安东尼奥·塔弗在俄勒冈州波特兰对阵德国拳手托马斯·乌尔里希的表演赛中状态不佳，这事儿反正也没什么大不了的。但奥运队助理教练杰西·拉维洛却直言不讳。“他对战的是个强敌，但他需要更主动出击，不要这么畏缩不前，”拉维洛说：“他还需要下点功夫，但他有这个能力，他会没事的。”奥运队的12名队员和12名替补将从今天开始在北密歇根大学开启第二阶段的集训。红蓝两队将在北密歇根大学（奥运队教练阿尔·米切尔的基地）度过两周，然后再次分开，分别参加6月14日在俄勒冈州波特兰和6月17日在迈阿密对阵俄罗斯的两场表演赛。奥运队将于6月25日在奥古斯塔开始他们最后的两周集训。

The Olympians will open their final two-week camp June 25 in Augusta .

source: The State Department would n't confirm the report . source: As obstacles have cropped up , such as starting gates too narrow or trees too close together to accommodate the 36-inch-wide chairs , NORBA has worked with race sponsors to resolve the problems , Milburn says . But any move to set up a separate category or sanctioning body - with separate rules , scoring , equipment standards or definitions of disability - will have to come from the ATC racers themselves , he insists .
domestication: 一路走来，困难不断，比如起跑门太窄或者树木太密集，没法容纳36英寸宽的轮椅。针对这些问题，NORBA一直在与赛事赞助商一起寻找解决方案，Milburn说。但是，他强调，如果要设立单独的项目或管理机构，包括制定单独的规则、计分方式、设备标准或者残疾人的定义，那就必须由ATC车手自己出发，自主解决了。毕竟，这是他们自己的赛事，还是得靠他们自己来摸索出路。
foreignization: 随着障碍的出现，例如起跑门太窄或树木太密集，无法容纳 36 英寸宽的轮椅，NORBA 已经与比赛赞助商合作以解决这些问题，Milburn 说。但是，任何设立单独类别或认证机构的行动——拥有单独的规则、计分、设备标准或残疾定义——都必须来自 ATC 的赛车手本身，他坚持说。

source: " Many young moms comment about the dirty looks they get in supermarkets and on the street , " Ms. Davis says . Their parents are often hurt and angry . Teachers may doubt their chances for success . Even doctors and nurses are sometimes less patient with teens in labor than they are with other women during childbirth , Davis finds .
domestication: 很多年轻妈妈们会在超市或街上受到别人的白眼，戴维斯女士说。他们的父母常常会感到受伤和愤怒。老师们可能会对他们成功的机会产生怀疑。即使是医生和护士，有时候也会对青少年产妇比对其他分娩的女性更缺乏耐心，戴维斯发现了这一点。你知道，世态炎凉，这些年轻妈妈们确实面临着不少压力和质疑。很多人都觉得他们还太年轻，无法承担起做母亲的责任，或者会因为年纪轻轻就当妈妈而被别人看不起。但是，我们不能忘记，他们也是需要关怀和理解的人。
foreignization: “很多年轻的妈妈们都提到她们在超市和街上受到的不屑的目光，”戴维斯女士说。他们的父母往往会感到伤心和愤怒。老师可能会怀疑他们成功的机会。即使是医生和护士，有时候也会对分娩中的少女比对其他女性更缺乏耐心，戴维斯发现。

source: " We have been flooded with calls from the public , including British Airways staff , asking us to see if we can keep Concorde flying , " Branson said in a statement . " If Virgin Atlantic , with its lower cost base , believes it can make a success of it , we will be asking British Airways to give us the planes for the same price that they were given them " -- one British pound .
domestication: 维珍大西洋航空公司老板理查德·布兰森最近发表声明说：“自从英国航空公司宣布停飞协和式客机后，我们接到很多来自公众的电话，甚至连英国航空公司员工都打来电话，请求我们看看能不能让协和式客机继续飞行。”“如果维珍大西洋航空公司因为成本较低而认为自己能成功经营下去，那么我们将要求英国航空公司以同样的价格把飞机转让给我们——一英镑。”

source: Nineteen ninety-one is going to be our most difficult year . The high-point of servicing our foreign loans will be in 1991 . In 1992 , the payments will decrease by 50 percent . Negotiations have been held with leaders of some countries on opening credit . ... But everyone realizes that however important foreign aid may be , the credit itself wo n't solve our problems . We must count on our forces and organization and determination in transition to the market , as well as the toughest austerity regime . ...
domestication: 1991年将会是我们最难的一年，因为到那时我们要偿还外债的高峰期。到了1992年，我们的还款额将会减少50%。我们已经与部分国家进行了谈判，希望能够获得信贷支持。但每个人都清楚，虽然外援很重要，但是单靠贷款本身并不能解决我们的问题。我们必须依靠自己的力量、组织和决心，实施市场转型，并采取最严格的紧缩政策来应对挑战。
foreignization: 1991年将是我们的最艰难的一年，偿还外债的高峰将出现在1991年。到1992年，偿债额将减少50%。与一些国家领导人就开放信贷问题进行了谈判。... 但是每个人都认识到，无论外援多么重要，信贷本身并不能解决我们的问题。我们必须依靠自己的力量和组织，以及在向市场转型时的决心，并实行最严格的紧缩政令。...

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Nineteen ninety-one is going to be our most difficult year . The high-point of servicing our foreign loans will be in 1991 . In 1992 , the payments will decrease by 50 percent . Negotiations have been held with leaders of some countries on opening credit . ... But everyone realizes that however important foreign aid may be , the credit itself wo n't solve our problems . We must count on our forces and organization and determination in transition to the market , as well as the toughest austerity regime . ...
1991年将会是我们最难的一年，因为到那时我们要偿还外债的高峰期。到了1992年，我们的还款额将会减少50%。我们已经与部分国家进行了谈判，希望能够获得信贷支持。但每个人都清楚，虽然外援很重要，但是单靠贷款本身并不能解决我们的问题。我们必须依靠自己的力量、组织和决心，实施市场转型，并采取最严格的紧缩政策来应对挑战。

source: In her first appearance , Mary Beth took a few questions , and in answering one said that Jill was a good " ambassador " for Iraq , since she 'd reported the struggles of Iraqis ' daily lives . But later someone told her that the word " ambassador , " in Arabic , translates as " government official , " not " general emissary . " And the last thing the family wanted to imply was that Jill worked for any government .
domestication: 在她第一次露面时，玛丽·贝丝回答了几个问题，其中一个问题的答案让她说吉尔是伊拉克的好“大使”，因为她报道了伊拉克人日常生活的挣扎。但后来有人告诉她，阿拉伯语里的“大使”一词翻译过来是指政府官员，而不是普通的代表。而家庭最不想暗示的是吉尔为任何政府工作。
foreignization: 在她第一次出现时，Mary Beth回答了几个问题，并且回答其中一个问题说Jill是一个很好的“大使”，因为她报道了伊拉克人日常生活的挣扎。但是后来有人告诉她，在阿拉伯语中，“大使”的意思是“政府官员”，而不是“普通的代表”。而家人绝不想暗示Jill为任何政府工作。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In her first appearance , Mary Beth took a few questions , and in answering one said that Jill was a good " ambassador " for Iraq , since she 'd reported the struggles of Iraqis ' daily lives . But later someone told her that the word " ambassador , " in Arabic , translates as " government official , " not " general emissary . " And the last thing the family wanted to imply was that Jill worked for any government .

source: NEW YORK -- Until recently , few would have included Eddy Hartenstein in a list of the media world 's most-sought-after dealmakers . The jovial one-time engineer has spent the years since 1990 , when he founded DirecTV , preoccupied with the nuts and bolts of building a mostly rural business with a technology that had a questionable future . While he toiled , cable operators spent billions of dollars on preparing to offer glitzy interactive services .
domestication: 在纽约，直到最近，很少有人会把埃迪·哈登斯坦（Eddy Hartenstein）列入媒体界最抢手的交易高手名单。他曾经是一名工程师，性格也很随和，自1990年创立DirecTV以来，这些年他都在忙着建立一个主要面向农村地区的业务，然而所用的技术前景堪忧。当他埋头苦干的时候，各大有线电视运营商却在花费数十亿美元来准备推出豪华的交互式服务。
foreignization: 纽约 -- 直到最近，很少有人会在媒体界最抢手的交易商名单中包括埃迪·哈腾斯坦（Eddy Hartenstein） 。 这位和蔼可亲的一次性工程师自1990年创立DirecTV以来，这些年来一直忙于建造一个以农村为主、技术前景存疑的业务。 当他辛苦劳动时，电缆运营商花费了数十亿美元来准备提供豪华的交互式服务。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

NEW YORK -- Until recently , few would have included Eddy Hartenstein in a list of the media world 's most-sought-after dealmakers . The jovial one-time engineer has spent the years since 1990 , when he founded DirecTV , preoccupied with the nuts and bolts of building a mostly rural business with a technology that had a questionable future . While he toiled , cable operators spent billions of dollars on preparing to offer glitzy interactive services .

NEW YORK -- Until recently , few would have included Eddy Hartenstein in a list of the media world 's most-sought-after dealmakers . The jovial one-time engineer has spent the years since 1990 , when he founded DirecTV , preoccupied with the nuts and bolts of building a mostly rural business with a technology that had a questionable future . While he toiled , cable operators spent billions of dollars on preparing to offer glitzy interactive services .
纽约 -- 直到最近，很少有人会在媒体界最抢手的交易商名单中包括埃迪·哈腾斯坦（Eddy Hartenstein） 。 这位和蔼可亲的一次性工程师自1990年创立DirecTV以来，这些年来一直忙于建造一个以农村为主、技术前景存疑的业务。 当他辛苦劳动时，电缆运营商花费了数十亿美元来准备提供豪华的交互式服务。

source: Watching the Okies roll down their main street , children in Seligman , Ariz. , made cruel jokes . How do you tell a rich Okie from a poor Okie ? A rich Okie has TWO mattresses tied to his car . Four decades later it was Seligman 's turn to experience a sudden reversal of fortune . In 1978 , I-40 opened a mile away and traffic on 66 stopped .
domestication: 在亚利桑那州的塞利格曼镇上，孩子们看着奥克拉荷马州人开车驶过主街时，开起了残酷的玩笑：怎么分辨有钱的奥克拉荷马州人和没钱的奥克拉荷马州人呢？答案是，有钱的奥克拉荷马州人会在车后捆两个床垫。四十年后，轮到塞利格曼镇经历一场突如其来的财运逆转了。1978年，40号州际公路通车了一英里之外，66号公路上的交通量骤减。就像一夜之间，塞利格曼镇的繁华不再，人们纷纷离开，这个曾经热闹的小镇顿时变得门可罗雀。
foreignization: 看着俄克拉荷马州的人们沿着他们的主街而下， 亚利桑那州塞利格曼的孩子们开着残忍的玩笑。 你怎么区分一个富有的俄克拉荷马人和一个贫穷的俄克拉荷马人？一个富有的俄克拉荷马人有两个床垫绑在他的汽车上。 四十年后，轮到塞利格曼突然遭遇财运逆转了。 1978年，I-40公路在一英里以外的地方开通了，66号公路上的交通停止了。

Zion-Benton 74 , Warren 67 : Warren ( 11-5 , 5-2 North Suburban ) jumped to a 30-10 lead with 5:31 left in the first half but No. 10 Zion-Benton ( 16-0 , 6-0 North Suburban ) went on a 30-10 run to claim a 65-54 lead with 3:29 to go in the game . Four consecutive free throws by Aunny Kimbrough ( 39 points ) clinched the victory . Carter Crane
西安-本顿队以74比67战胜沃伦队。比赛开始时，沃伦队（11胜5负，北郊区5胜2负）领先30-10，距离上半场结束还有5分31秒。但是排名第十的西安-本顿队（16胜0负，北郊区6胜0负）突然发力，打出30-10的进攻浪潮，到比赛还剩3分29秒时取得了65-54的领先优势。奥尼·金布劳（Aunny Kimbrough）连续罚中四个球，确保了胜局。

锡安-本顿 74 ，沃伦 67：沃伦（11-5，5-2北郊区）在上半场还剩5:31的时候取得了30-10的领先，但排名第10的锡安-本顿（16-0，6-0北郊区）发起了30-10的进攻，以65-54领先，距离比赛结束还有3:29。Aunny Kimbrough（39分）连续投中四个罚球，确保了胜利。卡特·克雷恩

source: Maria Isabella Schneider , 15 , of Brazil , participates in the Broadcom MASTERS International at UCI on Monday May 15 , 2017 . The program brings together 26 middle schools kids from 19 countries who have won their countries ' science and engineering fairs and is a companion program to the Intel International Science and Engineering Fair for high school students which this in Los Angeles this week . ( Photo by Ana Venegas , Orange County Register/SCNG )
domestication: 巴西15岁的小姑娘玛丽亚·伊莎贝拉·施耐德，在2017年5月15日星期一，参加了在加州大学欧文分校举办的宝洁科技大赛。这个项目汇聚了来自19个国家的26名中学生，这些孩子都曾在各自国家的科学和工程博览会上获奖。这是针对高中生的英特尔国际科学与工程博览会的配套项目，而后者恰好也在洛杉矶举行。照片由安娜·维内加斯拍摄，发表在橙县登记报和南加州新闻集团。
foreignization: 玛丽亚·伊莎贝拉·施耐德（Maria Isabella Schneider） ，15岁，来自巴西，在2017年5月15日星期一参加了在UCI举行的英特尔国际科学与工程博览会（Intel International Science and Engineering Fair）中学校学生的伴侣项目——布罗德科姆MASTERS国际赛（Broadcom MASTERS International）。该项目汇集了来自19个国家的26所中学的孩子们，他们都曾赢得过各自国家的科学和工程博览会，并且本周在洛杉矶举行的活动中与高中生一起参加英特尔国际科学与工程博览会。（照片由安娜·维内加斯拍摄，橙县注册报/SCNG）

source: Even in the course of perestroika , serious errors and miscalculations have been made by the leadership . We underestimated the depth of the crisis in the society . ... But we can not give way to panic . We must not succumb to the pressure of the present difficulties . And most importantly , we must act to remove the most serious dangers and use all opportunities opened by perestroika . . ..
domestication: 即使在改革开放的过程中，领导层也犯下了严重的错误和失误。我们低估了社会危机的深度。但是，我们不能因此而惊慌失措。我们不能被当前的困难所压倒。最重要的是，我们必须采取行动，消除最大的危险，并利用改革开放带来的所有机会。
foreignization: 即使在改革的进程中，领导层也犯了严重的错误和失误。我们低估了社会危机的深度……但是我们不能屈服于恐慌。我们不应屈服于当前困难的压力。而最重要的是，我们必须采取行动，消除最严重的危险，并利用改革开放的所有机会。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Even in the course of perestroika , serious errors and miscalculations have been made by the leadership . We underestimated the depth of the crisis in the society . ... But we can not give way to panic . We must not succumb to the pressure of the present difficulties . And most importantly , we must act to remove the most serious dangers and use all opportunities opened by perestroika . . ..
即使在改革开放的过程中，领导层也犯下了严重的错误和失误。我们低估了社会危机的深度。但是，我们不能因此而惊慌失措。我们不能被当前的困难所压倒。最重要的是，我们必须采取行动，消除最大的危险，并利用改革开放带来的所有机会。

source: Three times a year , Daley meets with " Concerned Clergy for a Better Chicago , " a group of 20 powerful black ministers . " The preachers are talking to more people at 11 a.m. on Sunday than anybody . And when you can get your message to them , they act as your conduit to the entire community , " says Mr. Bowen .
domestication: 每年三次，戴利都会与“为了更好的芝加哥关心的神职人员”（Concerned Clergy for a Better Chicago）这个团体会面，这个团体由二十位有影响力的黑人牧师组成。鲍文先生说：“这些牧师在星期天上午十一点钟的时候能接触到比任何人更多的人，当你能够让他们了解你的想法时，他们就会成为你与整个社区沟通的桥梁。”
foreignization: 每年三次，戴利都会与“为了更好的芝加哥关心的神职人员”团体会面，这个团体有20位有影响力的黑人牧师。“牧师们在周日上午11点钟的时候所谈论的东西，比任何人都能被更多的人听到。而且，当你能够将你的信息传达给他们的时候，他们就成为了你与整个社区沟通的桥梁，”鲍文先生说。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Three times a year , Daley meets with " Concerned Clergy for a Better Chicago , " a group of 20 powerful black ministers . " The preachers are talking to more people at 11 a.m. on Sunday than anybody . And when you can get your message to them , they act as your conduit to the entire community , " says Mr. Bowen .
